name: A.G. Holder
subject: The DOJ is retreating — we are not
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Let’s talk about the Department of Justice.
|
---

Peter,
Every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals. Now is our time.
Leading the fair maps movement requires ongoing vigilance and sustained investment from **all of us,[and we hope you’ll join us in powering this movement with a donation to All On The Line.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110594247/554820795/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2NOR_email_20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmZjhmMjU0LTBlNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZKNSanZLrtU5S2_XKCaHZKscyPcYWLu-q4g6vglCZcA=) **
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110594248/554820796/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2NOR_email_20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmZjhmMjU0LTBlNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZKNSanZLrtU5S2_XKCaHZKscyPcYWLu-q4g6vglCZcA=)
---
The fact is that, right now, the foundations of our democracy are being pushed to the edge in more ways than one.
As someone who spent the majority of my career at the Department of Justice — from line lawyer to U.S. Attorney, Deputy Attorney General, and ultimately Attorney General — **it absolutely tears me apart** to see the current administration wreaking havoc upon this institution. They have gone as far as dismantling the Civil Rights Division.
In so many ways, the Civil Rights Division is the conscience of the Justice Department. Without it, our freedoms are at risk — especially as far-right extremists make it clear they’re working to undermine democracy and thwart fair representation.
Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard.
Having the Justice Department enforce civil rights protections, including upholding the Voting Rights Act, has been foundational to the promise of American democracy. Now, we are seeing the Department used as a tool to empower an anti-democracy minority.
**So while the Department of Justice retreats from its duty, we the people cannot. The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical.**
All On The Line and our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), are on the frontlines of the ongoing struggle to ensure that voters can participate in a democracy that’s truly and fairly representative.
From fighting for fair maps in courtrooms to combating anti-democracy legislation in state legislatures — from mobilizing volunteers against gerrymandering to equipping voters with the information they need to make their voices heard — our movement rallies Americans to ensure fair elections and fair representation.
[**At the end of the day, it comes down to the power of the American people. Together, we can defend our democracy — and we must. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110594249/554820797/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2NOR_email_20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250630-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2NOR-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2NOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmZjhmMjU0LTBlNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZKNSanZLrtU5S2_XKCaHZKscyPcYWLu-q4g6vglCZcA=)

clean_body: Let’s talk about the Department of Justice. | Peter, Every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals. Now is our time. Leading the fair maps movement requires ongoing vigilance and sustained investment from all of us,= = The fact is that, right now, the foundations of our democracy are being pushed to the edge in more ways than one. As someone who spent the majority of my career at the Department of Justice — from line lawyer to U.S. Attorney, Deputy Attorney General, and ultimately Attorney General — it absolutely tears me apart to see the current administration wreaking havoc upon this institution. They have gone as far as dismantling the Civil Rights Division. In so many ways, the Civil Rights Division is the conscience of the Justice Department. Without it, our freedoms are at risk — especially as far-right extremists make it clear they’re working to undermine democracy and thwart fair representation. Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard. Having the Justice Department enforce civil rights protections, including upholding the Voting Rights Act, has been foundational to the promise of American democracy. Now, we are seeing the Department used as a tool to empower an anti-democracy minority. So while the Department of Justice retreats from its duty, we the people cannot. The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical. All On The Line and our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), are on the frontlines of the ongoing struggle to ensure that voters can participate in a democracy that’s truly and fairly representative. From fighting for fair maps in courtrooms to combating anti-democracy legislation in state legislatures — from mobilizing volunteers against gerrymandering to equipping voters with the information they need to make their voices heard — our movement rallies Americans to ensure fair elections and fair representation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
Every journey starts with one step. Stopping the vote suppressors in Georgia won't happen overnight, but incremental progress like this is crucial.
RUSH $25 or more right now to protect our fundamental right to vote in Georgia and across the country so that every vote counts >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=XZDhmFotRsnCuTLfxPLa41ILXxVZE7XIaVk5cKC8tvc2AEQrfiNtcL9IFRZWgu53/xzXjt+/oy+evHduPNydNgKHDNNr81U95e9mmUgGddY=]
AP: Georgia Supreme Court overturns some election rules, curbing State Election Board’s power [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=XZDhmFotRsnCuTLfxPLa41ILXxVZE7XIaVk5cKC8tvc2AEQrfiNtcL9IFRZWgu53/xzXjt+/oy+evHduPNydNgKHDNNr81U95e9mmUgGddY=]
A great update from Georgia, everyone: Georgia’s highest court overturned four rules passed by the State Election Board just before last year’s general election, ruling the board overstepped its authority and intruded on lawmaking power reserved for legislators under the state constitution.
To refresh your memory: The State Election Board passed a slate of controversial new rules in August and September 2024, including requirements that ballots be hand-counted after the close of polls, that someone delivering an absentee ballot in person provide a signature and photo ID, that county election board members be allowed to conduct a “ reasonable inquiry ” before certifying results, and that county election board members be granted broad access to election-related documents.
These new rules brought an outcry that the board’s majority was trying to improperly use its power to help MAGA candidates and follow disproved conspiracy theories about our elections.
The state Supreme Court’s unanimous decision to overturn these highly partisan, suppressive rules limits the ability of the State Election Board and other executive branch agencies of Georgia’s government to try and put their fingers on the scales and tip elections their way.
We know this isn't the end of voter suppression in Georgia, Team. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to provide the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states like Georgia, in the courts, and beyond >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=XZDhmFotRsnCuTLfxPLa41ILXxVZE7XIaVk5cKC8tvc2AEQrfiNtcL9IFRZWgu53/xzXjt+/oy+evHduPNydNgKHDNNr81U95e9mmUgGddY=]

clean_body: We're running out of time...| | | Making sure you saw the note Brad left? We sent it around earlier—but with the End-of-Quarter deadline hours away and still roughly $600 short , I wanted to bump this back to the top of your inbox. | | | | Thanks for stepping up. Brad will appreciate this more than you know. —Team Knott | | | —---------------- FWD Message —---------------- From: Jacob, Team KnottSubject: A sticky note from Brad | | Peter, I found this note from Brad on my desk this morning—and it is the best way I know how to tell you about our urgent upcoming End-of-Quarter Fundraising Deadline. Y ep, post-it note and all... 😄 | | | | | | We’re moving fast toward tonight's big public deadline, and Brad’s counting on supporters like you to come through. | | Thanks for standing with us. —Jacob Team Knott | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@bradknott.com.

Peter,
I just got off the phone with Berrett, my campaign finance director. Here’s the honest truth: **we’re still $4,152 short of hitting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**
Reaching this goal isn’t just about checking a box. It’s how we keep investing in the work that’s moving Minnesota forward—protecting our freedoms, strengthening our communities, and making sure every family has a fair shot.
When we talk about building One Minnesota, this is what it looks like: thousands of folks pitching in whatever they can to power a movement that puts people first.

When we talk about building One Minnesota, this is what it looks like: thousands of folks pitching in whatever they can to power a movement that puts people first. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this team and this movement. Let’s do this—together. I'm grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: FEC Alerts via Peters HQ
subject: Defeating the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter – While the GOP House majority has spent their time caving to extremism, playing politics, and fighting amongst themselves, Scott remains laser-focused on getting things done for San Diegans.

He has led fights to increase clean energy investments, help veterans access their benefits, and reduce the federal deficit. But, the progress Scott has fought so hard to bring back to our community is on the line – and what we do right now will set the tone for the rest of the race.

_**That’s why our FEC deadline is so important. It’s a critical opportunity to prove our strength to the GOP and build the resources we need to defend our campaign from right-wing attacks.**_

body:

---
Fellow Conservative,

Are you still reading our texts and emails?

To say fundraising has been slow is an understatement, and I completely understand why. You all trusted us last November to get D.C. back on track, and now you’re waiting to see how we govern before opening your pocketbooks again.

Fair enough.

But democrats are beginning to coalesce around candidates they plan to support in next year’s elections and are starting to funnel money to their campaigns.

We cannot fall behind.

[**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT BEFORE MIDNIGHT**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=87aa7afa448d4a91afeaeaa283aa396c&_e=yP7yQurxBMRqA6FrNFP1BLJRIYziUr2c4FO6sK4-elc5Ao1KnukEdPTsI_wFMijWsq5hGmi0tN3TkdLOl4-d7bPNDY2UbGal8vs6KpkISyEGFbREXHoY1t3K0oB7ExezJG6GpU0LyjnV-7QSpMr-vhGlCSsd7Nz-I9ehcjGL_Zses-OCZnil0n9NSrGoikB2vJ9UDqBX9TcgykzaLg-tN-X87fW93CTLMelgPXVmQRr2oa8oxZjZgJpmxHxFr9vCHnI46wYJWFHxGao1imB3Q8l5fXamvKAFQ-DT58weSHVuepiRq2meKx3lRGNFFJ_9P14DXl8Ck645jmtn3o7jwUJAS2R_5J7njelpJFGpCZBEFiGajKqeBH6_HLW0R8FAoiohiN2CE3OKZPPsseAiudmbKidQl3bPw4wyBZ-4nxOGMunTH_MAfTZIBCr0n8ePrL0prALzBXLuFagcRsIT1iSR_662ITUJKx1Xz5-kBxD_dwnwtQ3FLJ-ZAy3W2Cw5reziDJTfUGs33hvI67yNA7Mm-acjjHxpuUj_8uvS80zoK0r50lBtvnrIfbGhHyJ0Ypki3WPRSkefN840O8SifzJ4fT0mxloP58z7HnIBNZz7dEOGQcXsmwAZmnK5l7BVz-2vsIo8SzGUEx8JzY7Q7qTY3Nu1A22oA50ovbRxrndUH82PN0V4HMMhIbXUMPye)
There are mere hours until the end of the second fundraising quarter 2025. So far this month, we’ve raised just $42,000 toward our efforts to hold onto the Senate in next year’s midterms and support President Trump’s America First Agenda - a simple fraction of what we will need when the time comes to begin spending in earnest once again.

_**[I won’t lie to you—it’s been eight months since the election, and we’re starting to wonder whether we’ve lost your support or whether you’ve just been dormant. Whatever the case, the purpose of my outreach today is to ensure you know that we’re still committed to you, and we need to know we can expect the same.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=87aa7afa448d4a91afeaeaa283aa396c&_e=yP7yQurxBMRqA6FrNFP1BLJRIYziUr2c4FO6sK4-elc5Ao1KnukEdPTsI_wFMijWsq5hGmi0tN3TkdLOl4-d7bPNDY2UbGal8vs6KpkISyEGFbREXHoY1t3K0oB7ExezJG6GpU0LyjnV-7QSpMr-vhGlCSsd7Nz-I9ehcjGL_Zses-OCZnil0n9NSrGoikB2vJ9UDqBX9TcgykzaLg-tN-X87fW93CTLMelgPXVmQRqDhHlBlh9DEOw1kBFgTfggs5AEq_poCvZjzwUGYzlujOOw0SOXCfCQAMy6KwOQecBBjeSQB48oo0ZTqp644zA9C8COrlt_4GdkcCT4JLMT7nfkmQZsl7vSS5oBNI-G2lA43_zO5NOwXNpLgMP9E0HhK9G_xFjNoVft_a_xxd2U7EEP6P-iylgqEX9FVrLW7AnVLBsON94Vin7Hvb4fb_lNEuOabaXPene-nT9eu7F0EnKRhrmZGGaXdmxe6-U2dppACcJEAwI5juhMcTMxJMWBhqSbEeECrxBlCga2EBrcw0FGOaWt7bJgf0fZ6Bg99jwYL1FXUeEhSwHXVD7uCPzKlpaqNXTQmbyX2URs-w-D8YqHp2AbLCPGPLWskxufkqgjNO6wItu0sCxiDimJzT_Ru0bWG6x4FtHwkvM1KcNkbQR0CIdmfuY1C9k4mhnP3ZlgZ31WNcOziVHhfvTOrFLN) **_

clean_body: We made some progress over the weekend, but not enough | - Fellow Conservative, Are you still reading our texts and emails? To say fundraising has been slow is an understatement, and I completely understand why. You all trusted us last November to get D.C. back on track, and now you’re waiting to see how we govern before opening your pocketbooks again. Fair enough. But democrats are beginning to coalesce around candidates they plan to support in next year’s elections and are starting to funnel money to their campaigns. We cannot fall behind. There are mere hours until the end of the second fundraising quarter 2025. So far this month, we’ve raised just $42,000 toward our efforts to hold onto the Senate in next year’s midterms and support President Trump’s America First Agenda - a simple fraction of what we will need when the time comes to begin spending in earnest once again. I’m sending you this email to see what we can raise before midnight tonight. This month has been rough, to say the least, but perhaps you’ll donate and help make today a smashing success. We certainly need it to be a success. If we wait to act, the midterms will be upon us, and we won’t be prepared. Respectfully, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Christina Bohannan
subject: We’re not here to play it safe or play it small
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110595498/554829190/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU5ZjNmYi0wZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTrA9Hk0WzsiBmazWJD6SMNS4mjqR0IhcmBn8e1UvF8=)

Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for the incredible support since we launched this campaign. From strong early poll numbers to the outpouring of grassroots enthusiasm, it’s clear we’ve got serious momentum — and that’s because of this amazing team.

Now, we have a chance to back all of that up with a strong first FEC report. These numbers will be a great opportunity to send a message. Reporters, Republican national observers, and yes, my opponent, will all be watching to see what kind of operation we’re building.

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and here’s the honest truth: We’re coming up just short of our goal. We set a target of raising $50,000 before midnight, and when I tell you we are _so close_ , I mean it. It’s right there — but only if our team steps up in these final hours.

We’re not here to play it safe or play it small. We’re here to win this race for IA-01 and bring real leadership back to Congress.

Can I count on you to chip in and help us close the gap before midnight? You can make a donation at this personalized link >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q2-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110595499/554829191/-1606373703?refcode=em25_250630_EOQ5pr_fnd_gq_act___CBP_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250630_EOQ5pr_fnd_gq_act___CBP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ba59f3fb-0f56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTU5ZjNmYi0wZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZTrA9Hk0WzsiBmazWJD6SMNS4mjqR0IhcmBn8e1UvF8=)**

Thanks for being in this with me. Let’s finish this quarter strong.

With gratitude,

Christina

name: PA Dems
subject: This is your last chance to be counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

_In just a few hours, we’ll file our end-of-quarter report with the FEC._

No more reminders. No more emails. This is your final shot to be on the record before the deadline hits.

And if you care about keeping abortion legal in Pennsylvania...
If you care about fair maps, fair courts, and basic f*cking rights...
Then you should know what’s on the line: three seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for grabs this year.

[We’d love to include your name, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110595561/554829725/1318455813?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250630_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEzOGEyMy0xMDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUHWpV0whMfX-984vsczl2VZsDu2cPz-tkkvbDkhKk4=) | [Make your donation before midnight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110595563/554829727/1318455813?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250630_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEzOGEyMy0xMDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YUHWpV0whMfX-984vsczl2VZsDu2cPz-tkkvbDkhKk4=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. name: Raul (personal)
subject: Last call to help us hit our goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=qVhj%2B4I53Utu6D3UISZjGB23Ki0H9FwF9m9zvxX76Gmp2euolWvRsfAiH1rWnmmyEzmANuZxeMI%2FTvZOGGq4YrVgV7mgn20JUbSVnyj89OUIjXIyP3Cl%2BhKYo98FYRgNdrlTxiZq3eChsKOIqrLPAO1UW0bx%2B3vC7h8clk%2B2MZdQPZjBZ%2FhX5xWFTzQB6Udq6oqsEKNcYUdoXUap%2Fo2%2Bm7i%2BoNBPfQ7TMPF3Y%2F4hALivMjuBnGLnp8A9R3HDtpjqbkIrbxYYz%2BwEv5z42S9MKeJVWhIiF0MFHfQKZZkQTiOtkW%2FPbGu18y3WwRsS88o7XMhcfSwE30hCLd5A2dB22ucnpCvvKCNbYxodABVMcTwzr8l2R0nFIuzsOiqH%2BHJQdu339zMM8%2BN3m8c%2F%2B%2BC9urOYtD8Uxu7KhOAto5B5p2nbCAakLQdrHbFx%2F8Gc0M5k]

It's Raul.

I wish I didn’t have to send this, but it’s the last day of the quarter, and we’re still behind on our $11,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

I know, everyone’s inbox is full of emails like this right now. But this one’s important — because if we fall short tonight, it’s going to make the road ahead even harder.

I’ll be straight with you: CA-25 could be the difference between flipping the House or watching Trump and the GOP tighten their grip even more in 2026.

Seriously.

Trump gained 13 points here since 2020, and we’re already seeing Republicans lining up to take a shot at this seat. They know if they can flip this seat, it gets a whole lot harder for Democrats to take back the House.

We’ve held strong here for seven terms — but we’re not immune. And we definitely can’t outspend them. They’ve got billionaires, super PACs, and dark money rolling in. But we've got each other.

This campaign runs on small-dollar donations — people giving what they can, when they can. That’s the only way we can stay in this fight. And right now, with just hours left until the quarter ends, we need a big push to close the gap.

So, will you chip in $10 before midnight to help us protect this seat and get us one step closer to flipping the House in 2026? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-june25?amount=10&refcode=SBD_RR_EM_FR_063025_EOQ5_30DO30DNTL_D5_S1

Thanks for being a part of this team,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer] CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]

[https://drraulruiz.com/] LEARN MORE » [https://drraulruiz.com/]

body:
I know I’ve been emailing a lot lately, but I wanted to drop one last reminder about my second End of Quarter deadline of 2025.

We’re still a couple thousand short of our goal, and these deadlines are very real. If we don't hit our goal, Republican PACs and far-right billionaires will see it in the public FEC reports, and they’ll think we’re giving up – that we’re not strong enough to win with grassroots support alone.

So yeah, the money matters. But it’s really about what it can do:

\- Power our organizing efforts
\- Fight back against far-right billionaires trying to buy elections
\- Keep me in Congress fighting for us—because we're not done here, not by a long shot

Every dollar makes a difference in a grassroots campaign like mine. Can you pitch in a few dollars before our End of Quarter deadline at midnight?

Here’s the best link to give: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maf-em-pge/Peter_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/niwWOHKEmHx-jmNCwjb-7g~~/AAPPABA~/h4bL4ZnkHWfKdycT5nK7Zome9KfXkBDIclb6ubSNKkCxfHd2Z-uf3hSRMkr7oFBfMs_Goz8u2XDguL3JXKwyixQRnJRhTSdly-6YB_et3qERYBljn8XrWwhWsVZzysfXkr2DdtuXq6DDXCcfRGBY1wdwif7KaT27UhLCSxtGqO0j0T2BhBm0a9k9J1piJpmHI9ed97c8ZaQSQFzFlNwY7Gd9hWNMcJWxVicVFhC3wL1d0uMJjR4zWbd6NarTG0tYO97umfvX-p1EddmEOjz8LrrO7FX-_nkHw6ZWezZ74tjlpoYGTraJ7X1lXkTIGkYwdUd5boWgO95rgnYqYlnhHgsNe15s4zftc2ySlQHYICM~)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110596629/554843682/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.30_Marlene-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5ODkxNTItMTM1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmB1Mwd64W2QvQQxZmdAbwLq355Hs9C0T2BFWUkv8js=)

In a matter of hours, our campaign will close the books on the quarter and start preparing our public fundraising report. This is one of our biggest deadlines yet. **That’s why former Arizona Governor Janet Napolitano, Attorney General Kris Mayes, my Finance Director Melanie, and I have all reached out to ask for your support**. David Schweikert and his allies know our campaign is their biggest obstacle to holding AZ-01 and the House for Republicans. Republicans have already poured resources into tracking our campaign. clean_body: We need all hands on deck to defeat Schweikert and flip the House blue. | | = In a matter of hours, our campaign will close the books on the quarter and start preparing our public fundraising report. This is one of our biggest deadlines yet. That’s why former Arizona Governor Janet Napolitano, Attorney General Kris Mayes, my Finance Director Melanie, and I have all reached out to ask for your support. David Schweikert and his allies know our campaign is their biggest obstacle to holding AZ-01 and the House for Republicans. Republicans have already poured resources into tracking our campaign. Next, they will comb through our report to find weaknesses to exploit. But we still have time to report strong numbers and show that their efforts to stop us are not slowing down our momentum. = | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Marlene | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. name: Abigail
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

| Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:

_Tonight's deadline is the biggest of our campaign so far._

And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._

We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change quickly — once the quarter is over, all of our fundraising numbers become public.

If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.

**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**

[_**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before the end-of-quarter deadline at midnight to become one of my Founding Donors?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110596787/554845853/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-30_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIzNmY2MDUtMTQ1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VsQAu2kVwQVHnDh9yEqdchWRELq6rtV-nkx4FUfuTJs=)

body:
The work we do is not sexy or glamorous, you aren’t going to see our candidates and races on MSNBC or in the New York Times, but this is the work that must happen across America in order for Democrats to take back the House this 2026. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DZJ7oBJQ4NHD3Lvm8nuSv5wc76LALl6l0zCH0u9vHNtoe0CRZL0mJ_GWJi5DOp1eZ7mbvm3w3SlIGLQt-egftA9AIWPLKOGQ0sYFDnYSa0dihiFqfjU2WV6z30JeorDByLQDRn92XrKJnIN_4ypDUq_e46-HajT4QQ4VihvDFuWRBgvj54K1cdkngRJ-WhAWAWeIMY4dtK5N-FPqwdLPsid8cJII81TGqGhwp6s2-nEGbOHNNFWxbFX1UFaVXSg_0CB3rkJ0vWxr3XnqNYuVfoA/4ht/h6UmUSJ8R-6jTYhMgSTplQ/h0/h001.rBAZb4Q9FWRkoNKQB3PWmq-EKPjZBVUI8EVlHSof-O0)

Friend, If you and I haven't met yet my name is Zoltan Nemeth, I am the Senior Political Director of No Dem Left Behind. The focus of No Dem Left Behind is ensuring that Democrats running in often overlooked districts have the resources they need to run effective campaigns and win. **The work we do is not sexy or glamorous** , you aren't going to see our candidates and races on MSNBC or in the New York Times, but this is the work that must happen across America in order for Democrats to take back the House this 2026. As you've probably seen, today is the end of the fundraising quarter for all political campaigns and PACs registered with the FEC. We don't get massive funding from institutional donors and orgs so meeting our goals on days like today is beyond critical. [**Can we count on you to chip in any amount before midnight tonight to help us meet our goal and continue to ensure that no Democrat with the courage to run for office is left behind?**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DZJ7oBJQ4NHD3Lvm8nuSv5_zOkRtwYSfEk_KLDmBRCbcoaYyNLNR5rufFGbOtdwgaEb3YRstzIEb__9tOvGIHcyFaoOudxJVIyeCPLd9SWmD0aJTfBvGzMWAgIsJ04lLvMhbTJJ4xvT3HvXEEfB-ZKlU4H_PJNr9MaZDFb8_dfoLSrpwApywlZ8OqIOJchOMEpJa1LcTLJX5RMS9U9nwy_MtQg-jmgPhc1U-BlNVg6kmqCTLEqtAeocEjWlvYQ7ddwHKRv95TjLzBOFDTjI4oUQ/4ht/h6UmUSJ8R-6jTYhMgSTplQ/h1/h001.9zYefgSrSgJgEAuD_I3_qqdLRKi1FHeaHQlhVxHq-Mg)

clean_body: The work we do is not sexy or glamorous, you aren’t going to see our candidates and races on MSNBC or in the New York Times, but this is the work that must happen across America in order for Democrats to take back the House this 2026. | | Friend, If you and I haven't met yet my name is Zoltan Nemeth, I am the Senior Political Director of No Dem Left Behind. The focus of No Dem Left Behind is ensuring that Democrats running in often overlooked districts have the resources they need to run effective campaigns and win. The work we do is not sexy or glamorous , you aren't going to see our candidates and races on MSNBC or in the New York Times, but this is the work that must happen across America in order for Democrats to take back the House this 2026. As you've probably seen, today is the end of the fundraising quarter for all political campaigns and PACs registered with the FEC. We don't get massive funding from institutional donors and orgs so meeting our goals on days like today is beyond critical. Thank you for your belief in Democratic candidates and willingness to leave none behind. Zoltan Nemeth Senior Political Director No Dem Left Behind | | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from No Dem Left Behind PAC, please .

name: Keith
subject: A question of democracy and durability
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Right now, we’re faced with an urgent question:

Is the oldest democracy in the world durable enough to withstand an overreaching executive?

I believe that it’s durable enough—but only if we’re durable enough.

This moment is testing all of us. But I’ve never lost faith in the power of people working together to strengthen their communities, support their neighbors, and stand up for what’s right—no matter the odds.

I have no doubt that together, we’re stronger and more resilient than the Trump administration.

Tonight’s end-of-quarter deadline is an opportunity to show the strength of people-powered movements like ours. But with just hours left until midnight, we’re still $4,180 short.

Peter, will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us meet our goal before the clock runs out?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250630_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250630_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250630_2ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

name: Jordan (Sarah for Governor)
subject: The Democrat National Committee Chairman said what?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Did you see what the Chairman of the Democrat National Committee just said about Arkansas?

**_“There’s real opportunity for us...Arkansas is really an important part of the calculus of how we build our future...I’ve watched Arkansas change over the years, and I know we can change it again.”_ **_ _ _\-- Ken Martin, Democrat National Committee Chairman_
The Democrats keep seeing the big wins by Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders...

✅ Became the first Governor in America to kick Communist China out of her state
✅ Empowered parents by passing universal school choice
✅ Said NO to men playing in girls’ sports
✅ Cut the income tax three times by 20%
✅ Slapped tough new penalties on violent illegal immigrants
✅ Banned taxpayer dollars from being used to buy soft drinks and candy with food stamps
✅ Found out least $300 million of savings in the state budget
✅ Banned indoctrination in the classroom
✅ Allowed property owners to rightfully kick squatters off their land
✅ Ended DEI and the use of Latinx in state government

**...and they desperately want to stop her in 2026. We can't let this happen!**

**We have a major fundraising deadline for the Governor's 2026 re-election campaign at midnight tonight.** **_[We are $7,641 short of our goal. name: Team Emmer
subject: We had a feeling that Republican Leadership would want to hear more from you.
body:
Congratulations, Peter!
We wanted to let you know that your survey responses on President Donald J. Trump from our most recent satisfaction survey have been flagged for review by Republican Leadership.
[As we prepare to share your thoughts with our top leaders, we want to make sure that your answers accurately reflect what you want us to fight for.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Mv9xVZbvEsB1uEIqc92zJig7MSFkaPeK0ms2rYZ5TRLu3AqmBbSgwRouWuduuveK-3AB2xPIKeBeqynpEy_yMIpSkgMajFZtbz_tC9WUvfTnY4csabpVynxBuK_zgGzknNBRoJecxKc4JvCBlM1L_cMCdtLNtHLxVGGWdQqHdPkXjH4T7MrmOCmAxOaZ5oejBOteYeaLwePVarZjvL-Y1fzgGwY7IDs4T6_ANd0VaPM84i4Sne-h3usCtngdDe_vpcA7HFgNwEc0JfntzHNF9NXoz70Dx_EBSA2nXtfPzMrAjKpBNO8860_6FDVC8-TVfoKayuIFVJ8feDyjX0JXlikDsthX8-jjey3eonrIV49drvAi04VFHRpZujHn6evAD-2vzMPD4GstW8Tpg9lZi_TSp-v4AMUR0B3qdYGA4liWe5BaO0nYrwjWk1ES1Hrq-ch_uQphgiyDoI0nwId_-4fej_yOLURpe6pn9Nhg7J5rLuY7EWLBM14UG8G4zeCM6N1aI0qF1WMjk_PT2kSqKUzgVtZULwy33n9sQL54yqg-eH9nUNiGUdSdDUSgUfMIkOMULNuHNZWkkNwop0E4m56OCrP4EA2pNRPQBRNSMT1XEaAF_7u4GN5nz9CUhnQNTYjooNzRlElb9lx4dmfASbWdb0eXbCKh7PvPnuS0iB3biBVqjMvxVGXS1mZ-VGIyODy5QSzT9uBMuF9l7hLRlfKVAicuBTUYP7T7XBFRn-RjcDYz649nFG7Nq2LWeGHjy6yr6OC_F3aKii0Ls5MAt-m9Nl_lb8GTSIFxxR1Jg3PocrnsOp4DEelg_Url1G_mrw/Q6D9iRXQwz3ZTOQVxdtB9g2qFOpiHVQh/10)

subject: Read before midnight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter—when we entered the last week of June, I’ll be honest, I was a little nervous we wouldn’t have enough time to hit our $30,000 goal.

But now, with just hours left before the deadline, we’re so close. It’s within reach—and I know we can get there together.

If just 100 more people chip in our average donation of $23, we’ll be able to close our fundraising gap and hit our goal. That would be a huge win heading into the next phase of this race—and it would send a clear message that this grassroots team shows up when it counts.

This final stretch is make-or-break. Every donation, every supporter, every minute matters in telling deep-pocketed Republicans that we have **zero** signs of vulnerability for them to latch on to. Let’s wake up tomorrow knowing we did everything we could to hit this goal and show strong support for the world to see.

**Can you be one of the 100 supporters who gets us across the finish line? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-june-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110598168/554857651/-1978405529?refcode=em25_250630_eoq5_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250630_eoq5_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=587a76fd-1656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdhNzZmZC0xNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcAYcJ1XeT-ZeME4G9VKBw4PXXNToU_orBwyNqVpVig=)**

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Hit Pieces, Iran Strikes & FBI Crime Data
body:
Plus, Ava’s Wild Return from Africa 🦟🎙️ | New Episode Out Now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=84effbe9e1&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’re back with a brand-new episode of the **No Doubt About It Podcast** , and it’s a wild ride from start to finish. If you’re ready for bold commentary, real talk, and a few surprises—you won’t want to miss this one.

🎧 [Watch the full episode now on YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=32d8e7268a&e=567664f14c) →
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f2f654ada9&e=567664f14c)
| **📰 Cheap Shot Journalism: Exposed**
We start with a hit piece in the Albuquerque Journal targeting Darren White. Mark breaks down how political hit pieces like this get printed, why they’re lazy journalism, and how they’re used to manipulate voters.

Krysty adds her own experience from the 2022 Governor’s race, where a cheap shot editorial aimed at Mark—and why New Mexicans need to look deeper before believing the headlines.

**🗽 NYC’s Mayor Race = National Shockwaves? **
We analyze how the Democratic nominee for New York City mayor could actually reshape elections across the country. Mark breaks down the ripple effect—how a far-left mayor in NYC could tip the scales in places like New Jersey and beyond. Trust us: this isn’t just about New York—it could reshape the entire political landscape heading into 2026.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ce0578f86b&e=567664f14c)
---
| **💥 Inside the Iran Strikes: What You Haven’t Heard**
Incredible new details have emerged about how a secretive U.S. government team, with the help of the military, pulled off a critical strike to cripple Iran’s nuclear capabilities.

You’ll hear the amazing true story of the two U.S. operatives who spent their lives trying to stop the world’s most dangerous regime from going nuclear—and how they just might have succeeded.

**📉 FBI’s Latest Crime Data: NM At the Top**
The newest crime rankings are out, and it’s bad news for New Mexico—again. We break down what the FBI numbers really say, why New Mexico keeps landing at the top of the list, and what state leaders need to start doing now.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a932161c00&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🌍 Ava’s Back from Africa (With a Surprise...)**
Mark and Krysty welcome their daughter Ava back from her mission trip to the Ivory Coast. She shares what the trip meant to her... and also reveals the unwanted souvenir she brought home: malaria. (She’s doing great now...sort of.

**📺 Binge Alert: Netflix Must-Watch **
We wrap with a show recommendation that might surprise you... but Mark and Krysty agree: this is a must-watch on Netflix. Tune in to find out what it is—and why it’s worth your time.
---
|
---
| **🎯 Don’t Miss the Episode**

👉 Click [here](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=527bd8a076&e=567664f14c) to watch the episode on YouTube Or [find us](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ea972210d0&e=567664f14c) on your favorite podcast platform!

**👍 Like, Rate & Subscribe **

**→** Tap the bell 🔔 [on YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d89e67bbf9&e=567664f14c) so you never miss an episode

→ Leave a 5-star rating and review on Apple Podcasts or Spotify

→ Share the show with friends who are ready for bold truth and smart conversation

**💪 Support the Show**

We’re 100% listener supported. If you love what we do and want to help keep us going, consider donating at:
🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eaf1b6ff39&e=567664f14c)

Thanks for being part of the No Doubt About It family. Let’s keep making noise—and making a difference.

With gratitude,

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_
---

It’s one of our most important deadlines of the year — and what we raise by midnight will be made public in our official FEC report. **Thanks to this grassroots team and everyone who’s pitched in, we’re just $2,500 short of our goal.**
[**Can we count on you to make a donation to our campaign to help us close the gap? This is your final chance to chip in and support Sarah before our deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250630-2?refcode=em20250630-2146&refcode2=2146_21716_kQBe5r&akid=2146%2E21716%2EkQBe5r)

| Patriot,
Our June reporting deadline is at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!
Tomorrow is July 1st, marking the start of a new reporting quarter.
Will you help us finish strong?
Over the last quarter, we have seen the Colorado Republican Party crumble, and members of the United States Senate and House fold under the pressure of passing The One Big Beautiful Bill.
These Representatives and Senators bucked the mandate handed to them and President Trump in the 2024 election as they voted to defy the will of the American People:

* Representative Thomas Massie of Kentucky.
* Representative Warren Davidson of Ohio
* Representative Andy Harris of Maryland
* Senator Thom Tillis of North Carolina
* Senator Rand Paul of Kentucky

Following the vote on HR1, Senator Thom Tillis announced he won't seek re-election, but the rest of these sellouts are seeking re-election.
---
| Passing President Trump's America First Agenda, which Congress is tasked with implementing, is their number one priority.
We delivered a mandate to the House, Senate, and President Trump for sweeping changes to our government's policies, and these members of Congress are giving the American People the finger!
Meanwhile, the Colorado GOP is crumbling with resignations of officers, over-bloated budgets, and drama surrounding the new administration.
These basic tasks seem too much for the GOP and our representatives in Congress to handle...
It is clear that if we want to protect our majorities and elect people who will support and secure President Trump's ability to deliver on the America First agenda, we must do the work ourselves.
Team Imer PAC makes you this promise: We will endorse and support the primary opponents of these two-faced rinos, and anyone that stands in the way of the America First Agenda.
But we cannot do this without supporters like you, who are sick and tired of the do-nothing leadership we are stuck with.
To achieve this, we need your financial support at our June deadline.
Will you help us fight back against the establishment and contribute any amount today?

| | Hi Peter,

It’s Rep. Zoe Lofgren. I wanted to reach out one last time before our end-of-quarter FEC filing deadline tonight.
---
| | It’s critical that we reach our goal before midnight tonight and finish this quarter out strong. _[**So please chip in at least $25 now to fund my reelection and help elect California Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110599604/554862929/-1469323401?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-06-30_EOQ_ZOL_ES-26461&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2VjMDFjZi0xODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2C7qKGFStToCrhOMKB2ilPtrFTn1OoZQ6CggTuDXWo=)_

**2026 may feel far away, but now is the most important time to donate so we can set our campaigns up for success before next fall. **

So I’m counting on at least 500 more Democrats to step up before midnight tonight to help us reach our $30,000 end-of-quarter goal.

_[**Can I count on you, Peter? Peter, it’s Charlie, Chair of the Democratic Party of Georgia. This is a long email about Jon Ossoff and Georgia’s role in flipping the Senate blue next year, but I really hope you’ll stick with me and read till the end. We’re staring down one of the most critical deadlines of the election cycle, and I’ll be honest, we’re behind on our fundraising. In 2026, Jon Ossoff will be the only Democrat up for re-election in a state Donald Trump won. If we lose his seat, Republicans won’t just hold the Senate — they’ll expand their majority and hand Trump even further power to steamroll our democracy. They already control the Senate. Their majority is enough to make major cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and so much more. If they flip Georgia, they’ll have free rein. And Georgia will be Trump’s top target in 2026. We’ve seen this before: two brutal Senate runoffs, razor-thin margins, and millions in outside spending trying to drown us out. **We simply cannot afford to wait a single second.** We have until midnight to hit our $30,000 end-of-quarter goal, and right now, we’re not on track to get there. That puts our organizing, our voter outreach, and our ability to re-elect Jon Ossoff at risk. I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so important. [Will you rush $10 to Georgia Democrats before midnight to help us close the gap and protect Jon Ossoff’s seat — and the Senate — from a total MAGA takeover?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110601063/554864965/1596490833?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_063025_EOQ8_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y3OWNhOC0xOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ojkV44d-rP_4nMuJdiToNosELNkJSUxNiXOJNzYqjRw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110601064/554864967/1596490833?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_063025_EOQ8_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y3OWNhOC0xOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ojkV44d-rP_4nMuJdiToNosELNkJSUxNiXOJNzYqjRw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

If we lose his seat, Republicans won’t just hold the Senate — they’ll expand their majority and hand Trump even further power to steamroll our democracy. They already control the Senate. Their majority is enough to make major cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, and so much more. If they flip Georgia, they’ll have free rein. And Georgia will be Trump’s top target in 2026. name: AOTL
subject: What the Shelby County decision did to voting rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
It’s been 12 years since the Shelby County decision rolled back VRA protections. Here’s where we’re at now:
|
---

Peter,
Last week marked the 12-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Shelby County_ decision.
_**The details:**_ The decision nullified Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, effectively gutting preclearance — a safeguard that had been in place since 1965 to prevent states from implementing discriminatory barriers. States saw this move as an open invitation for states to make voting hard for people of color, and for extremists to manipulate maps. The VRA’s preclearance provision mandated that jurisdictions with a record of voter discrimination were obligated to get federal approval before making any changes to their election law, including redistricting plans.
**_The aftermath:_** States immediately began to engage in efforts to restrict access to the ballot. On the very day of this decision, Greg Abbott, the Texas Attorney General at the time, announced that Texas would put “the most restrictive voter ID law in the nation” into place. Texas wasn’t the only state to react accordingly to this decision. To top it off, the maps that were drawn in the redistricting cycle immediately after the _Shelby County_ decision were deliberately manipulated to dilute Black voting power as the far right attempted to consolidate their power unfairly.
_**Now:**_ Anti-democracy forces are still engaging in predatory tactics aimed at suppressing the power of voters, from laws that unjustly restrict access to the ballot box to maps that keep communities of color from being able to elect the candidates of their choice.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, has supported voters in bringing court cases currently active in five states — Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas — that could decide the makeup of up to seven state legislative districts and six congressional districts where we must ensure fair representation.
As we reflect on the long-lasting impacts of _Shelby County_ , we also take the moment as an opportunity to ground ourselves in why we’re leading the fight for fair maps.
**We cannot afford to stand idly by as a guiding principle of American government is dismantled. Our democracy is fragile, and we each need to do our part to strengthen it.**
[**Peter, your grassroots donation to All On The Line today will help do exactly that by powering our organizing efforts across the U.S. to respond to the far right’s efforts to manipulate maps. Donate now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110604265/554868758/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ShelbyAnniNOR_email_20250630-AOTL-Tier1-ShelbyAnniNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250630-AOTL-Tier1-ShelbyAnniNOR_&utm_campaign=ShelbyAnniNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMjkxNmUzLTFhNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uBbt_glq3Ltx83X48PpfpwYyDKXj1OUm_Q-l0TAISHU=)

clean_body: It’s been 12 years since the Shelby County decision rolled back VRA protections. Here’s where we’re at now: | Peter, Last week marked the 12-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Shelby County decision. The details: The decision nullified Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, effectively gutting preclearance — a safeguard that had been in place since 1965 to prevent states from implementing discriminatory barriers. States saw this move as an open invitation for states to make voting hard for people of color, and for extremists to manipulate maps. The VRA’s preclearance provision mandated that jurisdictions with a record of voter discrimination were obligated to get federal approval before making any changes to their election law, including redistricting plans. The aftermath: States immediately began to engage in efforts to restrict access to the ballot. On the very day of this decision, Greg Abbott, the Texas Attorney General at the time, announced that Texas would put “the most restrictive voter ID law in the nation” into place. Texas wasn’t the only state to react accordingly to this decision. To top it off, the maps that were drawn in the redistricting cycle immediately after the Shelby County decision were deliberately manipulated to dilute Black voting power as the far right attempted to consolidate their power unfairly. Now: Anti-democracy forces are still engaging in predatory tactics aimed at suppressing the power of voters, from laws that unjustly restrict access to the ballot box to maps that keep communities of color from being able to elect the candidates of their choice. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, has supported voters in bringing court cases currently active in five states — Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas — that could decide the makeup of up to seven state legislative districts and six congressional districts where we must ensure fair representation. As we reflect on the long-lasting impacts of Shelby County , we also take the moment as an opportunity to ground ourselves in why we’re leading the fight for fair maps. We cannot afford to stand idly by as a guiding principle of American government is dismantled. Our democracy is fragile, and we each need to do our part to strengthen it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = In solidarity, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. This is it: **tonight is the final deadline of the quarter.** And as of this evening, we’re still just under $5,000 short of our goal. clean_body: We’re in the final stretch and we still have about $5,000 to raise before the deadline. Hi, I know — your inbox is probably full of emails like this right now, but there’s a reason for that. This is it: tonight is the final deadline of the quarter. And as of this evening, we’re still just under $5,000 short of our goal. That might sound small — but in a people-powered campaign like ours, every single dollar can tip the balance. = = | | = The energy we generate now will go directly into flipping Senate seats, protecting vulnerable Democrats and fighting back against the MAGA extremists who threaten our rights. I’m proud of the real momentum we’ve built this quarter — and tonight is our chance to turn that into the kind of impact that wins races.But I also know what we’re up against: extreme candidates bankrolled by special interests, running on dangerous agendas — and ready to flood the airwaves with misinformation and fear. We can’t afford to fall behind now. Reaching our goal tonight means we’ll be ready to respond, organize and fight for every seat that’s in play. So yes — this is one more email in your inbox. But I promise, your support tonight will make a real difference. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for everything you do. Let’s finish this quarter strong — and keep moving forward, together. — Kirsten * =

| | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.

| | **_A personal message from Rob:_** Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. _Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital?_

clean_body: Hopefully Pelosi took notes... | | | | | | Friend, If you don’t already know, Nancy Pelosi has been organizing countless left-wing protests here in NEPA lately. And the patriots of our great commonwealth had a response forNegative Nancy earlier this month that she’ll never forget. | | | | | | Take notes, Nancy! Friend, as if the left’s demonstrations here in NEPA haven’t gone badly enough, liberal protestors are now being drowned out by common-sense conservatives when they attempt to rally in our district. Voters are sending a clear message to the Democrats trying to take back PA-08. Radical-left ideology is NOT WELCOMEhere in Northeastern Pennsylvania. So we’re playing the world’s smallest violin for Nancy Pelosi and the liberals as we watch their inorganic protest schemecrash & burn. | | | | | Thank you for your continued support, Rob Bresnahan | | | | | | | | | | Meet Rob: Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth. | | | | | A personal message from Rob: Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital? | | | | | | | | | I appreciate every cent contributed by the American people to my campaign. With that being said, donating isn’t the only way you can support our fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania in Washington. Click the link below to join Team Bresnahan as an official volunteer! | | | | | | 2024 VICTORY MERCH: It was a year to remember for every American patriot, and we shouldn’t be ashamed to show our pride in what we accomplished last year. Our online store is open now, hurry and grab your gear! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

subject: What SCOTUS rulings mean for VIRGINIA!
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/8ePRPlfDC/c?w=wtzc9StX57h9mSg3VJm4xNUcFFPQLI05EepJnvwLLfs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby84ZVBSUGxmREM_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/8ePRPlfDC/c?w=B3D8soLYoAkH2tlvXQLc_yful4MlaoTJXo7NfxSmsPI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiJjZDhkZmMxZC1mNWNmLTQyYjUtYjM0Ny0xNmUzODY3NDQ1OTYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | The Supreme Court delivered HUGE wins for America last week!
---
| | It’s always a good thing when the government leads in the way our Founders intended. It’s even better when those actions serve to protect the rights of parents, the unborn, and our Constitution. In case you missed it, the Supreme Court recently handed down a number of rulings that benefit our nation—especially our Commonwealth. Thanks to the conservative justices on the high court, we’ve made significant progress in the fight against gender confusing ideology, the fight for parental rights, and the fight for the right to life.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/8ePRPlfDC/c?w=nKkIF_mR9AW1dhWoUfSApwUK5rq83O1JYsB540bpA98.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9XV1cuSEFNSUxUT05GT1JWSVJHSU5JQS5DT00iLCJyIjoiNDZkZDNmMTUtMzhiYy00YzNhLTgzYzQtZWY1MjEzMWIxOWM1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)
---
| | The Court vacated appellate rulings from Idaho, North Carolina, Oklahoma, and West Virginia which had struck down bans on puberty blockers and hormone therapy for minors. This not only restores these crucial bans in those states, but also sets a legal precedent to protect children from gender confusing ideology.This is something we must move forward here in Virginia.
---
| | In Mahmoud v. Taylor, the Court ruled that parents have a First Amendment right to exempt their elementary school-aged children from readings and lessons featuring inappropriate or sexual content. In response, I will push for Virginia to adopt policy that regularly informs parents and gives them access to learning materials in both the classroom and library.
---
| | Additionally, this ruling marks a great step forward for religious liberty. Just fifteen years ago, it was common sense that children should be shielded from sexually explicit content. It was also well understood that parents had every right to place the importance of their faith above anything the government deemed necessary. I am overjoyed to see our nation moving in that direction once again, and we must continue the return to sanity on the state level.
---
| | Finally—and perhaps most importantly—the Supreme Court issued a monumental ruling on the right to life. Just three years after Dobbs v. Jackson, which overturned Roe v. Wade, the Court has now ruled in Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic that states have the right to block Medicaid funds from going to Planned Parenthood. In 2023 alone, Planned Parenthood took the life of over 400,000 innocent children in the United States. Virginia must move to end the allocation of taxpayer funds to Planned Parenthood, and as your Delegate, I will fight to make it happen.
---
| | The Supreme Court has delivered substantial victories for both our nation and our Commonwealth—victories that advance our conservative cause. I look forward to championing the efforts to protect vulnerable children, defend parental rights, uphold religious liberty, and the right to life as your Delegate. I’m asking you—fellow Patriot and believer in our founding principles—to stand with me. Let’s reignite the spirit of our Founding Fathers here in Virginia and especially in the home of James Madison, right here in District 62! Every dollar you contribute directly fuels this fight. Your financial support empowers me to spread this message, rally thousands of like-minded Virginians, and win this crucial battle for our future. Join me. Chip in today, and let’s take our Commonwealth back[!](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/8ePRPlfDC/c?w=lQLf9Mu2J8HV13OiEXf6gWfam43iqtdFTKzrU16V7g4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiIwY2Y1M2M5OS1mNzMzLTRiNmUtOWEzOC05YTczMzYzOTI2OWYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---

clean_body: Hamilton for Delegate! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | | | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS! | | | | | | | | The Supreme Court delivered HUGE wins for America last week! | | It’s always a good thing when the government leads in the way our Founders intended. It’s even better when those actions serve to protect the rights of parents, the unborn, and our Constitution. In case you missed it, the Supreme Court recently handed down a number of rulings that benefit our nation—especially our Commonwealth. Thanks to the conservative justices on the high court, we’ve made significant progress in the fight against gender confusing ideology, the fight for parental rights, and the fight for the right to life. | | | | The Court vacated appellate rulings from Idaho, North Carolina, Oklahoma, and West Virginia which had struck down bans on puberty blockers and hormone therapy for minors. This not only restores these crucial bans in those states, but also sets a legal precedent to protect children from gender confusing ideology.This is something we must move forward here in Virginia. | | In Mahmoud v. Taylor, the Court ruled that parents have a First Amendment right to exempt their elementary school-aged children from readings and lessons featuring inappropriate or sexual content. In response, I will push for Virginia to adopt policy that regularly informs parents and gives them access to learning materials in both the classroom and library. | | Additionally, this ruling marks a great step forward for religious liberty. Just fifteen years ago, it was common sense that children should be shielded from sexually explicit content. It was also well understood that parents had every right to place the importance of their faith above anything the government deemed necessary. I am overjoyed to see our nation moving in that direction once again, and we must continue the return to sanity on the state level. | | Finally—and perhaps most importantly—the Supreme Court issued a monumental ruling on the right to life. Just three years after Dobbs v. Jackson, which overturned Roe v. Wade, the Court has now ruled in Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic that states have the right to block Medicaid funds from going to Planned Parenthood. In 2023 alone, Planned Parenthood took the life of over 400,000 innocent children in the United States. Virginia must move to end the allocation of taxpayer funds to Planned Parenthood, and as your Delegate, I will fight to make it happen. | | The Supreme Court has delivered substantial victories for both our nation and our Commonwealth—victories that advance our conservative cause. I look forward to championing the efforts to protect vulnerable children, defend parental rights, uphold religious liberty, and the right to life as your Delegate. I’m asking you—fellow Patriot and believer in our founding principles—to stand with me. Let’s reignite the spirit of our Founding Fathers here in Virginia and especially in the home of James Madison, right here in District 62! Every dollar you contribute directly fuels this fight. Your financial support empowers me to spread this message, rally thousands of like-minded Virginians, and win this crucial battle for our future. Join me. Chip in today, and let’s take our Commonwealth back | | | | | | | | | | | | | You can find out more about me at: Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper | | | | Find me on social media | | | This email was sent from .

body:
Peter,

Things are unraveling fast on the Left. One top Democrat insider just came clean and said the quiet part out loud:

clean_body: Peter, Things are unraveling fast on the Left. One top Democrat insider just came clean and said the quiet part out loud: Yikes. But don't let that fool you into thinking we can sit back. When the Democrats start to panic, they throw every wild idea they've got at the wall just to see what sticks. Meanwhile, over here? and YOUR name is STILL missing from the list. have already contacted you to sound the alarm--and they are wondering why you haven't checked in yet. This isn't just a formality. It's how we make sure our team is ready to show up, stand strong and win. Let's finish what we started -- and show the Left we mean business. - Senate Republican Voter Verification Committee | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Andrea Guzman
subject: GOP can’t wait to leaf through our books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi there,
I want to take a few minutes to explain why tonight’s midnight FEC fundraising deadline is so important - and why I’m asking you to consider making a donation now.
Every three months, all political parties like ours are required by law to submit public fundraising reports to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). These reports include every dollar raised and spent, and they are watched closely - not just by reporters and strategists, but by our Republican opponents.
Tonight at midnight, the book closes on our report, and a few weeks later it will be posted publicly. And when it does, GOP super PACs, opposition researchers, and dark money donors will immediately dig in to see whether Democrats have the grassroots energy and funding needed to take back the House.
They’ll want to know: Are Democrats still fighting? Is California organizing early in the swing districts? Or are we confused and crushed by Donald Trump’s chaos?
We want to send a clear message: California Democrats are united, energized, and ready to take the fight to Donald Trump and his allies in Congress. In fact, we're already fighting their ugly tax bill that would hurt working families while giving more breaks to the wealthy, and we need to keep up the pressure on vulnerable Republicans in California's swing districts.
But to show our momentum, we need our report to reflect a powerful surge of grassroots support - not just big-dollar checks, but donations from people like you who are deeply invested in flipping the House.
I don’t have to tell you how high the stakes are. Trump is calling for the arrest of Governor Newsom, and his allies in Congress have already shown they will go along with anything he demands.
It’s discouraging. But here’s the good news : We only need to flip one or two more seats in California to take back control in the U.S. House. We flipped THREE seats in 2024, so we know we can do it.
If you’ve been thinking about donating but haven’t yet, this is the most impactful time to do it. The money you give today will not only fund our voter outreach and organizing programs, but it will show up in the one place every Republican strategist will look: our public FEC filing.
Can I count on you to chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you for reading this far - and for everything you do for California and our democracy.
Gracias,
Andrea
Strategic Campaigns Director
California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=MhRUrSZZPSsyCwh92KRY35E%2BqlkE5t%2BoBBSHC9teAz%2Fdyjy9tkRVvYgGKONjA5v7lLflPocK0eM9sqycEgDP%2BTJjh8mmRYwJXjPxWOPf9YKQhwFy1nfamh61auWKIPyvSeOAi9obwF1sgrF4esugfjr3jgQVZybLqRwDuslQVBOL5Vwca2f%2FHFmUezX9jPnRqarRbEKIYS%2BCDa0exMJyYrqQ91bGR29ZjxgGEUvQOWC7bCK8tzapRueApwwDwlR8U2BIngEzizhI9YwkS74QauHFhnxlTrv6j0s0ABt6sCYNx2fLYLsJonEt3OxvfExSf2DT6FR%2FSrkclwsdyYUnSKBMyImf6QIn5J2tvVW22P3bPAwNgnBGu6OIcVPH47y3tNggNaGEwFPODPv8nzVGhNqRLH8vPWITZNhtdMfoB2M%3D .

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Over the finish line
body:
We can’t be complacent. We saw what Trump did with the January 6 insurrection - he’s a sore loser who will do anything to retain his grip on power. And he is already plotting to steal elections from Dems in the 2026 midterms: | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6dX_cd9OmA2OQjcxNQBhI2xPvEHDon9ARaslasetQFTgM_OjZacE835SYJfa2PejAzCFRlAlc3Z5bh8oGij0O1eHHJFgoepD4bwF9bpeIYyU9ebBWDtDqzz17ClQeyMYGu9OuSgpR15IjzIZ3r2jT-8lzE1qIEtzTJRW_9SYO6GhAZlqNZPmKdIMFKqicNijZRbSGkyc7tVT2kJUNo6wXjYwnJm5W9SDBGSWFcpvNMM-iVUD5RGmreqdVEsgwJJRiIkWNXaoNhELlqbTFH0i2v5En1vglztqQO4B8j-44ajFoIuXF9Apbn5K1H7WSC0pQ/4ht/Uj4r85DnR7-uokgJhhmlxw/h0/h001.H6sWsSPfi-Lv8NKwOBmC15A2sQtXZJehmZY2Bm2Y1Ag)
