Peter, Six months into Trump's second term, the American people are already fed up:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6dX_cd9OmA2OQjcxNQBhI0t8EacLa4RIft-d_2PGUAZUD2A879kwGuuWBaEUqpq7JfEIG8zCofnZ5PuQkOgRjFse0SmJw8FGw5rSwnyEJpMDgjC_ern5wicmr5Xo76knu_Pt0j4BnccIKABuMCoThaac9o0Rqr_xHeQOXiuN-IkqrXYDgpC9-SC6D8DiUQEyOZ72XTlPK9QkFV71PovU3SwrlP4HoymveG-joQuXwuDg-hPw0Iin7aGMgr8sE_u6nko4Zus2hhH3myHuewR7WMZEB2zEYj4lyM5rRzElcOsqN0t4o5vARmT5ig_3CPikg/4ht/Uj4r85DnR7-uokgJhhmlxw/h1/h001.Xp6NAzyzisYqCKfe9iH_QwD2Q-E3z8hZXFgr9kzp4yE)
---
The backlash is growing to Trump's fascist regime, not only galvanizing Democrats to turn out in historic numbers in special elections across the country, but also causing independents and GOP voters to flee MAGA at record pace. All signs point to a massive blue wave building for the 2026 midterm elections. **But we can 't be complacent.**_We saw what Trump did with the January 6 insurrection_ \- he's a sore loser who will do anything to retain his grip on power. And he is already plotting to steal elections from Dems in the 2026 midterms:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6dX_cd9OmA2OQjcxNQBhI2W_fC5R4niSxZ5hLXy0KmGK822g3YkHpzEc72ow24d85pOb0ICW9lsmYxGBBvPlf1pnYlMavdqu1EaC7Zomti2gY4MwkqlrMOA_mRHn1dn4RKFE1lqvtqOzmeTggC5Kib-HJdIJ3KZJNcqKsuChLHbN2z7iWGlhND_eF_czadU3A91aewHoAQXa02JpjcLSPgsurYn1PCLVTd7Ui27c7qH8oUSVfBFp8n3FzK1reMndMKv-m49JnHY3wGNrohiRrkpk7G7T3fBZnZ3Bo--jPBi1w-YYI41m3IbcQOyTdJlyg/4ht/Uj4r85DnR7-uokgJhhmlxw/h2/h001.3cphXyr3eKvpRdpXgwjB6ha2vpR3SO5kmrnmlToAdYs)
---
**We have to be prepared not only to fight Trump at the polls, but in our court rooms as well.** States have authority over how elections are administered, and any challenges to those laws will ultimately end up in state Supreme Courts._If MAGA takes over these courts before the midterm elections in key swing states, Trump will have loyalists in place to rule in his favor and toss Democrat votes - effectively rigging elections in MAGA 's favor._ Right now, that is exactly what Trump and his cronies are trying to do in Pennsylvania, committing $30+ million to defeating the three democratic justices up for retention in 2025. _But Defend Our Courts won 't let that happen._ On the 4th of July, we will be launching one of the first ads to hit the airwaves in PA.**To reach as many voters as possible, we set an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 to put behind our ad campaign before****midnight TONIGHT****. And we are so very close to reaching our goal:**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-6dX_cd9OmA2OQjcxNQBhI1swxwbupYTroEUjhgS1_uqAgbWQ9YvFpwb45UYmSGSOlu4ZXcrczOX4ORr8q1YOWE8ycoB3W8KjeQBU6o2mhgRi6-xXGdv32pJ1rKRNDd_nv4vLMUw6WulKZLVNfQwFCGvcwSufdOiyuxduVYiHKLdHRj_OPElO4WmduUuT-UVcF6VdK9BY3G45tx8POHl6Cqsk5m4D16Zz-jSkc6YdlrOnsKZkIJbVqt8lCqCnV1XH4S-CGGgTU10Yg1I0Au80eQ1MwksBUq0McHqb8h-g0GwA1X8OIsZzEPtfVI9xiMcEQ/4ht/Uj4r85DnR7-uokgJhhmlxw/h3/h001.dMkv_F9mTxf2n4wOPY3avjbKAeGdJMxQNCKMXk_GWZU)

And he is already plotting to steal elections from Dems in the 2026 midterms: | | Peter, Six months into Trump's second term, the American people are already fed up: | The backlash is growing to Trump's fascist regime, not only galvanizing Democrats to turn out in historic numbers in special elections across the country, but also causing independents and GOP voters to flee MAGA at record pace. All signs point to a massive blue wave building for the 2026 midterm elections. But we can 't be complacent.We saw what Trump did with the January 6 insurrection \- he's a sore loser who will do anything to retain his grip on power. And he is already plotting to steal elections from Dems in the 2026 midterms: | We have to be prepared not only to fight Trump at the polls, but in our court rooms as well. States have authority over how elections are administered, and any challenges to those laws will ultimately end up in state Supreme Courts.If MAGA takes over these courts before the midterm elections in key swing states, Trump will have loyalists in place to rule in his favor and toss Democrat votes - effectively rigging elections in MAGA 's favor. Right now, that is exactly what Trump and his cronies are trying to do in Pennsylvania, committing $30+ million to defeating the three democratic justices up for retention in 2025. But Defend Our Courts won 't let that happen. On the 4th of July, we will be launching one of the first ads to hit the airwaves in PA.To reach as many voters as possible, we set an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 to put behind our ad campaign beforemidnight TONIGHT. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm4s1b7thll6cicukdtgimfauopecsmla15j5smg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cphm2o32clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zonbq2od1v7op277ps3ptgfgbs0jsbhek32ignb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cphm2o32clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjn2d186nukgasjjipoadem41iqa9bpvkntconno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cphm2o32clh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmc5tv1ho3opnj1kvqngioru74vkphcb16pi76bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cphm2o32clh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: CCP Land Grab underway

body:
We’re one step away from a serious national security crisis.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Peter,
Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?

Authorities identified [20-year-old Wess Roley as the sniper](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAUBODT4G6tx48Xu6BI427TprQwPOyXsLDCyGhvHzlXSDfSSJ808_VYHpYipe3TPtHUkJeE7YhYK5aFvN3zkeiFhbxP9rA5JawhLgLEcAN9A754S_G9qM6bgChQdmi4Hri8q4FP3W5WpXlwQoxqlXYNiChRhSlM0g1Kw9SRuTTQwDnAKKd-BO60F6PXXK-jD0wBeqq59N-ZUt0xxHc-sfQuP7to9lpfB5MfTMxMzK21fl3d1TExX2OYmG2p5CJe0fGhtXPbfkbIXTH-1ShGOu6aKdieluKfWv91xWnEbwAAAP__xWRyjw) who ambushed firefighters Sunday in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, killing two and injuring a third.

# Tuesday, July 1, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1863, the [Battle of Gettysburg began](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQQL8Gb7EAO4EMDF28pWtH62wO-6oLRHCNlb-v2n5C96f3pPdxm29ATHl7hzsGSWXOeDRGEawzRdhLy_TASjFmaFByRkk8W23PJ-1O2swRiF_z2MWQEC0OHQbjzma4jGdz7fZw9Q5Xt3pAs8Q0OMDRaLQWRjCjX2NH4cemnTZGaz9ce6_N6qL10Rm3-JjUqDGSlNp_FsqyY-JXeWLt13LvOOwij6aGN2UnZafjOPoFRBgTIcfWl7opOzFCzcpOKz2JTwdUZac_rCk7bSjyastX3boa4uMgZmoXp0a93YH4NyT_uvMM9jsAAP__PTp6rw). It marked the bloodiest clash of the Civil War and a turning point as Union forces confronted Robert E. Lee's invading Confederate army in Pennsylvania. Yesterday, we asked about your dream vintage cars, and hundreds of you floored it. From a Dodge Coronet Super Bee to a '68 Camaro SS convertible, your answers were pure gold. Thank you for making this our most turbocharged inbox yet. Today, we report in _Science _that [Apple is betting big on smart glasses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMZ1P9oIxFC7S0F3alMiwy7GJsZHxHbq_j8gvpBtppDfSfN3Hu-fA8fHpN3JlSWOk8whUCuWR0a_piLxTZsToD59ipLKEERQYqaxUekTP4T02FbqFCKiuyGlrdN02RvfV6lBb1Snjp66xiyFvNEBrJ9ObSaPu24rdpSmrtFaqq_tbp_RsETq02k4dLqJRhFxSvn0njmWlJbzTi_JtTlsV3FrKfoj6Q8AgYOhLMpufr07AcMkCBtVeuRcw-H0PJM-Ufzg-ZIrSypU8yi09YyGUe074nMshYKiyw_3kEPhorWjUY_Mc_jbLv456OfgNAAD__4nzehc)--think instant translation, no need for earbuds, and a screen you wear on your face. Would you try them, or does it feel a little too _Black Mirror_? Reply to this email to let us know. Today's sponsor is [Raisin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMuOqzAMhp8m7IpygQYWWRypYteznSUKiSluc0FJKNO3HzGq1AeYlS1_0mf7_7qOV40Ow-2_9qDKHMcAe3ZQCqQRrV5iDrhCQmuDzjqGAGV2I6e8PVF5omy0Gt1rbCqrZgAOogLFZMvEuWlZXy2q6aVoheFt3zV0biaQGibLqTHAeSfbCtVho5IyRmkn-rqjzEjLOyuZnDo7k4aCxRJTfY8YygKze8UnpNpEXzm1lLJmIv4RPhA-7PteJ40Zw4EJHyCctkz4MOnwOGqA76MlYtiKHz1Y3DwRl8_bhJ8PkuOWDBBx-Sx8E6P9qvEWiLjcN_di73GBdIgmF82DVUnZdUfnMJ8laejNa3S_B5c_pfxU_CcAAP__HdeTPg), offering high-yield savings accounts to _The Flyover_ readers.

## Wess Roley ID'd as Idaho Firefighter Sniper
Authorities identified [20-year-old Wess Roley as the sniper](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAUBODT4G6tx48Xu6BI427TprQwPOyXsLDCyGhvHzlXSDfSSJ808_VYHpYipe3TPtHUkJeE7YhYK5aFvN3zkeiFhbxP9rA5JawhLgLEcAN9A754S_G9qM6bgChQdmi4Hri8q4FP3W5WpXlwQoxqlXYNiChRhSlM0g1Kw9SRuTTQwDnAKKd-BO60F6PXXK-jD0wBeqq59N-ZUt0xxHc-sfQuP7to9lpfB5MfTMxMzK21fl3d1TExX2OYmG2p5CJe0fGhtXPbfkbIXTH-1ShGOu6aKdieluKfWv91xWnEbwAAAP__xWRyjw) who ambushed firefighters Sunday in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, killing two and injuring a third. Roley allegedly set a wildfire on Canfield Mountain to lure responders before opening fire with a high-powered rifle. Chilling 911 audio captured a pinned-down firefighter pleading for help. [Listen to it here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUxvGrkbcYfdiWPGh44SVbCoVCRyH7HMWnKFIqKTG5--LeQtfngd_w_7y4i6dI6frmb2hbyC7hXiO2hsUR-C3XRHcsBJB89TklbCE6yeV44vrEhQNP8eWGDmxAlKg6tEKPQk3DKOZus0uYjJjHaTHeKAzrDACgUA8LhkF42ZE9NK65EJwbNfeGi1WDNKCFXgwENnAEarn0X5lS2zDEV35i6dd866LdWrtXpv4xeWbyvO97_8qP9ljw-I_Ft3Vj6vxk6v93UXCh_Pio712xcN8pRqqTZgO_3jzFX7L9qcPTyp8AAAD___C-ckA). (Warning: distressing) Roley's body was later found near the scene with a firearm; officials say it's unclear whether he died by suicide or police fire. His grandfather said [Roley had aspired to be a firefighter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O3CAURVeDO0bw_INdUKSh-9KmtDA87BcxYAEzI-8-8mwh9ZWO7jl_ftYfS5HS_ts-UbeQ14SfGrE1LCt5e-Sa6MRC3idbbU4JW4grCBi5UFzI1VuK1zp0XgdEwL5DLdUo-2kY5dId2rllcss2hW3zthdzUHYEB26Sm1DjsnSkb5pQQkoh5n55zEI65WH2Sqpt9oENAj21XB5_M6V2YIhXfmN5uPzsoj5aOyvrfzEwDEy6zlzbPTEwN5iBERMD0wsG5lX57cfAfLBWXnLEi5P33FZuY8QdPa-veqJrnBL_BuCBCgbaj4aF1yPnRmlnYLqi_fmhGKlOig1if1qK30_tv0K-NfwLAAD__0hlh5g), though court records show a troubled family history. Investigators continue to search for a motive as Idaho mourns its fallen responders.
## Fed Chair Under Fire for False Claims
Fed Chair [Jerome Powell is facing perjury accusations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOyZwRXEKim3oZtstDcJFmSC4wDjx7TfuK_z1OfnOyffnNb9MiCGtv82Oqvk8J_zWiK1hmYMzW64pHFiCc8lUk1PC5uMMDAbKJGV8dibEaxadUx4RsO9QcTnwfhQDf3ab4mZ0YhyFNJ4xa4UA8xT9wIbFy2mAvgvqpjHJOGds6p-PiXErHUxOcrlMzhPB0IWWy-OdQ2ob-njlE8vD5r2LamvtqKT_RUAT0Ok6cm13REDfYAKajQR0zwjo5VNDwloJ6DeWvCM98hdjpMbaT0VHs6fxCmmlLVOb01qwVnqPUaDDQg8TjcW7dWKpJsSIlW5_acHT7AcB3RXljm-IMdRREsHW3YT4_2j7kd1Twb8AAAD__4RyjgM) from lawmakers who say he misled Congress last week about the Federal Reserve's $2.5 billion headquarters renovation. Powell denied the [project included lavish features](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAURE9jd1iAIeCCYpt02XZL69t8wo8wWBgl8u1X3itsPaMZvffzmB9AifLzGzZ0LZQ54-dI2BrWmTzEcmTasZL3GQ4oOWMLaZZcasYN42L2QOmcVe9dQJQ49uiE0WK8KS2mPjq-KAW4gAxwGyVgsKgWYye1-BGmRffkrjVuuBCc23EaLBer8dJ6I8xifegUR0-t1OFVKLeIIZ3ljXVYy9YnF1vbj2786uS9k_dAGfKKwwmxlKvRyfuFdEXo2RqBKnthLRuyvXwwJXbsmD3lJxNGT0prq4bYttRX5_cPpUTHzXSKPzeg9PfZ_iXq7eRvAAAA__8sV31c) like marble, rooftop gardens, or VIP dining rooms, but 2021 planning documents say otherwise, listing private elevators and vegetated terraces for pollinators. Senators Tim Scott and Cynthia Lummis called his testimony misleading and embarrassing, with some demanding Senate censure. The renovation project, which began in 2021, is ongoing and expected to be completed in several years.

name: Craig Riedel for Senate
subject: Craig Riedel Announces $250,000 Raised in First Three Months as a Candidate for Ohio’s 1st Senate District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
July 1, 2025
Craig Riedel Announces $250,000 Raised in First Three Months as a Candidate for Ohio's 1st Senate District

DEFIANCE - Republican State Senate candidate Craig Riedel today announced that his campaign raised more than $250,000 ahead of the June 30, 2025 semi-annual campaign finance deadline. Notably, this does not include any self-funding. Riedel became the first announced candidate for Ohio's 1st Senate District in early April and since then has established himself as the early frontrunner to replace term-limited Senator Rob McColley (R-Napoleon).
"I have been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support our campaign has received in just three short months," said Riedel. "The 1st Senate District is one of the largest geographic districts in the state, encompassing all or parts of 10 counties. As a state representative, I worked hard to be present in our communities and accessible to my constituents; I will put in the same effort each day as the next Senator for this district. I am grateful to all those who have invested their hard-earned money in our campaign."
The 1st Senate District encompasses all or parts of 10 counties in Northwest Ohio: all of Defiance, Fulton, Hancock, Hardin, Henry, Paulding, Putnam, Van Wert, and Williams Counties, and part of Logan County. Senate President Rob McColley (R-Napoleon) is term-limited in 2026. Craig and his wife of 36 years, Danette, reside in Defiance. They have two children and three granddaughters. Riedel served as State Representative for the 82nd Ohio House District for six years. A civil engineer, he spent 27 years in the steel industry at Nucor Vulcraft Group.
For more information about Craig Riedel and his campaign, visit craigriedelforohio.com.
A headshot can be accessed [here](https://4n5jswhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lBNstcRntHjL7juOxhynqdLzY3qKkFfKXvOa7WIYZEKk0DfX7d-QR5TPLmW4j5BlYfh9sVH0fhJpuyHIerqskYhx9nyf_Ffvdxm5TQuTljQR1TeH0uOMBgG6SIG4d8gqkmob0CoDbVYGvfctnAzm5tWQd43sAxCrCYgXLFWAkk7UYWdRXpLKwSZAUs6_w838XEGSL5cd8NouTjVzi1gQpg==&c=_npxn0ix6BTn4y9YzOfo1DtcHHge6VwZ-X75nZhoxXEnGwn6Kw0lAQ==&ch=oziznz6w1RZ_gExONxreGdOSbG8VNJ5aYVhjcrW6-O5VSwH85NZcNg==). Inquiries can be sent to [craigriedelforohio@gmail.com](mailto:craigriedelforohio@gmail.com).

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Liberal Flag Fatigue
body:
There is only one true flag, our American Flag

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cbc8e08df72b/when-we-vote-we-win-14764236?e=8763c56857)
---
|

| | | | |

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “When we honor our flag, we honor what we stand for as a nation — freedom, equality, justice, and hope.” – Ronald Reagan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **Burning the American flag is not a protest. It is a declaration of war on the values of this country**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | Liberals Struggle to Keep Up With Flag-of-the-Month Club Ahead of Fourth of July
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
As America gears up to celebrate 249 years of **flipping tyranny the bird with fireworks,** BBQ, and Toby Keith playlists, one group of citizens finds themselves completely overwhelmed: Liberals are experiencing unprecedented levels of flag-related burnout.
Sources confirm that in liberal enclaves from Brooklyn to Berkeley, exhausted residents are collapsing under the sheer logistical nightmare of keeping their symbolic solidarity flags up to date.**It’s flag fatigue, folks** — and it’s real.
“It started with the Trans flag, then the Ukrainian flag was the hot moral accessory,” said Kayden, a self-described progressive activist and Etsy sticker mogul. “Then Palestine became the urgent humanitarian cause of the moment, so we swapped again. **Now Iran’s in the mix and, frankly, I’m running out of porch space.** ”
Psychologists call it**Reactive Banner Syndrome** — a condition in which one’s moral worth is directly tied to the number of non-American flags you can fly before brunch.Meanwhile, Etsy sellers are reporting surging demand for Iranian flags — a product so rare even Hamas has to backorder it. “I had to custom print it on a recycled kombucha label,” said one flag vendor in Portland. “It’s the most oppressed fabric I’ve ever worked with.”
But the irony hits like a July 4th bottle rocket to the face: While liberals exhaust themselves **collecting foreign banners like it’s the United Nations’ version of Pokémon** , the one flag they consistently burn is — yep — Old Glory.
And here’s the kicker:**burning American flags has sparked renewed global interest in... American flags**. In Tel Aviv, red-white-and-blue is flying in the streets. In parts of Eastern Europe, folks are waving it in protest of actual authoritarianism — the kind that throws people off rooftops, not misgenders them. Yet somehow, in parts of America, the Stars and Stripes are considered passé. Outdated. Problematic.
This is what happens when identity becomes a yard sign hobby and patriotism gets filed under**“problematic colonizer vibes.”** Never mind that the American flag represents a nation where all these ideologies can openly clash without anyone getting disappeared in the night. (Try that with the Iranian flag and see how long your TikTok account lasts.)
So this Fourth of July, while liberals scramble to remember if they’re supposed to be waving the flag of Gaza, Tehran, Tijuana, or TikTok Nation, the rest of us will be proudly hoisting one banner: the American flag.
Not because it’s trendy. Not because it gets us likes. But because it’s the symbol of the most radical idea in human history: that people can govern themselves, speak freely, and celebrate their disagreements without killing each other —**a wild notion still illegal in half the countries liberals love to glorify.**
To our liberal friends: You’re welcome to bring your latest flag to the cookout. But when the fireworks start and the anthem plays, **you might just remember why the red, white, and blue is the only flag that deserves to fly above them all.**
**God bless America — and someone please hide the lighter fluid.** ——————————-

clean_body: There is only one true flag, our American Flag | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “When we honor our flag, we honor what we stand for as a nation — freedom, equality, justice, and hope.” – Ronald Reagan | | | | | | | | | | | | Burning the American flag is not a protest. It is a declaration of war on the values of this country | | | | Opinion | Liberals Struggle to Keep Up With Flag-of-the-Month Club Ahead of Fourth of July | By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator As America gears up to celebrate 249 years of flipping tyranny the bird with fireworks, BBQ, and Toby Keith playlists, one group of citizens finds themselves completely overwhelmed: Liberals are experiencing unprecedented levels of flag-related burnout. Sources confirm that in liberal enclaves from Brooklyn to Berkeley, exhausted residents are collapsing under the sheer logistical nightmare of keeping their symbolic solidarity flags up to date.It’s flag fatigue, folks — and it’s real. “It started with the Trans flag, then the Ukrainian flag was the hot moral accessory,” said Kayden, a self-described progressive activist and Etsy sticker mogul. “Then Palestine became the urgent humanitarian cause of the moment, so we swapped again. Now Iran’s in the mix and, frankly, I’m running out of porch space. ” Psychologists call itReactive Banner Syndrome — a condition in which one’s moral worth is directly tied to the number of non-American flags you can fly before brunch.Meanwhile, Etsy sellers are reporting surging demand for Iranian flags — a product so rare even Hamas has to backorder it. “I had to custom print it on a recycled kombucha label,” said one flag vendor in Portland. “It’s the most oppressed fabric I’ve ever worked with.” But the irony hits like a July 4th bottle rocket to the face: While liberals exhaust themselves collecting foreign banners like it’s the United Nations’ version of Pokémon , the one flag they consistently burn is — yep — Old Glory. And here’s the kicker:burning American flags has sparked renewed global interest in... American flags. In Tel Aviv, red-white-and-blue is flying in the streets. In parts of Eastern Europe, folks are waving it in protest of actual authoritarianism — the kind that throws people off rooftops, not misgenders them. Yet somehow, in parts of America, the Stars and Stripes are considered passé. Outdated. Problematic. This is what happens when identity becomes a yard sign hobby and patriotism gets filed under“problematic colonizer vibes.” Never mind that the American flag represents a nation where all these ideologies can openly clash without anyone getting disappeared in the night. (Try that with the Iranian flag and see how long your TikTok account lasts.) So this Fourth of July, while liberals scramble to remember if they’re supposed to be waving the flag of Gaza, Tehran, Tijuana, or TikTok Nation, the rest of us will be proudly hoisting one banner: the American flag. Not because it’s trendy. Not because it gets us likes. But because it’s the symbol of the most radical idea in human history: that people can govern themselves, speak freely, and celebrate their disagreements without killing each other —a wild notion still illegal in half the countries liberals love to glorify. To our liberal friends: You’re welcome to bring your latest flag to the cookout. But when the fireworks start and the anthem plays, you might just remember why the red, white, and blue is the only flag that deserves to fly above them all. God bless America — and someone please hide the lighter fluid. ——————————- | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. ## No More Paper Vehicle Tags
Car buyers in Texas will no longer get temporary paper tags when they purchase a vehicle as a new state law goes into effect today. Paper tags issued before July 1 can be used until they expire, but dealerships are now [required to issue permanent plates](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GM6ymFXkGBC8hm003tBBaZYcRS5hx5u-39Bc266Drnnvu92242RDDOn_ZB-nyntKw0pEjlUL7sNmN9mLnPKeVljAvudg7ZZcGBJQcFAcxeBviZ2grr0fwvahICyVF0ymFfbVoIADppGvG0Tf_XK96Atl2VroOrBOuCvoMAwVCCEDoagSl-lFO6MZ-spNjLZAPJe11WajQ2-YpftKL9tqlRxX1UsqWWfOfoWFojuOoXQzujkt65pLW84uhObUYmpicjQzNyWRooDtvxdD8POOHC06rz_zy5qc4Dyu_kAxNtWu_HSHGkDvFWpgfNsSrQ_nbci-NvwEAAP__yhSBlg) to in-state buyers. House Bill 718 was passed in 2023 to combat widespread fraud involving fake paper tags, which have been used in crimes or to evade toll cameras. In 2021, at least 1.8 million vehicles on Texas roads [weren’t properly registered](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SnTAQhE8jsnklDT-CQIETsnXqkBqJkZAtEIXkZbm9a98VHHd1V3_fr4_lg2KKR_hJO5v65fNy8F0S18rXctLJV6VQQj54i2Erlf5wcXlBiT1IDVItK8X0LF2zGivXSTVslO5VO2iNU7MZ3-IwEelREZMftXJT29tedaP1suW-ieZ7TGqplJIohxdKrSfbe3R28uSd6CSvsebrVTeu_EXFpyd_8vVyeW-S2Wo9i2h_CJwFzmSdar8TgfOZSxU4vzvwhoEzUeUCIccjAN30wME3JLphs6DVCCFzAfaeXYXff9MDClzeLVVwV9xZ4KwGPaGUKHBuLrOed0wplkGLToadYnrfqv8n89PgvwAAAP__9xqIcw), costing the state $125 million in revenue. Now, vehicles must display permanent metal plates or [one of several temporary metal plates](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSqzAQRE8DmShpDMgECn7izD_dkBqkEWhXIEoaG_v2W_gKG3XS9bpef93HO4YYtvk_rmT45dO40VEiMVMed9wpM85lThstYV4K4w8Vm0aQ0AmphVSjwxDfY1s7M0k3qJqM0p269FrDUC8G8Nqjv7QWnFZT29HVedQTDfI6oQVdB3PCpJZKKQmyb0BqPUydBzsNHr2tWkkucMoNL8T0wuLjOz0pNzatdTQL816qy78KbhXcjuNofHpBv6RH4bSdpQpup9UZSXykxGklPjBhMYuVGKPYIzIV8f2Ib6HqbNx-hBhD6XXVynnFED-T_LejngZ-AwAA__9a3X9W) for specific uses. Dealerships can issue blue plates for business use, green plates for out-of-state buyers, red plates for single-trip or 30-day permits, and purple plates for special cases when permanent plates are not available. Private sellers must remove their plates and registration stickers when transferring a vehicle, and buyers must apply for new plates through their county tax office. _"This will make it a lot more efficient, a lot cleaner, combat crime, all the things,”_ said Alan Helfman of Helfman River Oaks Jeep.
## Houston Flood Projects Face $1.3B Shortfall
A Harris County official told commissioners Thursday that a $2.5 billion bond approved by voters in 2018 [isn’t enough to pay](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAYhJ8Gd38ExDFLQZHGOp20115p_YYfg45ABGS9fvuT8wrbjTSj0cz393P5xJhi3v7gg0z_9mXJtLdEvVNdnvik2nFrW8kU4hZax3_UbFkklzfgCrhYHMZ0LOPgzMqdFgMZoW7iOikl9RDMqGm1HyNOI37YFW_OTVpbfZ24w9HZaYjmLOOKCyG45NNFcqX0evPSrtqjt2zk5GIv9dIDdfrG5tNRvqhebHkMyYTen41d70zOTM77vl8eLZ8ekzNleDUm5_MUk_NbJ6wbtQ4-leJgLdlBzBBi66UeUDwErDU2sOWV-wEeLTUQsMaUYsngX9nFvEEL5WRDTM5Y4X4Xv17udxyqcc_9jLZJsZFvD4zpPbT_DO-Xkf8DAAD__-9GkjM) for all 181 flood control projects it was intended to fund. The $1.3 billion shortfall is blamed on rising construction costs and changes in project scope. Less than 30% of the allocated funds have been spent, and while [43 projects have been completed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAQBU8jZRJI6kMoYLCJMm-6odAim58dWi2Qbcu-_cBzhckfXqHq3227QcrpCH_hjoZfnrYDr5qRGct2womFIdRAB8YUYmX4wmppU0JNndCdkJuDlN_b2DqzC7fIFo3UkxxmrdXSRoO7WOZdg3MOALxfRhBa6mEZpmlWdm6T-ZwJLaSUQom5V0LrZZ-8svviwdtmFOgSU-k5IuMLqs9vemLpLd3bbCLzWZvhT6PWRq3XdfWeXmqO9KhMx2fUqPVj1ag1QimpdpYeB787n4lcOkJ3FvqPlmu3P1xA7mqkwh5ybotx55VyTnXWzSjCHVL-4fLvaj2N-g4AAP__S3SCQQ), most are still in the early planning or design stages. The news elicited finger-pointing and contentious discussion about funding priorities and the project approval process. Precinct 1 Commissioner Rodney Ellis complained that projects had not been prioritized according to a “people-first equity framework” adopted by the court in 2019. County Judge Lina Hidalgo suggested that the county’s [procurement process is convoluted](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQAL8Gd7aWdWziguIad7n2SmsNi0FHDAIUJ39_yv3Cq0eakebPY3tQiOE8ftOTdXu7tJ181citcdkyZS6Njnqkk304fG30l6tJGwJOPage5GYpxM9266zewS6yYy3VJMdZKVw6r800y_1-3xc3IkuwuzNAZoERyKqZqQv6KwMFUkpAmAcEpZZ9cmj2xZEz4gZsQ0tlaJ4bv6m6-EkvLoNJzy5q31quYvwlcBW4Xtc1GF_S-aUC15xiaMFUgSuVFkxkgWsMJ_U-WIpH6l1MyfYmna2k2COMy4wwDtnnrmibrxBjqLMSNzieFOL_avvZq5fGfwEAAP__Tpd_JQ), expressing frustration that a security detail had not been provided for her recent trip to Paris. Despite criticism from Precinct 3 Commissioner Tom Ramsey that the “formula is flawed,” the court voted to prioritize projects according to the previously adopted framework. Staff was directed to compile an updated list of feasible projects and [create an online dashboard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGypCAQBdCvwaynoGeUMTDYxOxtuqHVQqPsIliAM8-_33J-4WUddJ26t-6fr-mLfPBx-U0bD_XbpSnyuwSulfO008650lKWFHn1y1oq_eNi0oQSW5AapJos-XBOj8YOs7S9anhQulX3Tmvsm3VA0k63LXetVVY-Wd7l84lS3c3Dul63jR8uTGqplJIouxtKrfu5dWjm3pEz4iHZ-pryra5c-ZuKC2d6cb6ZtDVhWGvdi7j_EjgKHE3atiP6evptJ1OvH4Hjmo5SUxQ4znQCZSaB43IhceNYBY5XCIGj7K5bCxzryuBS3o5A4Au4QG-2sFLOvoBJR6wnJOe88RQKFDrBHdH6uEBMFehFPtAcPgZQCLAHipEt7Dn9ZVMLuJw2QKmeBbCdwYWULMwpWoFjkwe7v30IvnRaPOSykQ-fvvVnK70G_B8AAP__jY2pTg) where residents can track project status.
## Big Bend Fossils Belong to 'Gigantic' Possum
Researchers at the University of Kansas have determined that fossils discovered decades ago in Big Bend National Park belong to a [previously unknown species](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ_GdEbr9YFF4SJSRHdpoiglWvAarNgYYefuePuIvMJfTDWj0cz3-zk9KcSwrz8osa0fn6ed3yVyrXxOBx18VlrLmnfewrqVSn-4LHlCwE6CkaAmRyFe06NxdgY3qIatMp3SvTE4NJvVnZth6TUMCKQ9OGaNpGEYeuW9hybYuwwMKKUAoW8RjBnmzuMyD578Ih7ALtR8tnXjyh8qPl75xWe75NREu9V6FKG_CRwFjjQv94N2zbctcPz1U-DocykhFrkG2qs8cil_k0yUEkUZw4ud7EGmEGPIu7yYziJwLDWfl9BjcEJ_V6hVd6s5rTved7T0RjxgTRTi_yn1awBfFv8FAAD___QbhOM) of marsupial-like mammals resembling “gigantic” possums. Originally collected by the late Judith Schiebout of Louisiana State University, the molars and jaw fragments were recently analyzed by Kristen Miller, a doctoral student at Kansas, who [reported her findings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL_G7mxdwDahoNgmXbbd0sJwMVchBgGKk79fJXp_8LqjGemMNP9u681QpGP_ax6o28un9cCzRmwNy5pNxtLMXvd0YKA91GbuWG1aOfB5ADkAW52h-F6n3ukNnGI9aiZnJhYpueqDVsvCJgEXxQHQTCAMeudBsM2Ki9i2nvRHBhIYY8BhGTlIqbbZc7spb7ztJkBHLZWxBWz4MtXHd3piGW169FGH1nLtxJ-OXzt-Pc9ztKGk49N2_BrJ4yem6H7QlEY2fumwhEcbfKqVYh2-8iGbch84CMXUzMYccl-0yyfFSHWR3QT7w1D8jrffXfbU_H8AAAD__92igLE) in a study published in the _Journal of Vertebrate Paleontology_. The new species, Swaindelphys solastella, was about the size of a hedgehog—much larger than others in its genus. _"Since everything is bigger in Texas, this is perhaps not surprising,"_ [said Chris Beard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4M4WXMdGFBSvcZfXTmnxcbHRYEDmTpzsfpRsYeq_9DvS-bqvdxNTzNt_c6CmZyhrxqslJMJzrabiSWZrW8m4x21vZL6xubICh6nnsudi9Sam13rrvLbcK9GhFnIS4ywlqG7Xo5KzE5YHYZXEScFsRwhyBOetcH7son5jXHIhBAc-D8ClVHYK4KwKJjh24-gjlXOgHQmfpoX0Kg88B1eOLumdqDY2_mOwMFiu6xpqqc3Fd2awYH7Es-QDMzFYbNz6Wlr7OfoP1eOTYnbv1J3a1yumFNss2Y1vh4nps0F_e-ah4TcAAP__qK95rw), the study’s co-author.

clean_body: Car buyers in Texas will no longer get temporary paper tags when they purchase a vehicle as a new state law goes into effect today. Paper tags issued before July 1 can be used until they expire, but dealerships are now to in-state buyers. | | | | | | Tuesday, July 1, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1953, Hall of Fame cornerback was born in Denison. His jersey number was retired by Arizona State University and the New England Patriots, and he won Super Bowl XVIII with the Los Angeles Raiders in 1984. You might see blue, green, red, or purple license plates on Texas roads in the near future. in today's Roundup section. Most people don't think twice about cleaning their washing machine, but with today's sponsor, you can do it effortlessly. Abilene ☁️ 94/71° | Amarillo ⛈️ 79/66° | Austin ⛅ 96/71° | Brownsville 🌦️ 85/78° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 90/78° | DFW 🌥️ 98/75° | El Paso 🌩️ 87/72° | Houston 🌥️ 94/76° | Laredo 🌦️ 85/75° | Lubbock 🌩️ 84/69° | Midland ⛈️ 83/71° | San Antonio 🌦️ 90/72° | Tyler 🌦️ 95/74° | Waco ☀️ 96/72° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | No More Paper Vehicle Tags Car buyers in Texas will no longer get temporary paper tags when they purchase a vehicle as a new state law goes into effect today. Paper tags issued before July 1 can be used until they expire, but dealerships are now to in-state buyers. House Bill 718 was passed in 2023 to combat widespread fraud involving fake paper tags, which have been used in crimes or to evade toll cameras. In 2021, at least 1.8 million vehicles on Texas roads , costing the state $125 million in revenue. Now, vehicles must display permanent metal plates or for specific uses. Dealerships can issue blue plates for business use, green plates for out-of-state buyers, red plates for single-trip or 30-day permits, and purple plates for special cases when permanent plates are not available. Private sellers must remove their plates and registration stickers when transferring a vehicle, and buyers must apply for new plates through their county tax office. "This will make it a lot more efficient, a lot cleaner, combat crime, all the things,” said Alan Helfman of Helfman River Oaks Jeep. Houston Flood Projects Face $1.3B Shortfall A Harris County official told commissioners Thursday that a $2.5 billion bond approved by voters in 2018 for all 181 flood control projects it was intended to fund. The $1.3 billion shortfall is blamed on rising construction costs and changes in project scope. Less than 30% of the allocated funds have been spent, and while , most are still in the early planning or design stages. The news elicited finger-pointing and contentious discussion about funding priorities and the project approval process. Precinct 1 Commissioner Rodney Ellis complained that projects had not been prioritized according to a “people-first equity framework” adopted by the court in 2019. County Judge Lina Hidalgo suggested that the county’s , expressing frustration that a security detail had not been provided for her recent trip to Paris. Despite criticism from Precinct 3 Commissioner Tom Ramsey that the “formula is flawed,” the court voted to prioritize projects according to the previously adopted framework. Staff was directed to compile an updated list of feasible projects and where residents can track project status. Big Bend Fossils Belong to 'Gigantic' Possum Researchers at the University of Kansas have determined that fossils discovered decades ago in Big Bend National Park belong to a of marsupial-like mammals resembling “gigantic” possums. Originally collected by the late Judith Schiebout of Louisiana State University, the molars and jaw fragments were recently analyzed by Kristen Miller, a doctoral student at Kansas, who in a study published in the Journal of Vertebrate Paleontology. The new species, Swaindelphys solastella, was about the size of a hedgehog—much larger than others in its genus. "Since everything is bigger in Texas, this is perhaps not surprising," , the study’s co-author. | Flying together with our sponsor The No. 1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner Tired of musty-smelling laundry? —and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. | ➤ Pasadena: Bianca Valerio was declared the winner of the June 7 runoff election for the District B seat on the city council after she won a coin toss yesterday. Valerio—the incumbent since 2021—and challenger Bruce Leamon each received 272 votes. () ➤ Diana: Walnut Creek Baptist Church celebrated 175 years of ministry this past weekend. “The church is constantly growing, and we’re so happy about that, and we know that’s the work of the Lord,” said 91-year-old member Lois Yocom. () ➤ Austin: The State Board of Education renewed its approval for the elective American Indian/Native Studies course in a bipartisan 9-5 vote on Friday. name: Jay Feely
subject: Simone Biles went from hero to zero
body:
This is what hypocrisy looks like

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot,
First, Simone Biles called Riley Gaines “sick” and a “sore loser” for daring to speak out against biological men competing in women’s sports.
**Then she deleted her entire X account after the backlash started rolling in.**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Simone had no problem attacking Riley, a woman who actually faced male competitors in her sport, but when Americans fought and pushed back against her woke nonsense? She folded and ran.
She can dish it out, but she sure can’t take it. **That’s pure hypocrisy.**
The Left cheered her on because this is exactly the kind of insanity they want to be normalized. They want to silence women like Riley, elevate radical gender ideology, and demonize anyone who dares to defend common sense.
If we want to protect voices like Riley Gaines then we need leaders who will speak up to defend them.
**[I’m Jay Feely - former NFL kicker, father, and candidate for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District - and I’m calling out Biles and all the other woke mob shills once and for all.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We need leaders who have the guts to say what everyone knows:
**Men DO NOT belong in women’s sports. Period.**
Friend, I am not afraid to take on hypocrites like Simon Biles. I will not stay silent as hypocrites undermine equal opportunities for our girls that were won with title IX. It’s not just unfair, it’s putting women across the nation in dangerous situations just to accommodate men pretending to be women.
And I promise you, I’ll fight like hell for women like Riley in Congress - _but I need your help to get there_.
**[So if you’re sick of Simone Biles and woke elites tearing down real heroes like Riley Gaines, now’s the time to step up.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[I’m counting on folks like you to chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help me fight for you and Arizona’s 5th district in Congress to put an end to this madness once and for all](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[HELP KEEP MEN OUT OF WOMEN’S SPORTS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It’s time to stop the radical Left from weaponizing every platform - sports, media, schools, even the Olympics - to erase common sense.
**Biles gets applause for pushing gender ideology. Riley gets attacked for telling the truth.**
And now more than ever, we need America First champions like me who aren’t afraid to say: **Enough****.**
* No more letting woke elites call the shots.
* No more allowing men into women’s sports.
* No more silencing real female athletes.

It’s time to put an end to this insanity.
**President Trump needs bold America First allies in Congress - not silent bench-warmers.**
We’re in a battle for the soul of our country, and I’m not afraid to throw a few hits.
**[That’s why America First leaders, like Congressman Jim Jordan, have given me their full endorsement.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
But even with champions like Jim Jordan behind me, the Deep State isn’t just going to let me go toe-to-toe with them in Congress without a fight.

I need patriots like you to stand with me. I’m up against the Left’s warchest, and I can promise you, they are going to use every play they have to take me out.**__**
**__**
**_[Can I count on you to stand with me to take our country back](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****?**
[STAND WITH JAY FEELY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, let’s drown out the woke nonsense with the roar of patriots who’ve had ENOUGH.
| | _For America,_
---
**Jay Feely**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHY/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aJHZ/?__vbtrk=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk5ODkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=299891&trkid=761541712&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

# A New Era for Vaccine Policy Has Begun
---
| |
---
| As we pause this week to commemorate our nation’s founding, we also **celebrate groundbreaking wins for medical liberty**. In a bold move earlier this month, HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. overhauled the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP), replacing its longtime members with experts committed to restoring public trust and nullifying pharmaceutical influence. The importance of this housecleaning effort cannot be overstated; ACIP is the body that determines which vaccines belong on the routine childhood immunization schedule, a list that is used by practitioners, legislators and bureaucrats to direct Americans’ healthcare decisions. Last week, the newly reformed ACIP met for the first time, and it was a dramatic departure from the status quo. Chair Martin Kulldorff, a former Harvard professor known for challenging COVID orthodoxy, welcomed **open criticism of the vaccine program**. The committee also launched new workgroups to reexamine long-ignored issues like cumulative vaccine exposure, ingredient safety, and scheduling impacts - **subjects previously off-limits** within the federal regulatory framework. During the meeting, panelists asked **tough, yet long overdue questions** about COVID vaccine safety, spike protein persistence, and adverse event patterns. Agency officials, clearly unaccustomed to real scrutiny, struggled to respond. That same day, Secretary Kennedy announced a **freeze on U.S. funding to Gavi** , the Bill Gates-funded global vaccine alliance, pending a review of its science and transparency. **Together, these moves signal a powerful shift: the era of unchecked authority in vaccine policy is ending, and a new chapter of accountability has begun!**

# Legislator Awards
|
---
We're excited to announce the final round of our new and well-deserved awards for the legislators who boldly led the charge in the 89th Legislative Session.
| |

|
---
| |
---
Rep. Shelley Luther came out swinging in her freshman year with HB 3441, a little bill that has made a huge impact! For too long, vaccine makers have enjoyed total immunity from legal liability, but Rep. Luther has put an end to that in Texas. As she said during the House floor debate on this bill: "It's time for Big Pharma to put their money where their mouth is!" From the jail house during COVID to the Texas House during the 89th Legislative Session, Shelley Luther has proven to be a medical liberty champion, and we are proud to name her the **TFVC Representative of the Year!**
| |
---
As the Chairwoman of the Senate Health and Human Services Committee, Senator Lois Kolkhorst has spent the last several sessions prioritizing medical liberty. Senator Kolkhorst consistently shines a light on governmental overreach and medical tyranny, and champions the rights of Texans to direct their own medical care. And this session, she carried two very important bills across the finish line - HB 1586 and HB 4076. Thank you Senator Kolkhorst for being a champion for medical liberty! We are happy to name you the **TFVC Senator of the Year!**

clean_body: | | RFK Jr.’s ACIP Overhaul and Gavi Funding Freeze | | | | | | A New Era for Vaccine Policy Has Begun | | | As we pause this week to commemorate our nation’s founding, we also celebrate groundbreaking wins for medical liberty. In a bold move earlier this month, HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. overhauled the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP), replacing its longtime members with experts committed to restoring public trust and nullifying pharmaceutical influence. The importance of this housecleaning effort cannot be overstated; ACIP is the body that determines which vaccines belong on the routine childhood immunization schedule, a list that is used by practitioners, legislators and bureaucrats to direct Americans’ healthcare decisions. Last week, the newly reformed ACIP met for the first time, and it was a dramatic departure from the status quo. Chair Martin Kulldorff, a former Harvard professor known for challenging COVID orthodoxy, welcomed open criticism of the vaccine program. The committee also launched new workgroups to reexamine long-ignored issues like cumulative vaccine exposure, ingredient safety, and scheduling impacts - subjects previously off-limits within the federal regulatory framework. During the meeting, panelists asked tough, yet long overdue questions about COVID vaccine safety, spike protein persistence, and adverse event patterns. Agency officials, clearly unaccustomed to real scrutiny, struggled to respond. That same day, Secretary Kennedy announced a freeze on U.S. funding to Gavi , the Bill Gates-funded global vaccine alliance, pending a review of its science and transparency. Together, these moves signal a powerful shift: the era of unchecked authority in vaccine policy is ending, and a new chapter of accountability has begun! | News | | | | | | Ivermectin Access Petition | Gov. ## Disney-Pixar’s ‘Elio’ Was Originally Going to Be a ‘Queer-Coded’ Character Before Leadership Stepped In – RedState

name: Dani Hupper, Evergreen
subject: Our last chance to stop this Big Brutal Bill
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Your representatives need to hear from you, ASAP
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741817/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
|
### **🚨 LAST CHANCE to demand that your rep stands up for you and millions of working Americans**
As the disastrous budget bill moves to the House for a FINAL vote, there’s still time for our decision-makers to do what’s right and stop it from heading to Trump’s desk. But only if your representative hears from you right now. [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741818/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi Friend,

In a blow to working people across the country, the Senate just passed their monstrous budget bill, taking a wrecking ball to programs that make energy affordable for households, reduce toxic pollution, combat the climate crisis, provide life-changing healthcare, and nourish families with food assistance.

If this bill passes, Republicans would be responsible for **killing over 800,000 jobs** , as well as **raising the average American’s electricity bills by 10 percent**. In a time of intense heat waves and grid demand, they’d also be reducing new energy capacity installed on the grid by at least 50 percent.

**_All this—simply to line the pockets of billionaires, fossil fuel executives, and their top corporate backers with massive tax cuts._**

But there’s still hope, friend. Since the bill still needs to go through the House **one more time** for FINAL passage, that means we still have **one more shot** at getting our representatives to do the right thing. And with razor thin margins, [**every single call can mean the difference in this fight.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741819/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CALL YOUR REP NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741820/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We mean it when we say every call can make an impact. **That’s because it shows our members of Congress that:** |
---
|
1. This coordinated attack on our future and pocketbooks is _far from_ popular, and that Americans want clean energy investments that are already benefitting their communities.
2. You’re paying attention, and that you will remember how they voted on this bill once Americans start seeing higher electricity bills and feeling other impacts.

|
---
| So even if you’ve done it already, [**please pick up the phone, call your representative, and tell them to reject this cost-ballooning budget bill once it’s their turn to vote.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741821/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[CALL YOUR REP + DEMAND THEY VOTE NO](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741820/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for everything you’re doing to make your voice heard. |
---
| | |
---
### Dani Hupper
Campaigns Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
| **P.S.** After you’ve called, please forward this message to your friends and family members— _especially those with Republican Representatives_ —to make your action even more impactful. |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3741822/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---

## Glastonbury: It was not a mistake, it was a co-ordinated act of provocation
THE events at Glastonbury this past weekend should concern anyone who believes that anti-Semitism has no place in British public life. What unfolded on one of the country’s most iconic cultural stages wasn’t spontaneous rebellion or edgy political commentary: it was a deliberate and co-ordinated act of provocation. Worse, it was broadcast live to a [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/qnaqocVXs2PptYYvV3GEhyepCLFNq8pwAoiROIqjGKPiX6FgPozt-b3W9Xh1fTzDUvh2ARziiSin9qDrVzFmsMRZkhj_QSEHeQcOPcbTfTvyRwO-vQL0Oa4dTkVFHSiIZJJ3kRLmt_eQyupifM7dDKVNwsaEanvmJsnYjX7qtHJxNz3ORzfkCevAN2smkr8TC8SJIEaYe4XR0pEIR2AMtJKS09g1TjbPeLlzlrgTVLw2nIU3vkN88nrxxq-a3006uPi00i7xzBR87lM807uk6q2TQvJpKROWSywGjH8JlQUPWPp6CB5kmKky0I0BMvWH5irCiCSyLwQ-FQjewR-UV64GTf50pFzG2lfoCRhsND4M7Q6NL0Iuoddadqo4ES1X2Dy2REXMXP-LweCekRvvzGsAd5R0HJNIqObExE-AElfyhNmvqPCNBun_sxOpSsY2aue-eEfR74SXHKPfndSr4pGCIvTfGvWYug5unkq4AKan-Zn2KCvvY_eLn1uawORSQ2WCk4WEURQlgBV4vcPtECVUrQj_VC50kp-CFH0j2eZLRR4VtkpU5q27-w/vLlT_zAGYRK81AmY9y2KsIJEWIEmUs_5/10)

## Shakespearean Philosophy ~ The Imaginative Conservative
Who would have thought that so much philosophy could be found in such little poetry? Who would have thought that so much could be said in so few words? Next time you read Shakespeare, read carefully, and you may find more philosophy than first meets the eye. name: Steve Scalise
subject: Byron Donalds’ most critical deadline is upon us
body:
His race is my #1 priority

| | | | |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqm5b35e0bvua6l460pkb3k8dd02uoi78gbt0v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpge9oj2cdh2bs)
|
---
I’ve got something urgent on my mind and I need to share it with you.
**_This is House Majority Leader Steve Scalise._**
My good friend Byron Donalds is one of President Trump’s _**[STRONGEST](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9tn4tj3go4j2id7kapff5lp38l5anba6j05nhb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpge9oj2cdh2bs)**_ supporters and follows the **America First agenda** to the LETTER.
He’s also running to become Florida’s next Governor, in what has now become the most CRITICAL race for MAGA in the Nation.
Democrats are spending _**[MILLIONS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9lt0vbi8mp9ketbqm1dnv8476ho5gnamfv5pekg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpge9oj2cdh2bs)**_ to flip President Trump’s Home State. And even worse, they’ve propped up a radical leftist who’s following Pelosi’s marching orders in step.
**Right now, all eyes are on Byron’s fundraising numbers and I fear he’s still a ways off from his _end-of-quarter_ goal.**
If we can’t muster an overwhelming response, right here, right now, it will be a blow to the **MAGA Movement.**
So, can I humbly ask you to chip in any dollar amount before **midnight tonight?**

[CHIP IN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtas4kuvpu3o69ls294ctcjrono5s6lnidr9qa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpge9oj2cdh2bs)

With Byron leading Florida, our country will see heights it has never seen before.
But the target on his back is **MASSIVE**. His warchest needs to be the **LARGEST** in the country if MAGA is going to emerge victorious.
His end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up fast, and if he doesn’t hit his goal, we’ll be treading in DANGEROUS waters.
**Any gift will do:**

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7itfuu5mtilq14esgvdcsgc29kbdp6tkis4kp2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpge9oj2cdh2bs)
|
---
Thank you for all you do for the MAGA Movement,
House Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Byron Donalds’ most critical deadline is upon us
body:
His race is my #1 priority

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn1trvh716j86vr9tis9930onjh59dfkmigjo5ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie0p32c5h2bs)
|
---
I’ve got something urgent on my mind and I need to share it with you.
**_This is House Majority Leader Steve Scalise._**
My good friend Byron Donalds is one of President Trump’s _**[STRONGEST](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs1i8jca6csa3vg9l5n86c4v9sia4j24peu95ngg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie0p32c5h2bs)**_ supporters and follows the **America First agenda** to the LETTER.
He’s also running to become Florida’s next Governor, in what has now become the most CRITICAL race for MAGA in the Nation.
Democrats are spending _**[MILLIONS](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp4a5av7vokkasqr96dfklga5nqq0mhtapvlmm0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie0p32c5h2bs)**_ to flip President Trump’s Home State. And even worse, they’ve propped up a radical leftist who’s following Pelosi’s marching orders in step.
**Right now, all eyes are on Byron’s fundraising numbers and I fear he’s still a ways off from his _end-of-quarter_ goal.**
If we can’t muster an overwhelming response, right here, right now, it will be a blow to the **MAGA Movement.**
So, can I humbly ask you to chip in any dollar amount before **midnight tonight?**

[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3uqld3s485nmtshf1tdgdgal9il042g0o8tpcc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie0p32c5h2bs)

With Byron leading Florida, our country will see heights it has never seen before.
But the target on his back is **MASSIVE**. His warchest needs to be the **LARGEST** in the country if MAGA is going to emerge victorious.
His end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up fast, and if he doesn’t hit his goal, we’ll be treading in DANGEROUS waters.
**Any gift will do:**

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcvdu6ire3clfli2ppm355fllffjlvr1urh5ldho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie0p32c5h2bs)
|
---
Thank you for all you do for the MAGA Movement,
House Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I don’t care if it takes a month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team, Mark Kelly here.
It was a long weekend. Long night last night, too.
We are doing everything we can to stop this disaster of a budget that Trump is trying to muscle through Congress.
Some might think this is a waste of time, but this is the job. It’s what we are here for. People in Arizona and around the country are afraid — worried about their jobs, feeding their kids, and staying on their health care. I have heard from them every day for the last six months, and the calls are still pouring in.
I don’t care if it takes another day, another week, another month. This is why the people of Arizona sent me to the Senate. There is always dignity in fighting for the American people, and I’m honored to do it.
Thanks for helping me get here so I can do this work.
Mark
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250701-1-600&t=1&akid=6111%2E6688874%2EcCNENT)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6111%2E6688874%2EcCNENT).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110652726/554913712/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdmNDg5Zi03ZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4RyoM38b0IIFfcMGcEU3Ah63l0_Wi9E55cPNqUIdog=&emci=f57f489f-7f56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f77f489f-7f56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) Did you catch my interview on CNN this weekend, Derek? I joined to talk about Trump’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill:” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110652727/554913713/-898016266?refcode=email_070125_CNN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdmNDg5Zi03ZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4RyoM38b0IIFfcMGcEU3Ah63l0_Wi9E55cPNqUIdog=) **Trump’s bill isn’t popular, and it shouldn’t be.** As the Building Trades have said, this is the biggest job-killing bill in our country’s history. It would kick millions of Americans off Medicaid and health care they’ve earned. _Right here in Pennsylvania, hundreds of thousands of people could lose health care._ **It would jack up TRILLIONS in new debt— _all to pay for tax giveaways for the richest people who have ever lived._** That’s bad policy and it’s bad politics. And it’s happening while we still have rising costs, while Donald Trump continues to drive our economy into the ground. This is a fiscally reckless bill, and I’m doing everything I can to stop it. But if we are really going to stop this bill? We need grassroots support showing Trump and his Republican allies that people across the country are fighting back. [**If you’re with me, chip in now to help expose just how dangerous this bill is—and to keep building the momentum we need to defeat it →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110652728/554913714/-898016266?refcode=email_070125_CNN&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdmNDg5Zi03ZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4RyoM38b0IIFfcMGcEU3Ah63l0_Wi9E55cPNqUIdog=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110652729/554913715/-898016266?refcode=email_070125_CNN&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzdmNDg5Zi03ZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4RyoM38b0IIFfcMGcEU3Ah63l0_Wi9E55cPNqUIdog=)

| Today's the Day!
---
| Friends-
We have been waiting a LONG time for this day, and it's finally here! Today--July 1st, 2025-- [SB 1212](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xwYLXbU-9i2c0KqmQBT3dhNHCjZS3KE8Hq9hRk0MYY3DHRsyFp_NQk99hyyCw9n9Uv8VWWLEUk8B2lImfKwV8hXT2DQZG697eLQ_rZFBz9U-oy-9_Vf5SGArxwzvSrHNjy9MKaJ6v9-tktXFn2mKGLlq5HwRqPdcftBME7ZfOUeTtz2WxqDtboMpaDziBPM5&c=7Squ0V1s5nDdb8aV4jBM_vY-6EUWZhWjGZM3ZrADFeEgt8gZEelb5w==&ch=E5Ze-kxvB0uOLi_AKd78MmgwgkjlEnA67qnqAReQOt1haS9nhYJqSA==) and [HB 2515](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xwYLXbU-9i2c0KqmQBT3dhNHCjZS3KE8Hq9hRk0MYY3DHRsyFp_NQk99hyyCw9n9m21iscig4jGl0vRsdmDI3NsuITWg9m5QBWNwe3YIBh68pAebVpyXKxN_SFozW3w8RvyZCiLB-Tezw7aV-8YHyaiJ_7Jp0mgGrVb5LcK1PNP4cjI-Y6if63BdCL7ok9WJ&c=7Squ0V1s5nDdb8aV4jBM_vY-6EUWZhWjGZM3ZrADFeEgt8gZEelb5w==&ch=E5Ze-kxvB0uOLi_AKd78MmgwgkjlEnA67qnqAReQOt1haS9nhYJqSA==) go into effect! This legislation, which requires all businesses to display the full price of goods and services up front, effectively bans hidden fees in Virginia.
---
| |
---

| Wow, Peter. Trump’s radical spending slashes are going to absolutely crush public libraries across the United States. Federal funds are crucial for libraries, especially in rural areas. The money is used for important services, like interlibrary loans, programs for people with disabilities, computer labs, and so much more. Without this critical cash flow, libraries may be forced to end programs and services their communities depend on! This is just another devastating consequence of Trump’s extreme agenda, Peter. [We have to show Trump that American people NEED the resources we get at our libraries – and we won’t stand for defunding them! Will you add your name before midnight tonight to condemn Trump’s ATTACKS on our public libraries?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T874eb1b3-82c9-4e14-814d-b32ea9e73fc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcae9cce-ead7-4e96-befa-8c039f5e2ab5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Byron Donalds’ most critical deadline is upon us
body:
His race is my #1 priority

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z656nqacs1eg3f1i1mfibtt7b8bpgrok6ehjhl9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie8o34cth2bs)
|
---
I’ve got something urgent on my mind and I need to share it with you.
**_This is House Majority Leader Steve Scalise._**
My good friend Byron Donalds is one of President Trump’s _**[STRONGEST](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9pdkcpbhdloc5ssv8criohmqm3obp05hr0c7nr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie8o34cth2bs)**_ supporters and follows the **America First agenda** to the LETTER.
He’s also running to become Florida’s next Governor, in what has now become the most CRITICAL race for MAGA in the Nation.
Democrats are spending _**[MILLIONS](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zov017db8mpb7pf4ds36dmlnqter8tjm05uak2d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie8o34cth2bs)**_ to flip President Trump’s Home State. And even worse, they’ve propped up a radical leftist who’s following Pelosi’s marching orders in step.
**Right now, all eyes are on Byron’s fundraising numbers and I fear he’s still a ways off from his _end-of-quarter_ goal.**
If we can’t muster an overwhelming response, right here, right now, it will be a blow to the **MAGA Movement.**
So, can I humbly ask you to chip in any dollar amount before **midnight tonight?**

[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze85k5rk87nrghsu87p2u2rphbjp5iu2106itt68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie8o34cth2bs)

With Byron leading Florida, our country will see heights it has never seen before.
But the target on his back is **MASSIVE**. His warchest needs to be the **LARGEST** in the country if MAGA is going to emerge victorious.
His end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up fast, and if he doesn’t hit his goal, we’ll be treading in DANGEROUS waters.
**Any gift will do:**

|

[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztfkun69al2g9lbeg4v409nn8rg78qmp0l9g8t10_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cpie8o34cth2bs)
|

Thank you for all you do for the MAGA Movement,
House Majority Leader Steve Scalise

**Now that we know the programs we’ve designed are WORKING, we’re doubling down on our support – and gearing up for November. Here is a look at a few of our endorsed candidates who won their primaries and will be on the ballot this November:**

✅ **Erica Deuso for Mayor of Downingtown, Pennsylvania.**
After winning a tough primary against a Democratic opponent who proudly called himself a “white nationalist”... Erica will be on the November ballot against Richard Bryant, a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter. He is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. **Her primary victory brings Downingtown one step closer to electing Pennsylvania’s first openly trans Mayor (!!!!), but she needs our continued help to win in November!**

✅ **Senator Ghazala Hashmi for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.** It was our honor to support Senator Hashmi in her statewide race for this office. **_Our team spoke to voters all over the state of VA on her behalf_** and had some really productive conversations.

Hashmi was the only woman running against _six_ _male_ _opponents_ in this primary. She was also the most experienced legislator in her race. As State Senator, Hashmi helped draft Virginia’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion.

This November, Hashmi will face off against a Republican talk-radio host, John Reid. His campaign website features dangerous disinformation like, [“John Reid is pro life and has boldly spoken out on TV, radio, and in his personal testimony against the Democrats new radical unlimited any time-any place, day of birth abortion proposals.”]

✅ **May Nivar for Virginia House of Delegates.** May is running in the most flippable district in Virginia – the same seat Susanna Gibson ran for in 2023 and lost by only _715_ votes after enduring a sexist and horrifying attack from the state’s Republican party.

This November, May is working to unseat her GOP Representative, who was found to be the **least effective legislator** in Virginia. He has said he would like to see abortion become illegal in Virginia and has repeatedly voted against common sense gun safety policies, paid medical leave, bills to raise the minimum wage, lower prescription drug costs, and more... We need to ensure May wins her General election.

[**There are so many more candidates on our roster who we are incredibly proud to see moving on to general elections across the U.S. We are ready to continue our important – and effective – work. Help us keep up our momentum – and keep our programs running by donating $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250701doubt_N_JZ_90DO_9_NG_N_L4&amount=20.25)

Together,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & President
Her Bold Move

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110654372/554918266/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250701doubt_N_JZ_90DO_9_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5MjlmNTkzLTgxNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qJVUbBtnj4OgKsa1xa285WxT_azbGvumgqu-7Ek7Hf4=)

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Newsom’s deranged 8-minute rant…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEFz8iAQhn8NuZmBBbLxwEE_J5mvWnvw0NobAql0gokQk_Hfd7TW6-6z-z7z6tC3vrkqgksCcPQ2EQDCFwTgvJ9CvHyHdT07vC3s7Fxsg7xt4d8DHeEJn4wO_XKnN1N6T_W03u3H7evInvhw7d0TfoTmLmjf3qa4yqzijaUic4qhZBxxziA7qgbLxpbIKVKjG6MPpbESCymglEXJmswroCApUsa4ZGKeC6AGDVoUFNkBGBH0npPr4KI3mqVh0jF2XchNF7JWHYehT3exikA1xS4_XUzrLun3zHSBQPVQJlCNBCqJq5f6wy0-S8Kre2l8tQG3-X_mdcyisv3k29anAomgX39vslHBTwAAAP__kz1uLg)
| |
---
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKbeSdmgZOfSgu9GDu-7Bw8ZjaYt0QykWhPj2G4zxOvNLvr8OQ-ebhyK4IwCttyMBIMWWANwuS0j3v3A80Ppna-mtPAW5fuHjRWd4497oMOzO-msZf8fDcjxf5tP3zN98egzujV-juQvad-sVPzOrisYykTnFUfICseKQtQqxEkxvSltoUzqtwQoDDddcYGOZdJlXwEAyZJwXkosqF8AMGrQoGPIaOBHsuZPr4JI3mo_TolOKMeQmhqxT7TQN4zNsT2A_OnNPLte9s3FaxXqb3Oxo67sp9rSJiV7j7FIfEwUGJYE9L4TZVLKilcSKCiEZrevCUI2129RcWGZMlpQdFt91fiyRCHZ9Rq0Js4L_AAAA___cMXS-)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. [**And if you feel the same way about what’s happening in California right now, then I need you to join my campaign.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKbeSdmgZOfSgu9GDu-7Bw8ZjaYt0QykWhPj2G4zxOvNLvr8OQ-ebhyK4IwCttyMBIMWWANwuS0j3v3A80Ppna-mtPAW5fuHjRWd4497oMOzO-msZf8fDcjxf5tP3zN98egzujV-juQvad-sVPzOrisYykTnFUfICseKQtQqxEkxvSltoUzqtwQoDDddcYGOZdJlXwEAyZJwXkosqF8AMGrQoGPIaOBHsuZPr4JI3mo_TolOKMeQmhqxT7TQN4zNsT2A_OnNPLte9s3FaxXqb3Oxo67sp9rSJiV7j7FIfEwUGJYE9L4TZVLKilcSKCiEZrevCUI2129RcWGZMlpQdFt91fiyRCHZ9Rq0Js4L_AAAA___cMXS-) Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. **** **[That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKbeSdmgZOfSgu9GDu-7Bw8ZjaYt0QykWhPj2G4zxOvNLvr8OQ-ebhyK4IwCttyMBIMWWANwuS0j3v3A80Ppna-mtPAW5fuHjRWd4497oMOzO-msZf8fDcjxf5tP3zN98egzujV-juQvad-sVPzOrisYykTnFUfICseKQtQqxEkxvSltoUzqtwQoDDddcYGOZdJlXwEAyZJwXkosqF8AMGrQoGPIaOBHsuZPr4JI3mo_TolOKMeQmhqxT7TQN4zNsT2A_OnNPLte9s3FaxXqb3Oxo67sp9rSJiV7j7FIfEwUGJYE9L4TZVLKilcSKCiEZrevCUI2129RcWGZMlpQdFt91fiyRCHZ9Rq0Js4L_AAAA___cMXS-)** These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need **_real_** leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. **[And it’s why I hope you’ll join my campaign today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKbeSdmgZOfSgu9GDu-7Bw8ZjaYt0QykWhPj2G4zxOvNLvr8OQ-ebhyK4IwCttyMBIMWWANwuS0j3v3A80Ppna-mtPAW5fuHjRWd4497oMOzO-msZf8fDcjxf5tP3zN98egzujV-juQvad-sVPzOrisYykTnFUfICseKQtQqxEkxvSltoUzqtwQoDDddcYGOZdJlXwEAyZJwXkosqF8AMGrQoGPIaOBHsuZPr4JI3mo_TolOKMeQmhqxT7TQN4zNsT2A_OnNPLte9s3FaxXqb3Oxo67sp9rSJiV7j7FIfEwUGJYE9L4TZVLKilcSKCiEZrevCUI2129RcWGZMlpQdFt91fiyRCHZ9Rq0Js4L_AAAA___cMXS-)** Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
_**This election is our last best hope to save California.**_ _****_ _**We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again.**_
So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around:

I’m appalled. - Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant. You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. ** - These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need real leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. - Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. This election is our last best hope to save California. ** We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again. So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around: - Join me—and let's get to work. Steve Hilton Republican Candidate for Governor of California - P.S. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. -.
