| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17ee88c5-c324-4029-a706-20d3ba718878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Gabriel Bouys/AFP via Getty Images
Last week marked ten years since the Supreme Court case _Obergefell v. Hodges_ made marriage equality the law of the land. When the White House lit up in rainbow colors, it felt like the country had turned a page.
The last ten years brought the most transformational social and political change of the 21st century.
## From Don't Ask, Don't Tell to the Rainbow Wave
When I first served in the U.S. Army, the policy was simple and cruel: **Don 't Ask, Don't Tell.** You could wear the uniform. You could fight and die for your country. But you couldn't tell the truth about who you were. I saw the damage firsthand. Brilliant & tough soldiers--more than 13,000 of them--were forced out. In Baghdad, Iraq, in 138-degree heat, we didn't have enough Arabic speakers because we threw some of them out for being gay.
As a straight combat vet who went on to serve in Congress, I wasn't going to play it safe. I wasn't going to look the other way while this injustice continued--not even after winning my race by just 0.6%, as only the third Democrat ever elected to represent Bucks County's First Congressional District.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9ac6d589-2f57-43cd-a4f4-b0fa1ca31b96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack.com/redirect/8499ed95-46c5-4793-aa88-ec1bfd992ceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..7E4kJGuVl93WMyIkkv_vhEPKHLeO3cK5M55IgDsN-PM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167264465)
I'll never forget the heartbreaking[ letter I received from a distraught company commander stationed in Kabul, Afghanistan](https://substack.com/redirect/0b19052e-1661-42be-92e1-fba7fa9453f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He told me that he was sitting there at 3 a.m., in his barracks with a 9mm in his hand, losing hope as he was contemplating suicide. Not because of the Taliban. Not because of combat stress. But because he was gay. And under Don't Ask, Don't Tell, he couldn't turn to his commander, his battle buddies, or even the chaplain--for fear he'd be discharged.
> _" The reason I'm not going to take my life,_ he wrote, _" is because I know there's an Iraq War veteran named Patrick Murphy fighting for me. Please, sir. Keep fighting. We're counting on you."_
By the time I came to Congress, I knew this couldn't stand. That's why I wrote the bill that overturned Don't Ask, Don't Tell. In 2009, I launched the national "Voices of Honor" tour alongside gay, lesbian, and straight service members. We traveled the country sharing their stories, making the case that "we cannot afford to wait any longer." Our military was stretched thin in Iraq and Afghanistan, and yet we were still kicking out qualified, courageous people simply because of who they loved. I literally talked to every member of Congress--both Democrat and Republican--about repealing this wrong.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c4ee41-834a-49b6-a3f9-debfaecc0d85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When I introduced the bill to repeal Don't Ask, Don't Tell,__ it was the first major piece of LGBTQ civil rights legislation ever written by a veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan.
And the resistance was real. More than 1,000 retired military officers signed a letter urging President Obama to keep the status quo. Some of them got in my face in private settings; many actively worked for my opponent.
They insisted--falsely--that repeal would break the all-volunteer force. Others in the Pentagon warned that changing the policy mid-war would hurt morale. I incredulously asked them, _why, if our toughest military allies like the UK, Australia, and Israel allowed their military personnel to serve openly without any issue, then why did they think our US troops weren 't as professional as our allies? _
Even **Colin Powell** , who had once helped introduce Don't Ask, Don't Tell __ in the 90s, acknowledged by 2009 that _" a lot has changed"_ and the policy was overdue for repeal. Our then Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, Mike Mullen, spoke out in favor of the repeal, calling it an integrity issue. He was right.
In 2010, Congress answered. The Murphy Amendment passed in the House, then the Senate, and we finally repealed Don't Ask, Don't Tell. President Obama signed it into law. We even got over a dozen Republicans to vote for repeal.
It remains one of the proudest moments of my life. Because patriotism isn't about maintaining unjust traditions. It's about having the courage to make this country better, not just for some of us, but for all of us.
## A decade later, look around.
LGBTQ Americans serve openly in every branch of the military. (Though transgender servicemembers face challenges from the current administration)
Today, there's members of Congress, military generals, titans in business like the CEO of Apple, and countless others who excel because of the content of their character, their drive & performance. They just happen to be gay. And now, as a society, they can legally serve openly in their respective fields without having to hide who they are.
Pride flags fly from U.S. embassies, military bases, and statehouses across the country.
Progress that once felt impossible is now, quite literally, flying over the institutions of American power. It's about having pride in our country, that while still imperfect, strives to create a "more perfect union" as written in our Constitution--the blueprint of our democracy.
When I served in the Obama administration, I worked alongside Eric Fanning, who became the first openly gay Secretary of the Army. His leadership was powerful, not because of his identity, but because of his integrity. (By the way, we hit recruitment goals then that we haven't hit since.)
Eric's role in Army leadership stands in direct contrast to stories like Alan Turing, a British war hero who helped defeat the Nazis only to be chemically castrated by his own government for being gay. Absolutely heartbreaking.
But progress has a pattern in this country: it never goes unchallenged.
## **Two steps forward, one step back**
Just days ago, Defense Secretary [Pete Hegseth announced that the U.S. Navy was stripping Harvey Milk's name off a naval ship.](https://substack.com/redirect/a6cd78ee-56be-4063-8bd7-ae6dc577247c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The USNS Harvey Milk was a fleet replenishment ship, christened in 2021, the first Navy vessel ever named after an openly gay person.
Hegseth, citing a desire to _" take the politics out of ship naming,"_ announced that the ship would be renamed after Oscar V. Peterson, a Medal of Honor recipient from World War II. And just to add insult to injury, the announcement came during Pride Month.
It should be further noted that Milk wasn't just a gay rights icon. He was a distinguished Navy veteran who served during the Korean War as a diving instructor and on a submarine rescue ship until the military discovered he was gay and forced him out with an "other than honorable" discharge. After being thrown out of the Navy, he served with distinction as California's first openly gay elected official until he was assasinated in 1978.
In 2009, President Obama posthumously awarded Milk the Presidential Medal of Freedom. Naming a ship after him was part of that overdue recognition.
***
In retrospect, when the marriage equality decision in _Obergefell_ ruling came in, declaring "love is love," we didn't know what was around the corner. I wrote an _amicus curiae_ brief in that Supreme Court case with other military leaders. We won, and that historic ruling ironically came 10 days after Donald Trump descended that escalator and announced his campaign for president. Little did we know that, in hindsight, it was like one era closed as another was waiting in the wings.
And yet, despite it all, America remains a country capable of changing and righting wrongs
Even with the fear of the Supreme Court's super conservative majority, we got decisions like _Bostock v. Clayton County_ (2020), which finally ensured workplace protections for LGBTQ people in all 50 states. (I know, many were surprised you could still be fired in half the country for being gay in 2020). We had a high school teacher here in Bucks County, PA, fired only because he was gay; literally for no other reason.
In this landmark Supreme Court decision, Justice Neil Gorsuch, a Trump appointee, wrote the majority opinion. The ruling said that Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, which bans employment discrimination "because of sex," also protects employees from discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity.
The ruling was 6-3, and Gorsuch's opinion was incredibly straightforward. He wrote:
> An employer who fires an individual merely for being gay or transgender defies the law.
The fight for equality didn't end with _Obergefell._ It didn't end with the repeal of _Don 't Ask, Don't Tell._ It didn't end with _Bostock._ And it won't end just because a few more rainbow flags fly from embassies or bases or Capitol Hill.
Because if the past ten years have taught us anything, it's that every step toward freedom will be met with a push to turn back.
But here's the thing about America, we don't go back.
We move forward. Sometimes imperfectly. Sometimes painfully. But forward nonetheless.
Pride is patriotism for all Americans, LGBTQ people and allies alike - and the most American thing any of us can do is to make sure this country lives up to its own promise of freedom and justice for all. It's time for all of us to continue fighting the good fight.
-- Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

clean_body: What 10 Years of Marriage Equality Teaches Us About America | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What 10 Years of Marriage Equality Teaches Us About America | | | Jul 1 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Gabriel Bouys/AFP via Getty Images Last week marked ten years since the Supreme Court case Obergefell v. Hodges made marriage equality the law of the land. When the White House lit up in rainbow colors, it felt like the country had turned a page. The last ten years brought the most transformational social and political change of the 21st century. From Don't Ask, Don't Tell to the Rainbow Wave When I first served in the U.S. Army, the policy was simple and cruel: Don 't Ask, Don't Tell. You could wear the uniform. You could fight and die for your country. But you couldn't tell the truth about who you were. I saw the damage firsthand. Brilliant & tough soldiers--more than 13,000 of them--were forced out. In Baghdad, Iraq, in 138-degree heat, we didn't have enough Arabic speakers because we threw some of them out for being gay. As a straight combat vet who went on to serve in Congress, I wasn't going to play it safe. I wasn't going to look the other way while this injustice continued--not even after winning my race by just 0.6%, as only the third Democrat ever elected to represent Bucks County's First Congressional District. Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. I'll never forget the heartbreaking. He told me that he was sitting there at 3 a.m., in his barracks with a 9mm in his hand, losing hope as he was contemplating suicide. Not because of the Taliban. Not because of combat stress. But because he was gay. And under Don't Ask, Don't Tell, he couldn't turn to his commander, his battle buddies, or even the chaplain--for fear he'd be discharged. " The reason I'm not going to take my life, he wrote, " is because I know there's an Iraq War veteran named Patrick Murphy fighting for me. Please, sir. Keep fighting. We're counting on you." By the time I came to Congress, I knew this couldn't stand. That's why I wrote the bill that overturned Don't Ask, Don't Tell. In 2009, I launched the national "Voices of Honor" tour alongside gay, lesbian, and straight service members. We traveled the country sharing their stories, making the case that "we cannot afford to wait any longer." Our military was stretched thin in Iraq and Afghanistan, and yet we were still kicking out qualified, courageous people simply because of who they loved. I literally talked to every member of Congress--both Democrat and Republican--about repealing this wrong. When I introduced the bill to repeal Don't Ask, Don't Tell, it was the first major piece of LGBTQ civil rights legislation ever written by a veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan. And the resistance was real. More than 1,000 retired military officers signed a letter urging President Obama to keep the status quo. Some of them got in my face in private settings; many actively worked for my opponent. They insisted--falsely--that repeal would break the all-volunteer force. Others in the Pentagon warned that changing the policy mid-war would hurt morale. I incredulously asked them, why, if our toughest military allies like the UK, Australia, and Israel allowed their military personnel to serve openly without any issue, then why did they think our US troops weren 't as professional as our allies? Even Colin Powell , who had once helped introduce Don't Ask, Don't Tell in the 90s, acknowledged by 2009 that " a lot has changed" and the policy was overdue for repeal. Our then Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, Mike Mullen, spoke out in favor of the repeal, calling it an integrity issue. He was right. In 2010, Congress answered. The Murphy Amendment passed in the House, then the Senate, and we finally repealed Don't Ask, Don't Tell. President Obama signed it into law. We even got over a dozen Republicans to vote for repeal. It remains one of the proudest moments of my life. Because patriotism isn't about maintaining unjust traditions. It's about having the courage to make this country better, not just for some of us, but for all of us. A decade later, look around. LGBTQ Americans serve openly in every branch of the military. (Though transgender servicemembers face challenges from the current administration) Today, there's members of Congress, military generals, titans in business like the CEO of Apple, and countless others who excel because of the content of their character, their drive & performance. They just happen to be gay. And now, as a society, they can legally serve openly in their respective fields without having to hide who they are. Pride flags fly from U.S. embassies, military bases, and statehouses across the country. Progress that once felt impossible is now, quite literally, flying over the institutions of American power. It's about having pride in our country, that while still imperfect, strives to create a "more perfect union" as written in our Constitution--the blueprint of our democracy. When I served in the Obama administration, I worked alongside Eric Fanning, who became the first openly gay Secretary of the Army. His leadership was powerful, not because of his identity, but because of his integrity. (By the way, we hit recruitment goals then that we haven't hit since.) Eric's role in Army leadership stands in direct contrast to stories like Alan Turing, a British war hero who helped defeat the Nazis only to be chemically castrated by his own government for being gay. Absolutely heartbreaking. But progress has a pattern in this country: it never goes unchallenged. Two steps forward, one step back Just days ago, Defense Secretary The USNS Harvey Milk was a fleet replenishment ship, christened in 2021, the first Navy vessel ever named after an openly gay person. Hegseth, citing a desire to " take the politics out of ship naming," announced that the ship would be renamed after Oscar V. Peterson, a Medal of Honor recipient from World War II. And just to add insult to injury, the announcement came during Pride Month. It should be further noted that Milk wasn't just a gay rights icon. He was a distinguished Navy veteran who served during the Korean War as a diving instructor and on a submarine rescue ship until the military discovered he was gay and forced him out with an "other than honorable" discharge. After being thrown out of the Navy, he served with distinction as California's first openly gay elected official until he was assasinated in 1978. In 2009, President Obama posthumously awarded Milk the Presidential Medal of Freedom. Naming a ship after him was part of that overdue recognition. * In retrospect, when the marriage equality decision in Obergefell ruling came in, declaring "love is love," we didn't know what was around the corner. I wrote an amicus curiae brief in that Supreme Court case with other military leaders. We won, and that historic ruling ironically came 10 days after Donald Trump descended that escalator and announced his campaign for president. Little did we know that, in hindsight, it was like one era closed as another was waiting in the wings. And yet, despite it all, America remains a country capable of changing and righting wrongs Even with the fear of the Supreme Court's super conservative majority, we got decisions like Bostock v. Clayton County (2020), which finally ensured workplace protections for LGBTQ people in all 50 states. (I know, many were surprised you could still be fired in half the country for being gay in 2020). We had a high school teacher here in Bucks County, PA, fired only because he was gay; literally for no other reason. In this landmark Supreme Court decision, Justice Neil Gorsuch, a Trump appointee, wrote the majority opinion. The ruling said that Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, which bans employment discrimination "because of sex," also protects employees from discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. The ruling was 6-3, and Gorsuch's opinion was incredibly straightforward. He wrote: An employer who fires an individual merely for being gay or transgender defies the law. The fight for equality didn't end with Obergefell. It didn't end with the repeal of Don 't Ask, Don't Tell. It didn't end with Bostock. And it won't end just because a few more rainbow flags fly from embassies or bases or Capitol Hill. Because if the past ten years have taught us anything, it's that every step toward freedom will be met with a push to turn back. But here's the thing about America, we don't go back. We move forward. Sometimes imperfectly. Sometimes painfully. But forward nonetheless. Pride is patriotism for all Americans, LGBTQ people and allies alike - and the most American thing any of us can do is to make sure this country lives up to its own promise of freedom and justice for all. It's time for all of us to continue fighting the good fight. -- Patrick The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter. Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. \- Honorable Patrick J. Murphy** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Patrick J. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The night shift
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In the Marine Corps, falling asleep at your post is one of the worst things you can do. You sleep in turns. You watch over your buddies while they rest, and they do the same.
#

In the Marine Corps, falling asleep at your post is one of the worst things you can do.
You sleep in turns. You watch over your buddies while they rest, and they do the same for you. Falling asleep during your watch betrays the trust of your fellow Marines. Puts everyone at risk when they depend on you the most.
I bring this up because we’ve had some late nights in the Senate recently. I’ve heard some complaining among my colleagues about that. But the people of my state put me in a position of trust, and I am not going to betray that trust.
Millions of people could lose their health care, their food stamps, even their jobs if the GOP passes Trump’s budget. They are depending on us right now. Arizona sent me here to fight, and that’s what I’m going to do.
I’m supposed to be on paternity leave right now, but instead I just brought my newborn Cooper on the floor of the Senate. There is nowhere I’d rather be than defending the people of this country, and now is no time to give up.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- Big Bad Betrayal
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors, For the past 24 hours, I have been on the Senate floor with my Democratic colleagues fighting back against Trump's 'Big Bad Bill'. This morning, Republicans finally mustered the votes to pass this inhumane piece of legislation. It's a callous bill that will rip health care and food assistance away from millions of Americans. And let us not forget that the people who supported this bill all have health care paid for by taxpayers. They never have to worry about being uninsured, but they seemed to have no problem making sure some of our most vulnerable, including children, will no longer have access to the care they need. All of this was so that Donald Trump can give massive tax breaks to his billionaire friends. It's a betrayal of working class Americans who represent the backbone of our nation. Trump and his enablers have claimed this bill will indeed help working class people. It's not true, and I can prove it. In fact, in the dead of night, I introduced an [amendment](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15531.10048839.5501864.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1939888166351081924&redir_log=746161024929333) to prohibit any individual making more than $10 million from receiving tax cuts. If Republicans are so serious about focusing on working class people, they'd vote with me. But of course, Republicans shot it down. Passing that amendment could have prevented millions of Americans from losing their health insurance. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15531.10048839.5501864.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1939888166351081924&redir_log=746161024929333) I also filed amendments to protect SNAP benefits, provide tax breaks for firefighters, and protect civil rights in schools. None were allowed into the bill. The bill now goes over to the House, and while today's defeat may feel demoralizing, we cannot disengage. Please know that I will continue to fight tooth and nail for Marylanders, no matter the odds. We all owe it to ourselves and our families to remain in this fight. It's not over yet. The arc of the moral universe is long, but you are the gravity that bends it toward justice. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[exposed woke Democrat witness, Dr. Shaun Harper](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , during a House Committee hearing on DEI hiring practices, for caring strangely a lot about race and harboring divisive ideas that seemed to support racial discrimination in the workplace.
This was just brutal...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Do you believe that America should be a colorblind society?" Gill asked the professor. "For instance, should people be treated differently based on their race?"
Harper just stared blankly at Gill, without producing an answer.
**["It's just a yes or no question..." Gill said.](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"It's not a yes or no question," Harper countered. "As I said in my testimony, America has not done right by indigenous people, by black people, by Asian American and pacific islander people... I do not believe that white people are the only qualified people for jobs."
**["I didn't say that, nobody said that!"](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Gill fired back. "Should race be considered in employee hiring practices, yes, or no? And you're not going to intimidate me by slandering me as a racist!"
"I didn't call you a racist?!" Harper said.
Gill decided to proceed as if he answered 'yes' to the simple question, "I'll take that as a yes. Which race do you think should be preferred?"
"I do not think that a single race should be preferred!" Harper said, growing more frustrated by the congressman.
Gill doesn't let him off the hook, watch the tense exchange here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe46519-1b26-4295-82d1-e32a84ea1d01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/ec288aa0-664a-4bc9-ae41-0421039318c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump threatens to turn DOGE against Musk, examining his extensive government subsidies
President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that Elon Musk **["may get more subsidy than any human being in history"](https://substack.com/redirect/c7e774d2-c3ba-4559-a2aa-ab0b3b7856ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and warned that without government support, there would be "no more rocket launches, satellites, or electric car production."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c7e774d2-c3ba-4559-a2aa-ab0b3b7856ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump proposed turning DOGE against its former leader to examine Musk's subsidies** \- Despite Musk previously leading the Department of Government Efficiency, Trump suggested having DOGE "take a good, hard, look" at Musk's government funding, claiming there would be "BIG MONEY TO BE SAVED" by cutting his subsidies.
* **The threat came after Musk renewed harsh criticism of Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill"** \- Musk called the massive spending legislation "utterly insane" and "political suicide," warning it would "destroy millions of jobs" and cause "immense strategic harm," while threatening to primary Republicans who supported it despite campaigning on spending cuts.
* **The dispute reflects the ongoing fallout between the former allies over fiscal policy** \- Musk left his DOGE role on May 29 after 130 days, with their relationship deteriorating over disagreements about the spending bill, though Trump has suggested reconciliation is still possible after Musk's earlier apology for endorsing the president's impeachment.

* * *
# Elon Musk hits Trump right back, threatens to support biggest GOP advisory...
Elon Musk **[announced he would back Rep. Thomas Massie's](https://substack.com/redirect/9dfc8013-0c06-4d38-91aa-da79a244a718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 2026 reelection campaign, directly opposing President Donald Trump's vow to defeat the Kentucky Republican.
* **Musk responded "Me"** to a post asking who would support Massie, escalating his feud with Trump who has called Massie a "loser" and "Third Rate Congressman."
* **Massie has been a vocal opponent of Trump's key legislative priorities and foreign policy** \- The 54-year-old libertarian-leaning congressman has opposed Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill" and condemned the U.S. strikes on Iran as unconstitutional, while teaming up with a Democrat on a bipartisan war powers resolution to prevent U.S. involvement in the Israel-Iran conflict.
* **The Musk-Trump feud intensified after disagreements over the massive spending bill** \- Their conflict erupted when Musk called Trump's domestic policy legislation "utterly insane" and "political suicide," prompting Trump to threaten using DOGE to investigate Musk's government subsidies and warning he might have to "close up shop and head back home to South Africa."

* * *

body:
4th of July Weekend Upcoming 🇺🇸

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/19173171a2ec/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Morning,
This week, Rob was in our nation’s capital, fighting for Northeastern Pennsylvania last week. While the Senate is making changes to the One Big Beautiful Bill, you can trust that Rob will vote for what’s best for all of us in NEPA. You’ll continue to hear lies from radical Democrats, but we will not cut anyone from programs who are US citizens and actually qualify for them.
Rob was able to come back for the weekend and spend some time in PA-08! He went to Jeff Fuhse’s “Thank God I’m Alive Party” on Saturday. Jeff is a constituent from Pike County who was hit by a car and was legally dead. Jeff wound up waking up in the morgue and was given great medical care to recover. Now, Jeff hosts a party, celebrating his second chance at life. Rob loves connecting with the people he represents and hearing stories like Jeff’s.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | This week, Rob announced $11 million in federal funding for Head Start programs in Luzerne and Lackawanna Counties. The grants will help provide early childhood education, healthcare, nutrition, and family support services to children and families across the region. Rob is committed to prioritizing Early Childhood Education, giving the next generation the tools to break into the 22nd century, the tools to succeed.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=c9ef3d7bec&e=131e83a3c2)
| The Congressman also invited Sgt. Joseph Drake (US Army Rangers Ret.) to the United States Capitol to accept the Congressional Gold Medal on behalf of all WWII Army Rangers. Sgt. Drake is from our District and is truly an inspiration to us all.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a1ee45ffa9&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Southside Floral Shop in Scranton. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

Dear Peter,
---
This is the most personal letter I’ve ever written.
---
I’m writing to you not as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as an 80-year-old man – a grandfather and a patriot – staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed was right.
---
I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all.
---
_Or so I thought..._
---
**...But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
They think they’ve finally got me! Left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**

3,000 left-wing activists filled Dickies Arena this weekend in the heart of North Texas.

And leading the parade?

**Bernie Sanders. Robert Francis “ _Beto_ ” O’Rourke. Greg Casar. The Communist All-Stars!**

They didn’t come to enjoy the barbecue. **They came to FLIP this seat.**

**I represent one of the most competitive districts in Texas — and the radical left knows that if they can knock off a conservative like me, they can start tipping Texas blue for good.**

**And with our end-of-quarter deadline just _days_ away, I need you to step up and help me hold the line.**

I’ll be honest — the Democrats are pouring millions into seats like mine to try to erase the gains we made in 2024. They’re organizing, they’re fundraising, and they’re targeting us hard.

We can’t wait until the Fall to fight back.

**We draw the line right here in Texas.**

And we draw it today.

– Beth Van Duyne

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**UNT Dallas, UNTHSC name sole finalists for president,** " Dallas Morning News' **Talia Richman** - "UNT Dallas and the UNT Health Science Center will soon have new university leaders.

System Chancellor **Michael R. Williams** named sole finalists for the positions: **Warren von Eschenbach** was tapped to permanently take over the UNT Dallas school while **Kirk Calhoun** was picked for the Fort Worth-based Health Science Center.

Both were interim leaders before the University of North Texas System regents unanimously selected them as sole finalists during a special meeting.

"I am confident they will continue to serve with distinction -- fostering academic excellence, driving innovation, and serving the students and communities entrusted to our care," Williams [said in a Friday letter.](https://substack.com/redirect/2ff6fe0d-b893-4a87-ad17-bbb098293b9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/cb5377bf-fa58-47b8-9de6-2353a5657ce7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Since April 2024, von Eschenbach has served as UNT Dallas' interim president. He launched the university's first Center for Innovation in Teaching and Learning and pushed strategies to grow enrollment, officials said. He has more than a decade of experience in various university leadership roles.

He will succeed **Bob Mong** , who retired after leading the southern Dallas-area school for nine years. Mong joined the university after a long career in journalism that included serving as editor of _The Dallas Morning News._
[ BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/cb5377bf-fa58-47b8-9de6-2353a5657ce7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Calhoun has more than three decades of experience in medicine and higher education leadership. He's held the interim role at the UNTHSC since January, following his retirement as president of the University of Texas at Tyler.

He began his tenure as the Fort Worth-based health science center was under scrutiny over a now-suspended program's handling of unclaimed bodies.

An investigation by NBC News found the UNTHSC's Willed Body Program routinely used bodies for research or training without consent or approval from surviving family members.

In January, the system's regents accepted the resignation of former president **Sylvia Trent-Adams** by "mutual agreement."" [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/3536a8bf-76fb-47dc-802d-37a6483bec92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "UNT Dallas, UNTHSC name sole finalists for president, " Dallas Morning News' Talia Richman - "UNT Dallas and the UNT Health Science Center will soon have new university leaders. System Chancellor Michael R. Williams named sole finalists for the positions: Warren von Eschenbach was tapped to permanently take over the UNT Dallas school while Kirk Calhoun was picked for the Fort Worth-based Health Science Center. Both were interim leaders before the University of North Texas System regents unanimously selected them as sole finalists during a special meeting. "I am confident they will continue to serve with distinction -- fostering academic excellence, driving innovation, and serving the students and communities entrusted to our care," Williams Since April 2024, von Eschenbach has served as UNT Dallas' interim president. He launched the university's first Center for Innovation in Teaching and Learning and pushed strategies to grow enrollment, officials said. He has more than a decade of experience in various university leadership roles. He will succeed Bob Mong , who retired after leading the southern Dallas-area school for nine years. Mong joined the university after a long career in journalism that included serving as editor of The Dallas Morning News. Calhoun has more than three decades of experience in medicine and higher education leadership. He's held the interim role at the UNTHSC since January, following his retirement as president of the University of Texas at Tyler. He began his tenure as the Fort Worth-based health science center was under scrutiny over a now-suspended program's handling of unclaimed bodies. An investigation by NBC News found the UNTHSC's Willed Body Program routinely used bodies for research or training without consent or approval from surviving family members. In January, the system's regents accepted the resignation of former president Sylvia Trent-Adams by "mutual agreement."" Remembering God's Providence Throughout America's History

Some would say America’s existence is a miracle. Its founding documents inspired and laid the foundation for a one-of-a-kind
experiment.

>From the Revolutionary War to the Space Race, our nation was bathed in daily prayer throughout our 249-year history. Our founders
credited its success to our Creator, and countless captivating episodes of divine intervention are documented, though rarely
shared. This week, we're revisiting 5 miracles in America's history.

To commemorate Independence Day, we are sharing a military mom's journey that led her to write inspiring, patriotic books for the
whole family.

Author Sarah Doran knows what it is like to grow up in a military family, and she witnessed the sacrifices it entails. As a U.S.
Army aviation veteran, she also knows firsthand what it is like to serve. Sarah shares those experiences in books about military

clean_body: As we prepare to celebrate Independence Day, we have resources for the whole family. Inspiring patriotic books and powerful history lessons! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] July 1, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Remembering God's Providence Throughout America's History Some would say America’s existence is a miracle. Its founding documents inspired and laid the foundation for a one-of-a-kind experiment. From the Revolutionary War to the Space Race, our nation was bathed in daily prayer throughout our 249-year history. Our founders credited its success to our Creator, and countless captivating episodes of divine intervention are documented, though rarely shared. This week, we're revisiting 5 miracles in America's history. Read the Blog [] Military Mom Shares New Book Series Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] To commemorate Independence Day, we are sharing a military mom's journey that led her to write inspiring, patriotic books for the whole family. Author Sarah Doran knows what it is like to grow up in a military family, and she witnessed the sacrifices it entails. As a U.S. Army aviation veteran, she also knows firsthand what it is like to serve. Sarah shares those experiences in books about military families that inspire patriotism. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: FWD: Please, add your name to stop more tax cuts for billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw the update I sent around.
---
Senate Republicans are trying to ram through their Big, Ugly Bill, which would fund a massive tax cut for billionaires by making health care more expensive for working people.
**That’s why I’m counting on your help to send a loud and clear message that everyday Americans do _not_ support tax cuts for billionaires. So if you haven’t already, will you please sign my petition to oppose the GOP’s billionaire tax cut agenda?**
**Here's the link to add your name:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-gop-budget-bill-pet-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110660186/554932281/1679700385?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk5560-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5560-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzA4OTM4Zi04ODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuST7zOJUbgoUL25SXtW2tajic1b-_JG9n5NHJ3UbQc=&emci=003e161c-cc55-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2308938f-8856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**
Thank you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Raphael Warnock**
Subject: Trump and the GOP’s priorities
---
| | |
---
I’m outraged, friend.
Senate Republicans rolled out their own version of Trump’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” – proposing even _bigger_ cuts to health care.
And on the tax front, guess what they proposed?
Tax cuts for billionaires.
That’s right: The GOP is trying to pass a budget bill that would rob up to 16 million Americans of their health care and raise costs on virtually every American – all to help billionaires get richer.
Why are they doing this? Well, in short: Because they think they can. Their bet is that they can deliver a windfall to the special interests who fund their campaigns – all without facing any political consequences.
**I need your help to prove them wrong. It’s time to send a powerful message to Washington Republicans that the American people _overwhelmingly_ oppose more tax giveaways to billionaires. That’s why I’m asking directly:**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Thank you for stepping up
body:
We had ground to make up, and we did it.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)
Hi Peter, it’s Wes Moore.
Just a few days ago, I told you we were starting from behind.
Coming out of Maryland’s fundraising freeze, we had ground to make up, and a critical end-of-quarter deadline coming fast.
**Well, thanks to you, we closed the gap last night.** We’re moving into the next quarter with momentum and purpose.
This team never backs down from a challenge. You’ve shown that when the stakes are high, you’re right there with us.
This movement is how we’ll keep fighting for work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander. _That is how we’ll win._
**Thank you.**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250701-1?refcode=em-20250701-1&refcode2=255_1086043_qZbXpR&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)
P.S. If you're ready to keep this energy going into the summer, I’d be grateful for your continued support. **[Grassroots donations to emails like this one have a direct impact on what we're able to accomplish.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250701-1?refcode=em-20250701-1&refcode2=255_1086043_qZbXpR&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250701-1&t=2&refcode2=255_1086043_qZbXpR&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=255%2E1086043%2EqZbXpR)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

body:
I couldn’t do this without your support.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110664383/554938867/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250701Thanks_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzU5ZGQwYi04YzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xRESge6Tt8k4Q4gdIRvSz1BQlAMiA6WyWFBZkpgIV40=) Peter,

I couldn’t do this work without your support. Thanks to you, we hit our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and are a step closer to being able to hold Republicans accountable for their backward agenda.

With Trump’s Big Beautiful Betrayal, Republicans are actively working to make life more difficult for hardworking Americans. From laying off thousands of federal employees in order to replace them with Trump loyalists to slashing critical programs that people depend on to ensure they are healthy and can put food on their tables to dismantling our democracy at every turn, it’s clear where their priorities lie. With you by my side, I vow to fight back in every way that I can.

Thank you so much for your support.

Onward,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING this fight >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91472?t=6&akid=20441%2E878179%2EazXdxI) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already going after him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91472?t=7&akid=20441%2E878179%2EazXdxI) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91472?t=8&akid=20441%2E878179%2EazXdxI)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91472?t=9&akid=20441%2E878179%2EazXdxI) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91472?t=10&akid=20441%2E878179%2EazXdxI)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Plus you can complete the entire certification process online...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21594/6374453/0e6151278543be3a579ddfac2a9e1ad5bef0248e/ef7b69f70528eea602f4148dfc74951e93db5aa0)
---
| | |
---
_July 1st, 2025 at 07:04 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21594/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ef7b69f70528eea602f4148dfc74951e93db5aa0). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21594/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ef7b69f70528eea602f4148dfc74951e93db5aa0).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21594/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ef7b69f70528eea602f4148dfc74951e93db5aa0)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21594/6374453/0e6151278543be3a579ddfac2a9e1ad5bef0248e/ef7b69f70528eea602f4148dfc74951e93db5aa0)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: Help Us Hit Our Fundraising Deadline
body:
| | | Yesterday marked the end of our fundraising quarter, and we came up a bit short. I told the team to extend our deadline by a day and count what we raise today toward last quarter’s goal. We still have _**so**_ much work to do this year— 11 revivals all across Canada, and more worship in some of the biggest cities in America, including New York City, Chicago and Seattle! God’s not done with Let Us Worship, and we will faithfully trust and obey until our mission is complete! It’s why I sign all my emails, _“Till all hear”_ —my heart is for everyone to hear the saving words of the Gospel. As Matthew 24:14 says, _“And this Gospel of the kingdom will be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.”_ If you’d like to help with our extended end-of-quarter deadline, please consider supporting Let Us Worship [**HERE**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=8b47dd7c46a542f89cc69fc573e1f0b8&_e=j1x7r9tPD4xgnTTFkH0_FKAQVsO1NGm3WjcloSiiPPZ3dPhKH-z89szlU2BhE2TxjPizGGSv8iLdb-638KVJt3tD6sCdkQcuMk4LanU9t6o9H3vBn1JmV_2tlO5JKeTFn2PkZzMALMFM2YwARuvv1vYGKnWQICRuXW9MqOySmN5YHPTMki16uZ8iTe0fN7KpclLTh41veXuqaDZY6i1KALvsPG8TUBSjfLthSnxFvwCDN0vxX_S5gC0lpfxQyFJ8UqSZI_8i7psJCoAjq55mVXMpa6d8-FGJKRfx6BQfvbXkcI5vejX7MZ9lHoy6YARpVN6Vnog7J318iUNqXLdK4jE96OO_Ii_ECn7saybahgZ_7qrCv-aM6MJjGgCls0xJDFRmvgvXlPtVT_rb32zgEqs6rLJg2G6F6pKCE2suUEIjlMhj99cVuVLys7xABQAC) or by clicking one of the buttons below. _Till all hear,_ Sean

clean_body: | | | Yesterday marked the end of our fundraising quarter, and we came up a bit short. I told the team to extend our deadline by a day and count what we raise today toward last quarter’s goal. We still have so much work to do this year— 11 revivals all across Canada, and more worship in some of the biggest cities in America, including New York City, Chicago and Seattle! God’s not done with Let Us Worship, and we will faithfully trust and obey until our mission is complete! It’s why I sign all my emails, “Till all hear” —my heart is for everyone to hear the saving words of the Gospel. As Matthew 24:14 says, “And this Gospel of the kingdom will be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.” If you’d like to help with our extended end-of-quarter deadline, please consider supporting Let Us Worship or by clicking one of the buttons below. Till all hear, Sean \-------Forwarded message------- From: Sean Feucht Date: Monday, June 30, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: Help Us Hit Our Fundraising Deadline | | Dear Peter, This is Sean Feucht with an urgent message about tonight's fundraising deadline. Putting on a revival takes a massive effort—musicians, production, support staff, permits, and logistics—all without charging a cover fee. Will you stand with us and chip in today to help fund what’s next? Watch the update below ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | We’re able to offer these revivals for free because of supporters like you—an army of Believers pouring out prayer, time, and resources. But to keep it that way, we need your support before our fundraising deadline ends TONIGHT at midnight. | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63428?t=3&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o)
[**_Local librarians in are counting on[58] more Good Democrats to come to the rescue and add their names to this URGENT PETITION to save our libraries. Will you PLEASE sign on before midnight?_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63428?t=4&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o) | | [STAND WITH LIBRARIANS >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63428?t=5&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o)
---
Friend, we're stunned. Republicans across the country are BANNING books and trying to control our public libraries.

And now, the Supreme Court ruled that LQBTQ+ books can be BANNED in schools!!

**If we don 't take action now, this could really happen. And libraries in will be destroyed.**
**Librarians are fighting back against the efforts to ban books, but they can 't do it alone.**

[**_We need 2,500 signatures by midnight to stand with local librarians. Will you sign our petition to show your support?_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63428?t=6&akid=23178%2E4449941%2EEaZG3o)

body:

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: We just launched Organizing Summer
body:
---
Derek, First, we want to say **thank you.** Supporters like you helped us reach our end-of-quarter goal — and we couldn’t be more grateful. Now, we have some exciting news to share: We just launched Organizing Summer — a nationwide organizing effort to activate volunteers, register voters, and build Democratic power ahead of the 2025 elections and the 2026 midterms. While Trump and MAGA Republicans are trying to rip away health care and food assistance from millions to gift their billionaire backers a tax handout, Democrats are fighting back the best way we know how: _by organizing everywhere we can._ **[From voter registration events to town halls and community actions, we're hitting the ground running, and we need you with us. Sign up for our briefing today:](https://ak.democrats.org/go/16173?refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&t=1&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV)**
**[SIGN UP](https://ak.democrats.org/go/16173?refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&t=2&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV)** Whether you're a seasoned volunteer or just getting started, this summer is about meeting voters where they are — in living rooms, online forums, at concerts, county fairs, and everywhere in between. We'll give you the tools and training you need to have meaningful conversations, mobilize your community, and get people who are fed up with the Trump administration ready to vote out Republicans in 2025 and beyond. Let’s make this summer count. **[SIGN UP](https://ak.democrats.org/go/16173?refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&t=3&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV)** — The Democrats P.S. Organizing Summer is powered by grassroots supporters like you. [**If you’re able, chip in to help us register voters, train volunteers, and take on Republicans across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&amount=3&refcode2=3853_22930333_w_hTRV&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&refcode2=3853_22930333_w_hTRV&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250701_3853_do&refcode2=3853_22930333_w_hTRV&akid=3853%2E22930333%2Ew_hTRV)**
---
****

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: This can’t be right.
body:
This is a load of BS, Peter.**
**With what my father has been through and what Republicans face daily, it 's a damn miracle we're still standing. The Radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down, and I'm not just talking about the fake news media and their lies.**
**I 'm talking about the bought-out corrupt career politicians, the Deep State cronies, and the Radical Leftist lunatics who will stop at nothing to destroy everything we hold dear.**
**I can 't lie, they're coming for us, and they won't rest until they've taken away our freedom and our way of life. I'm sorry to be so blunt with you right now, but this needed your immediate attention.
My name is Donald Trump Jr., and I have been fighting alongside my father and strong America First Conservatives for a decade now. It's because of you that we are where we are today, but the radical left is out to destroy us.
[PUSH BACK AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT
PROTECT OUR WAY OF LIFE
](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/SyamT_Pt0KQ3nvqZ_GZg3f7sBJzkbd_SnY_il96sn4jVjgzXhk_IHTBm4tsUucgxfhdMzvCNd4m526VWBb3TGZR0y9YMBySttm9to0DI5EcqK8ynvleA_S34k5DiLAzZNdWm6ELDPiCtzvEedQlxPD7SobLmEvpJyEsgOsjs7iY8TTj9JYSpxvvNAtdKV_ZfEp2y2u4qEKzekxDVE5O8oSvAGav-a7itmHzekAFTLr1SFZ3Yg69ir3DYumSl367HTPYbmEmDW8PW69w3ZQ2IPsA56oD-idY_Ulz-5EwLRSnUee-G-yMRNLmu2NRGt2TPeKW4nrOsYAEeKRkzvJ9QzpWS9YnL-hWA0kFiW7AZCJvC_k1--d0qKMki51MbPNjVYZ7_tUaJzJR9Q9ud1wsAhH15Goqy7hqk_M6yVGcolPYbN4HMzvZUZggfT8PkrAAJwHvEe8dXhEZl2rmqgXX16GUVpB-tuopzOpJT15D1PZHwC3ziBsN4PswBvgompNzOB3-Uq0G_7Lux1d76yUBO6A6ZBWWEMlyrxCxWxDkrBg6Ejiv7XWbpiOEif7nS2aowylf48MY_QMjivvFhjYc-YpIieF_4Z1M86lhWsr4JKyqa-40ywhjDWukcybWRoOIlaJ4lo71yHEfgJ0KjwLizqgbGJbGu4GM8xIeH_SMSyQFI9DZbmaotyRA6A_hoeTpfs785qn5BZj2o0KId4jMJeSXBQk0HM8ZHxMu4_Ul84oenqXTM3Pr0yVbFV0IXM1Kc7ijN64aOWLd_imz27U97IpnDF-pFwkbkrMJcFCU5FFPK-ttXIi1ziLJOUTEcKUdyVynV/82TMXJ8-XawUhT6C07Z9YEl1qehVDp7I/10)
The time to act is now or never, because let's be honest... If you don't do something now, our country will never be able to recover. Our children, our grandchildren, and every generation after that will have to fix what we let the Liberal mob break.

clean_body: This is a load of BS, Peter. With what my father has been through and what Republicans face daily, it 's a damn miracle we're still standing. The Radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down, and I'm not just talking about the fake news media and their lies. I 'm talking about the bought-out corrupt career politicians, the Deep State cronies, and the Radical Leftist lunatics who will stop at nothing to destroy everything we hold dear. I can 't lie, they're coming for us, and they won't rest until they've taken away our freedom and our way of life. I'm sorry to be so blunt with you right now, but this needed your immediate attention. My name is Donald Trump Jr., and I have been fighting alongside my father and strong America First Conservatives for a decade now. It's because of you that we are where we are today, but the radical left is out to destroy us. The time to act is now or never, because let's be honest... If you don't do something now, our country will never be able to recover. Our children, our grandchildren, and every generation after that will have to fix what we let the Liberal mob break. Listen Peter, I appreciate your continued support. Our MAGA movement would be nowhere without you. I mean it. For America, Donald Trump Jr. | | | | | Paid for by Team Emmer, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Emmer for Congress and Electing Majority Making Effective Republicans (Emmer PAC) 824 S Milledge Avenue Suite 101 Athens, GA 30605 |

**__**
## **_OFFICIAL MEMORANDUM FOR_**
## **_TRUSTED TRUMP PATRIOTS_**

Patriot,

I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full.

We’ve accomplished a lot of great things in the last few weeks - many people are already saying our country has never been stronger.

To name some, but not all (there are too many to count!) of our accomplishments, we’ve seen....

Inflation? Lowest in four years.
Blue collar wages? Highest in sixty years. Border crossings? Historic lows.
Stock market? ALL TIME HIGHS
Iran’s nuclear program? ERASED

But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country.

Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. Had they not failed at such an incredible rate - I would say it's almost impressive!

But one thing is for sure - the more we win, the more ruthless, and determined they will grow.

AOC, one of the dumbest people in Congress, is already calling for my impeachment for a THIRD time.

And somehow she got almost eighty of her friends in Congress, all of whom suffering badly (terminally) from TDS **(TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME)** to go along with her.

**So as much as I’d love for us to put everything on cruise control, even just for a day to celebrate all we have accomplished, we simply DO NOT have the time, or luxury to do so - at least, not yet!

_We’re quickly approaching a critical moment in the midterm election cycle. And what happens in these final days of June will decide everything in the months to come._**

Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies and puppet masters, the liberal fake news media.

This is a battle I am fully confident we are ready for- and with your help today, we’ll have exactly what it takes to win it with ease & humiliate the Democrats once again.

Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU!

This midterm election cycle will be no different!

clean_body: I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. | | | | OFFICIAL MEMORANDUM FOR TRUSTED TRUMP PATRIOTS Patriot, I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. We’ve accomplished a lot of great things in the last few weeks - many people are already saying our country has never been stronger. To name some, but not all (there are too many to count!) of our accomplishments, we’ve seen.... Inflation? Lowest in four years. Blue collar wages? Highest in sixty years. Border crossings? Historic lows. Stock market? ALL TIME HIGHS Iran’s nuclear program? ERASED But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country. Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. Had they not failed at such an incredible rate - I would say it's almost impressive! But one thing is for sure - the more we win, the more ruthless, and determined they will grow. AOC, one of the dumbest people in Congress, is already calling for my impeachment for a THIRD time. And somehow she got almost eighty of her friends in Congress, all of whom suffering badly (terminally) from TDS (TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME) to go along with her. So as much as I’d love for us to put everything on cruise control, even just for a day to celebrate all we have accomplished, we simply DO NOT have the time, or luxury to do so - at least, not yet! We’re quickly approaching a critical moment in the midterm election cycle. And what happens in these final days of June will decide everything in the months to come. Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies and puppet masters, the liberal fake news media. This is a battle I am fully confident we are ready for- and with your help today, we’ll have exactly what it takes to win it with ease & humiliate the Democrats once again. Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU! This midterm election cycle will be no different! THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKRxJ7INarmWQlhuECY-2FBBrejM8WmGxf9TB-2BLg4-2FbAI7NBGhL9Q46pVrit3iMEx5jr9EpAlfbeEo9f79r5JM3iJpE-3DMZB4_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY8G2R4QLKYOFB0w-2Brhh7ZiDWNDlnyPuRjGOWJT1wNzQUciyNQZ37lUZYs6xsxYsHCN322piM9F6GOwZpj5wPgWrNQcKkKWKWYyjlxsKjqHrIgF2E5HSvSmQeF3n0EZ3YMPqC832HPkgXQdx4E0s8w3QcK-2BuHrZlHCV7KE1LBNPIdLqSGq9hVCDmZBGFLiiA4s)
---
Fellow activist,

We wanted to reach out and thank you for all of your support this past quarter. 2025 is shaping up to be a highly consequential election year, with critical local, municipal, and judicial positions on the ballot. That’s why we have been out in our community, engaging community members and eligible voters to ensure that they know what’s at stake in November. None of that would be possible without you.

We wanted to share a quick update on what our affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund, has been up to. This past month, in celebration of Juneteenth, team NPPEF was out in several locations across the Commonwealth assisting eligible Pennsylvanians to vote and engaging in meaningful conversations around this year’s local, municipal, and judicial elections.

**NPPEF was out at Juneteenth events in the following counties:**
---
* York
* Dauphin
* Monroe
* Allegheny
* Chester
* Montgomery

---
[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKRxJ7INarmWQlhuECY-2FBBrejM8WmGxf9TB-2BLg4-2FbAI7NBsc5BA2T2cD-2FPsWMA9rDJV0TaCwz1GOMYJIuImMyNexc-3DNJ2U_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY8G2R4QLKYOFB0w-2Brhh7ZiDWNDlnyPuRjGOWJT1wNzQWU4uPWNVZaPhNIzKylfnN-2FGWJstXsr3sp5dM0-2Br1tZVdYa01VCgQvfvWXzZTpLcbjLXKUFGL-2FBPegmBsB5yIFjjiUlbHqp2yeTisXfCcCh08TmtnS8oZVGkyAOoEywdml9CzQbBU-2Bjai1bH-2Fu8xRdU)
---
For us, Juneteenth will always be a day of celebration and advocacy, but our work does not end there. Team NPPEF was out across the Commonwealth, engaging historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and young voters to participate in the democratic process to achieve a more representative democracy. And, thanks to your support, we will continue to be out in our communities working to activate and mobilize voters ahead of the November elections.

**With you by our side, we are proud to continue our commitment to consistent year-round civic engagement, ensuring that Pennsylvanians have everything they need to make their voices heard in _every single_ election – and our work has never been more important. ** Thank you, Team NPP
---
_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, We wanted to reach out and thank you for all of your support this past quarter. 2025 is shaping up to be a highly consequential election year, with critical local, municipal, and judicial positions on the ballot. That’s why we have been out in our community, engaging community members and eligible voters to ensure that they know what’s at stake in November. None of that would be possible without you. We wanted to share a quick update on what our affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund, has been up to. This past month, in celebration of Juneteenth, team NPPEF was out in several locations across the Commonwealth assisting eligible Pennsylvanians to vote and engaging in meaningful conversations around this year’s local, municipal, and judicial elections. NPPEF was out at Juneteenth events in the following counties: York Dauphin Monroe Allegheny Chester Montgomery For us, Juneteenth will always be a day of celebration and advocacy, but our work does not end there. Team NPPEF was out across the Commonwealth, engaging historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and young voters to participate in the democratic process to achieve a more representative democracy. And, thanks to your support, we will continue to be out in our communities working to activate and mobilize voters ahead of the November elections. With you by our side, we are proud to continue our commitment to consistent year-round civic engagement, ensuring that Pennsylvanians have everything they need to make their voices heard in every single election – and our work has never been more important. Thank you, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O.
