name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: a hot dog 🌭
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I’m personally asking you to read this all the way through, Friend. | | |
---
| | | WOW, thank you so much for opening this email, Peter!!

Believe it or not, only 20-30% of people open emails from me. It really means a lot knowing that I've got you on my Team. _Even by opening and reading my messages, you are one of my top-tier grassroots supporters!_

Now that you're here, can you do me a small favor? _I 'm personally asking you to read this all the way through, Peter._

I'm going to be forward with you right now because I cannot stand bull***t emails; I'm going to ask you for a few dollars at the end of this. When you finish, if you don't think your $4.75 can make a _real_ difference, then I just want to say thanks for giving me a few minutes out of your day!

While about 25% of folks are even opening these emails, only 1% of them will chip in just a few dollars. And here's the problem; **I 'm relying on true conservatives to donate a few dollars when they're able to support me and my Team!**

**[If every single person reading this right now chipped in a couple of dollars, my Team and I would be able to keep up with the Democrats’ ludicrous fundraising numbers and soundly defend our country!](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/4IDxWXMpyVZuQSb0JUv7VcQRgtBQx20m0LIylsI1osE21SVeKEADrqtOxqUnn_5CW59Ejews0w5YhXZG6ILe9gFpa0GZafjlLBoITZqPD4EjTPhfQ5IyKsc4U2vU__wnQDKyrWmbxYVpf9xV5cWphejOEpKLRqZbTksS3qjASMQaQ-egQIUlVaFv8h9z0IokURvF22IBj4tQR6aJnTK4QJkvYJt4tOi4XGOpzKQFg57qPKYKh2HCVCmYI8MrQDcoi0wM_WdKQ-BJfYMPEEhgIPY91NjMK98nFzj8uciSfs4z4aIxi2Aau5cIKK0wmd0TPYhkeSUImXWEDRBhY1wHDnC2zFE8_GNiMlWZIu9eoOu7hE1xMWJkHbe0cuh2MpwH2pp30tjq01b7Bz5NnS9Qv2hBQGN5BpwJAycR7pizNpUEQHdbS1DCQjxUwrmzbKkwu-d5dfksHDPSbxi18wDD96Z-hfR2d3kTSmpNAsrAYVTKGaeGDunzvBiJp2HSQ1Kzzic_mp9oVcQxAdf8i2dHCH3sQn7YB0QUrBAm3Z52tK4pDgnrvc3ll7B8Vq5SRVL8u5l8SgWoK2bhPjltEIYdvqBslfBN8DQXm5xn6msp-MzQS9Jujf7htAtQbYKuy9Df1EOkv1yaNoR8PDrAoLSwBgr8cvSoT4c_h765YzeklH83KSlUY3JaqIr5041XvZcf-uz428S1_0f0puJDOKlnpXRzVKIKxMqN2QxVrDHD98Opr20U2Pv8_D4X1aU4x3TvgrFakjaX5bCoezPCYux6JicYET6B7BDCSRM3gmGGOGQw26VrKG8OO5bitzqC_0KE4TA4PLXvqw/h6ebsMj8OJBAjDgTibJG-2vVetcZyRQ1/10 "If every single person reading this right now chipped in a couple of dollars, my Team and I would be able to keep up with the Democrats’ ludicrous fundraising numbers and soundly defend our Republican House Majority!")**

**The hard truth is** that despite holding this seat and taking back our country in 2024, the Democrats are furious and going after us, and right now we don't have the funds to fend them off. clean_body: I’m personally asking you to read this all the way through, Friend. | | | | | | WOW, thank you so much for opening this email, Peter!! Believe it or not, only 20-30% of people open emails from me. It really means a lot knowing that I've got you on my Team. Even by opening and reading my messages, you are one of my top-tier grassroots supporters! Now that you're here, can you do me a small favor? I 'm personally asking you to read this all the way through, Peter. I'm going to be forward with you right now because I cannot stand bull*t emails; I'm going to ask you for a few dollars at the end of this. When you finish, if you don't think your $4.75 can make a real difference, then I just want to say thanks for giving me a few minutes out of your day! While about 25% of folks are even opening these emails, only 1% of them will chip in just a few dollars. And here's the problem; I 'm relying on true conservatives to donate a few dollars when they're able to support me and my Team! "If every single person reading this right now chipped in a couple of dollars, my Team and I would be able to keep up with the Democrats’ ludicrous fundraising numbers and soundly defend our Republican House Majority!" The hard truth is that despite holding this seat and taking back our country in 2024, the Democrats are furious and going after us, and right now we don't have the funds to fend them off. Now, if we're going to keep them off our backs and strengthen our country, conservatives like me are going to need all the help we can get from loyal grassroots supporters. The Democrats have billionaires and Hollywood liberals who can fill their pockets at the drop of a hat. But I 'm counting on regular Americans like you who can give a few dollars here and there to help us fend off the Left and fix our country! "So today – even though I HATE asking you to part with your hard-earned dollar – I hope you’ll understand why it’s so critical that you chip in $4.75 – or the price of one ALL-AMERICAN BEEF, Chicago-style hotdog!" | | "🌭CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A CHICAGO-STYLE HOTDOG🌭" | | | "DONATE $4.75 TODAY!" | | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | "Chicago-style hot dogs" Look, I love a good Chicago-style hotdog with a side of fries and maybe an ice-cold beer too. These are the simple pleasures of life. But the fact is if we 're going to keep these radicals off our backs and fix the damage they have done to our country, every Republican MUST get involved! The liberal elite are terrified of what I 'm asking you to do. They know as well as I do; if every regular American chips in and helps out real conservatives, the Democrat career politicians and their last ditch efforts to destroy us and our country areTOAST! | | "DONATE TODAY!" I hope this helps make sense of why I'm asking you to donate $4.75. I really appreciate you reading this email all the way through, Peter! I'm so thankful to have such strong conservatives like you on my Team. -Derrick Van Orden | "Derrick Van Orden" | | | "SUPPORT DERRICK AND THE TEAM TODAY>>" | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, Peter! It's Retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden. I'm in the tightest race in the country and I want to make sure I can update my top supporters on where my Team and I stand. Please add my email, team@email.vanorden4congress.com, to your address book to make sure you receive important messages from me and my Team! Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. | | Patriot, I was on the ground in Los Angeles—glass shattering overhead, people struck by debris, American flags burning, and police under attack. I felt a sense of menace and lawlessness. I couldn’t contain my frustration. **You don’t see these scenes in other states.** This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design. This is the result of fifteen years of one-party Democratic rule, creating an upside-down morality where those who do the wrong thing are rewarded while people who do the right thing are punished. Governor Newsom, Mayor Bass, and the local officials in Los Angeles have failed us. They let rioters run rampant while law-abiding Californians suffer. But there is hope. Californians want violent criminals removed from their communities, and they don’t want a government that allows riots. If we are ever going to win back California, it’s now while this is fresh in everyone’s minds. I’m running for governor to restore law and order, back our police, and make California golden again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m all in. Are you? **Here is how _you_ can help right now:**

clean_body: I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled.| | | | | | | Patriot, I was on the ground in Los Angeles—glass shattering overhead, people struck by debris, American flags burning, and police under attack. I felt a sense of menace and lawlessness. I couldn’t contain my frustration. You don’t see these scenes in other states. This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design. This is the result of fifteen years of one-party Democratic rule, creating an upside-down morality where those who do the wrong thing are rewarded while people who do the right thing are punished. Governor Newsom, Mayor Bass, and the local officials in Los Angeles have failed us. They let rioters run rampant while law-abiding Californians suffer. But there is hope. Californians want violent criminals removed from their communities, and they don’t want a government that allows riots. If we are ever going to win back California, it’s now while this is fresh in everyone’s minds. I’m running for governor to restore law and order, back our police, and make California golden again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m all in. Are you? Here is how you can help right now: California and our country deserve better leadership. Together, we can stop the chaos, expose the forces behind it, and hold Newsom and the democrats accountable. Steve Hilton Republican Candidate for Governor of California P.S. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. . Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in. | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. subject: Just one question for the 4th of July weekend

body:
Are you proud to be an American under President Trump’s leadership?

Friend,

This **Fourth****of****July **weekend, while millions of patriotic Americans celebrate our great country's freedom and strength, **Rep. Ilhan** **Omar** is busy trashing America.

She recently claimed the United States is becoming _**["one of the worst countries in the world"](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjp6io3dop0hdlrqrou6920dhm82q2h027j5o17g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "“one of the worst countries in the world”")**_ under President Trump.

_We couldn 't disagree more._

Under President Trump's bold leadership, America is entering a **Golden Age** of prosperity.

_**[Our economy is roaring](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg3mi2nd5koel9om50a3fh7bp6dvsrb0pv2aha1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "Our economy is roaring")**_
_**[Our borders are more secure than ever](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsf5jtqsipdse1mkoiv4k8fjkshl9p0hr79fbbe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "Our borders are more secure than ever")**_
_**[We're standing tall on the world stage](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpoii71e1mpbbv5d4afv1e63cbff0pv79bsduaso_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "We’re standing tall on the world stage")**_
_**[And we're Making America Healthy and Wealthy Again](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znj2069ved9elojepkjm9pp930937u1hhtti9clg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "And we’re Making America Healthy and Wealthy Again")**_

While the radical Left spreads hate and shame, we're here to say loud and proud: _**[WE LOVE THIS COUNTRY.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zigo2b0kc8ptf9juu3asdcm9glcckuskvjq5jlno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g6aob4chh2bs "WE LOVE THIS COUNTRY.")**_

That's why we're conducting a flash poll for TOP grassroots patriots: _**[Are you proud to be an American under Donald Trump's leadership? name: Sarah McBride
subject: Draconian. Dangerous. Deadly.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The Senate passed Trump’s cruel tax scam.
#
Team, I need to give you an urgent update:
**The Senate just passed Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill. Now, it’s heading back to the House.**
If this bill becomes law, it would result in the single largest evisceration of healthcare in American history.
Millions of Americans — including more than 50,000 of my neighbors in Delaware — would lose Medicaid coverage. Rural hospitals would close. Maternity wards, cancer clinics, and mental health centers would disappear. _All to partially fund tax breaks for billionaires._
**Let’s call it what it is: Draconian, dangerous, and deadly.**
That’s why I went on the House floor to sound the alarm, and it’s why I’m reaching out to you now — because the fight isn’t over. [**Will you pitch in $5 to help me organize, both inside and outside of Congress, to block Trump’s tax scam?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250701-1?refcode=em20250701-2148&amount=5&refcode2=2148_21716_9L9Hst&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)
**[Pitch In Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250701-1?refcode=em20250701-2148&refcode2=2148_21716_9L9Hst&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)**
When we talk about Medicaid, we’re talking about real people — neighbors who need chemo, expecting moms who need prenatal care, workers who need to see a doctor without going into crushing medical debt. And the GOP knows that.
But instead of investing in people, they’re pushing a cruel agenda that trades lives to make the ultra-rich even richer.
The good news is that it’s not too late to stop this bill in its tracks.
**I’m fighting like hell in Congress and building a grassroots campaign to match the scale of this moment. But that takes resources, people power, and urgency.**
So I’m asking again: [**Will you chip in today to help us meet this moment — and fight back with everything we’ve got?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250701-1?refcode=em20250701-2148&refcode2=2148_21716_9L9Hst&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250701-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250701-2148&refcode2=2148_21716_9L9Hst&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)**
Thank you. I'll have more updates soon.
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250701-1&t=1&refcode2=2148_21716_9L9Hst&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2148%2E21716%2E9L9Hst)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

---

_**Populism in the Big Apple: **_
**Unpacking Mamdani's New York City Mayoral Shockwave with Ruben Navarrette**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 20
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid are joined by columnist and commentator **Ruben Navarrette** to unpack the political earthquake in New York City. From Andrew Cuomo's downfall to **Zohran Mamdani's insurgent rise** , the trio dives deep into why Mamdani winning New York City's Democratic Primary isn't a left vs. right moment—**but a big win for populism**.

They explore how **early voting, outsider campaigns, and a growing anti-establishment sentiment** are redefining the electorate—and why Latino voters are at the heart of it. Plus, Ruben drops powerful reflections on **Mexican-American identity** in the age of mass deportations and viral resistance.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[As Trump Continues To Terrorize Los Angeles, the Question Remains: Who Are These Masked Men?](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=8892fab768&e=5bd167f239) By: Ruben Navarrette - Creators

[Trump administration live updates: Senate votes on Republican agenda bill amendments](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7df7937fd8&e=5bd167f239) By: NBC News

[New UCLA and ASU Report Highlights Latino Journalists’ Role in Fairer Pandemic Reporting](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b33069ff17&e=5bd167f239) By: UCLA

[At CPAC Latino, Salazar says give immigrants contributing to US a chance to stay](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b043a51a38&e=5bd167f239) By: Miami Herald

clean_body: Populism in the Big Apple: Unpacking Mamdani's New York City Mayoral Shockwave with Ruben Navarrette | Season 2025, Episode 20 | | | | | | | | | | | "Populism in the Big Apple: Unpacking Mamdani's New York City Mayoral Shockwave with Ruben Navarrette" Populism in the Big Apple: Unpacking Mamdani's New York City Mayoral Shockwave with Ruben Navarrette The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 20 | Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid are joined by columnist and commentator Ruben Navarrette to unpack the political earthquake in New York City. From Andrew Cuomo's downfall to Zohran Mamdani's insurgent rise , the trio dives deep into why Mamdani winning New York City's Democratic Primary isn't a left vs. right moment—but a big win for populism. They explore how early voting, outsider campaigns, and a growing anti-establishment sentiment are redefining the electorate—and why Latino voters are at the heart of it. Plus, Ruben drops powerful reflections on Mexican-American identity in the age of mass deportations and viral resistance. | | | | | Today's Headlines: By: Ruben Navarrette - Creators By: CBS News By: The New York Times By: The Great Transformation With Mike Madrid By: Pew Research Center By: Gothamist By: NBC News By: UCLA By: Irish Star By: Miami Herald By: The Great Transformation With Mike Madrid By: WJBC By: Daily Kos By: KSL News By: CNN By: Pew Research Center By: Yahoo! name: Independence Day Poll
subject: Just one question for the 4th of July weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
Are you proud to be an American under President Trump’s leadership?

Friend,

This **Fourth****of****July **weekend, while millions of patriotic Americans celebrate our great country's freedom and strength, **Rep. Ilhan** **Omar** is busy trashing America.

She recently claimed the United States is becoming _**["one of the worst countries in the world"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztvskv9ijjrjr9085bua997qen63bgqcndhhq8q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "“one of the worst countries in the world”")**_ under President Trump.

_We couldn 't disagree more._

Under President Trump's bold leadership, America is entering a **Golden Age** of prosperity.

_**[Our economy is roaring](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjge1kpcssk9g2p7646mmhauj3bbnindjp1732mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "Our economy is roaring")**_
_**[Our borders are more secure than ever](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq65lg18mgivh4mo4j32fdcm11or23lk85ugikog_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "Our borders are more secure than ever")**_
_**[We're standing tall on the world stage](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0c3kv8m2ujm8nu1la744es38s1r5p35aadk6hj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "We’re standing tall on the world stage")**_
_**[And we're Making America Healthy and Wealthy Again](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zak67s8spoeld8fh3h5q5t4rutfnf509uf2b3jo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "And we’re Making America Healthy and Wealthy Again")**_

While the radical Left spreads hate and shame, we're here to say loud and proud: _**[WE LOVE THIS COUNTRY.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7h12fvtcf18l126bobmp6br1g1f33rmhibtbv0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "WE LOVE THIS COUNTRY.")**_

That's why we're conducting a flash poll for TOP grassroots patriots: _**[Are you proud to be an American under Donald Trump's leadership? Answer now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc4uo179jfqb60up9pc5cgidji2m01sbqjdahc00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "Are you proud to be an American under Donald Trump's leadership? Answer now.")**_

**[FOURTH OF JULY FLASH POLL](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z60n4hujm3dbifgb3bm7jagm3tcca081ogtgitn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "FOURTH OF JULY FLASH POLL")**

[Are you proud to be an American under President Trump's leadership?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z25uq8u1l9vobcl7etd5o1nk9sl6ml3cuiotf160_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "Are you proud to be an American under President Trump's leadership?") | [YES - I'M PROUD TO BE AN AMERICAN](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt5jbd66ch33ftq6igns14m4elfv2r2g5ab187do_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs)
---
[NO - I SIDE WITH THE RADICAL LEFT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znmjirl6fi97lqjtuah33q7i2qbmmci6p29d0uqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs)
---

Your response will help us show just how strong the America First movement really is.

_**[Take the Fourth of July Flash Poll now to go on record.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfo0ibacbfr619kbo7nv2pin920e8f4nvgu8ohv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5g66pj2c1h2bs "Take the Fourth of July Flash Poll now to go on record.")**_

body:

I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11852.1.1824fb53368aedf47d25275a99f0b2fa) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11853.1.2e65a21e8b00cf8d461f19052b7793dc)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11854.1.28c2d1cf52b2599563a35e20fd97973c)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11855.1.0de19ddbc22dae6c6bd0769f05cc80f9). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11856.1.556251aa1e52a47c9cba343e3f0e7de9) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11857.1.8f82cc120dc2d2ff7d2c19654c3269e5) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22473065.11858.1.7f385567ea0045e18f612578cd887a8b) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: The team at VoteVets
subject: Trump and the GOP own this dumpster fire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The budget process isn’t over yet, but Trump and the GOP have already given us plenty to work with. We’re going to be everywhere over the next 14 months. We’re going to absolutely pummel them.
#
Donald Trump and the GOP own this budget.
Tim Kaine put up an amendment that would have prevented Veterans working in the federal government from being fired from their jobs. The GOP voted it down.
Tammy Duckworth put up an amendment that would have prevented Veterans from losing their food assistance. The GOP voted it down.
The GOP killed amendments to keep rural hospitals open, to help Veterans defend against fraud and scams, to stop $1 trillion in cuts for Medicaid. Call this what it is: Trump and the GOP are targeting Veterans. Veterans will suffer if this budget becomes law. All to give a few dozen billionaires a tax cut.
The budget process isn’t over yet, but Trump and the GOP have already given us plenty to work with. We’re going to be everywhere over the next 14 months. We’re going to absolutely pummel them.
[**And today, we are kickstarting the VoteVets Patriot Fund. Every dollar we raise from this email we will use in the fight to retake the House and Senate. body:

**_FIRST:_** Trump announced he would be a **"dictator on day one,”** hoping to wield his power against the American people with ZERO consequences!

**_BUT THEN:_** We FOUGHT BACK, and MILLIONS of Americans made their voices heard in the No Kings Protest — **Trump was speechless and HUMILIATED!**

**_NOW:_** With momentum on our side, Democrats are organizing more No Kings protests in just 3 weeks, **_so we need to know if YOU will be there!_**

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20450%2E878179%2EIM0jNC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20450%2E878179%2EIM0jNC).**

body:

We've got seats to flip. Incumbents to protect. First-time candidates to uplift. Extremist Republicans to defeat. And we're counting on this community to power us through it all.

Here's what’s coming up:

**🚨Fundraising deadlines are around the corner!** In New York,**** Gov.**Kathy Hochul’s** deadline is July 11. **Jocelyn Benson’s** (MI-GOV) is July 20. These deadlines aren't just about dollars — they're about sending a public message of a campaign's strength.

**🗳️Voters are already casting ballots!** Early voting is underway in Arizona's 7th Congressional District, where **Adelita Grijalva** is running in a high-stakes special election. In Detroit, early voting starts later this month too for the mayoral primary, where**** City Council President**Mary Sheffield** is running to be the city's first woman mayor!

**📣 New endorsements are coming!** We just endorsed **Christina Bohannan** to FLIP a U.S. House seat in Iowa's 1st Congressional District — and we've got more game-changing announcements coming your way soon.

****[**We're laser-focused on what’s ahead, Peter. clean_body: New endorsements, early voting, and more! | = Peter – We're not easing into summer. We're going full throttle — because that's what this moment demands. We've got seats to flip. Incumbents to protect. First-time candidates to uplift. Extremist Republicans to defeat. And we're counting on this community to power us through it all. = | = Here's what’s coming up: 🚨Fundraising deadlines are around the corner! In New York,** Gov.Kathy Hochul’s deadline is July 11. Jocelyn Benson’s (MI-GOV) is July 20. These deadlines aren't just about dollars — they're about sending a public message of a campaign's strength. 🗳️Voters are already casting ballots! Early voting is underway in Arizona's 7th Congressional District, where Adelita Grijalva is running in a high-stakes special election. In Detroit, early voting starts later this month too for the mayoral primary, where City Council PresidentMary Sheffield is running to be the city's first woman mayor! 📣 New endorsements are coming! We just endorsed Christina Bohannan to FLIP a U.S. House seat in Iowa's 1st Congressional District — and we've got more game-changing announcements coming your way soon. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? I’m 35,000 feet up in the air - I’M ON AIR FORCE ONE!
I’m working NONSTOP on the plane, so I need you to answer a few questions before I land:
#1 DO YOU BELIEVE I DESERVE THE NOBEL PEACE PRIZE FOR SECURING THE IRAN-ISRAEL CEASEFIRE?
#2 DO YOU SUPPORT ME ACTIVATING THE NATIONAL GUARD WHEN NECESSARY --- LIKE IN CALIFORNIA?
#3 WILL YOU SUPPORT TRUMP IF I’M IMPEACHED?
**_[I have instructed my team to put together a list of EVERY NAME that responds to me. I’m working NONSTOP on the plane, so I need you to answer a few questions before I land: #1 DO YOU BELIEVE I DESERVE THE NOBEL PEACE PRIZE FOR SECURING THE IRAN-ISRAEL CEASEFIRE? #2 DO YOU SUPPORT ME ACTIVATING THE NATIONAL GUARD WHEN NECESSARY --- LIKE IN CALIFORNIA? #3 WILL YOU SUPPORT TRUMP IF I’M IMPEACHED? name: John Fetterman
subject: a punch in the gut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Derek, it's John.
The Senate vote today was a punch in the gut. Republicans just jammed through their Big, Ugly Bill, making historic cuts to Medicaid to pay for tax breaks for Trump’s rich buddies.
**It’s disgraceful.**
I’m angry. I’m heartbroken. And yeah, I’m fired up. Because we've been fighting like hell – and still, they sold out working folks just to line the pockets of the top 1%.
This bill will hurt people. Real people. Seniors, kids, folks just trying to catch a break. And for what? So Trump’s pals can buy another damn yacht?
So here’s where I’m at: I’m ready to fight. And I hope you are too.
**My team and I are setting an emergency rapid response goal of $20,000 to show Republicans that they will PAY for this at the ballot box.**
**[We have to hit this before the House votes to send this bill to Trump’s desk. Please, will you pitch in whatever you can – $10, $25, whatever – to help us hit this goal and fight back against the GOP's reckless, greedy agenda?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk133-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10166%2E434096%2EdAUCmu)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk133-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10166%2E434096%2EdAUCmu)
---
Thanks for being in this fight with me, Derek. It’s more important than ever that we’ve got each other’s backs.
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk133-fr-fl-footer&t=3&refcode2=10166_434096_dAUCmu&akid=10166%2E434096%2EdAUCmu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=10166%2E434096%2EdAUCmu)

Peter,

**We missed our end-of-quarter goal.**

And let me be real with you, every dollar we fell short, the Left got a little louder.
They want to cancel this movement. They want to silence us.
But that's not how the MAGA movement works. We don't run. We reload.

**[The war for America’s soul doesn’t care about deadlines. It cares about action.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79ad52eb22f64e1183d30fe121d9cf7d&_e=qXFD2jmgJzP95BD-AdrgsWLhztduPfBdDW7z3nVhRy42SM5VQc1ZIeqByAyCPf6SOLjpcTz42lQcOFvCIDgvUOywQBTWtPIkLCj6rdAZ_O4SScSD3U05wg7j2Cqdk9Gmh_olYJNOaS60NWuFB8Id-eIO0ppwyz4paJSLe_79sACYLCLeHm2MkOTSvMOT0T12Lb7xntblRj4MfDYcyDzXcUQ5V4mX6PAOBprc-1KV6-YHqMRdEqIU8jh-oWiKmRmn2ua5OrqXkdoHeqs0MMlqDxyERCvBcdPbteBoyZ211_aSWI61ha6ZDnUlgh_SR_STlsNSoE7tVUK0mmfQZJeu0GEVc8WEXL0AgQZBzR6EA3khJC91b9yaqm0cDLoPbblE7O5SuzDU_wyrmspOofABLZGmiQQtNB6u9URiUP1BZ1laUQGaUV4q_OaOfezVUXQl780YM1YUG2ad3dYZ_ZEgENPn8Fmhyp7TRAVcpNM5Dexuv9STX3XcKkPO6X00duGxz62ou41KJrljdPFvtSPfCFPP6X2zRQmsuOFxPWE4WWuMWmrpiVUP0k1R0-pizCxf)**

They want open borders.
They want endless wars.
They want your kids confused, your communities broken, and your values erased.

We need every patriot in the fight. **No excuses. No backing down.**
If you missed the deadline, this is your moment to step up.

| [ **DONATE FOR MAGA NOW!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79ad52eb22f64e1183d30fe121d9cf7d&_e=qXFD2jmgJzP95BD-AdrgsWLhztduPfBdDW7z3nVhRy42SM5VQc1ZIeqByAyCPf6SOLjpcTz42lQcOFvCIDgvUOywQBTWtPIkLCj6rdAZ_O4SScSD3U05wg7j2Cqdk9Gmh_olYJNOaS60NWuFB8Id-eIO0ppwyz4paJSLe_79sACYLCLeHm2MkOTSvMOT0T12dXD7MgzmE6TjC40Q9QKBFXJWvouC6LPHn5IeHOtPuWNTdFPebqkkfW3Ancdpt3ARwYDYecVWXIv4si6ByZhjza1n0vOCjntekD0StgsLufFUKbi8goEeAjn5ZRrWWoCco4I4REjDhWnomWISXH9zs6_k-W3V93KP6mns28zYWocjJQU0EkLV2-9i3EUfUzuupPdheMVYy10u73VUSxveM3W03G10LCzjNxuJBofzX_FASs-GS91g8-Kd4hJu2AwPNeVMqbTtqeJA83rVW4X58RSB7O-VA_jN_6mXJI6kCmp_uBJ0V_JRneJfv07b0YESwBq0ffn-R7Xk95EQuwT4Aycz1HPfR4bQq9bCHqclL5HNk2oChWeqqtWF9n0qwJcZ)
---

This isn't politics as usual. It's a movement.
And the system hates it.

Let's prove them wrong.
Royce White

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
Derek, Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I am officially launching my campaign today to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator. [**Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Chris Deluzio right now to help me raise $1 million in the first 24 hours of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton who are rigging the economy against hard working Texans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110683847/554991866/1673302349?refcode=email_070125_Allred-split&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1Y2JlZC1hOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vskte9blzZdEm3xIYzogIZqUYop1yRsE_4JxG3M6ohs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110683848/554991867/1673302349?refcode=email_070125_Allred-split&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1Y2JlZC1hOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vskte9blzZdEm3xIYzogIZqUYop1yRsE_4JxG3M6ohs=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110683849/554991869/1673302349?refcode=email_070125_Allred-split&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1Y2JlZC1hOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vskte9blzZdEm3xIYzogIZqUYop1yRsE_4JxG3M6ohs=)

Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:
\- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.
**\- Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.**
\- With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.
People are fired up – _and they’re ready to fight back!_
[**That’s why I’m asking for $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110683850/554991870/1673302349?refcode=email_070125_Allred-split&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjk1Y2JlZC1hOTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vskte9blzZdEm3xIYzogIZqUYop1yRsE_4JxG3M6ohs=) Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign.
I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes – and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve.

name: Rapid Response Team via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: NO to Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

🚨🚨🚨 this is NOT a drill,
Peter Willis, 🚨🚨🚨 The
Senate just narrowly passed Donald Trump's damaging, cruel "Big Beautiful
Bill". Now, the House of Representatives is rushing to try to vote in the
next 24 hours – and we have a crucial chance to stop this legislation
before it’s too late.

Bernie Sanders called it the worst bill in history – ripping health care
away from 17 MILLION, food assistance from millions more, while handing
TRILLIONS in tax cuts to billionaires. But thanks to massive public
pressure, the fact is key House Republicans are wavering. These are the
moments we organize for.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1011&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Headline: Senate's 'big, beautiful bill' faces serious headwinds in the
House

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1012&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]The House can only lose three votes, giving us a HUGE opportunity to
overwhelm our representatives with the public pressure needed to stop this
bill in its tracks. Will you urgently take 2 minutes right now to tell
your representative: vote NO on Trump's Big Beautiful Bill?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1013&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Let's be clear: calling this a "Big Beautiful Bill" is an insult to every
working person fighting to keep their family's head above water.

And the version Senate Republicans just passed is even WORSE than what
passed the House last month. It will slash nearly $1 TRILLION from
Medicaid – all while handing massive new tax breaks to the top 5% and
forcing the bottom 40% to pay MORE.

Moderate Republicans in the House thought that the Senate would make the
bill better. They were wrong – and now at least six have voiced major
concerns. If they hold strong, the bill won’t pass, but pressure from
Trump is intense, and they could flip if our voices aren't loud.

Our team is devoting our resources to keep up the pressure – organizing
mass calls into offices and connecting constituents directly with Senators
and staff in person and via zoom. But to win, it's going to take ALL of us
speaking out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1014&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]The House is set to vote in as soon as 24 hours. Will you send an
urgent message to your representative RIGHT NOW in this final push to make
sure this dreadful bill doesn’t pass?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1015&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]ADD YOUR NAME

This bill isn't beautiful – it's reckless and morally bankrupt. Which is
why our team has been working around the clock on the Hill to overwhelm
members of Congress with the voices of people who will be impacted.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32366?source=email-20250701&t=1016&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Photos of Our Revolution activists at work to stop the BBB

Together, our movement has stopped harmful legislation before, and we can
do it again. But only if we mobilize our organizers, deploy our phonebank
teams, and raise our voices right now, loud and clear.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250701.vXwot8&t=1007&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250701.EYaadT&t=1008&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250701.dVX0-v&t=1009&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250701.D4Wh-r&t=1010&akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8952%2E5885482%2EMcTQV6

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Our Town Hall was a huge success 💪🏽
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This district hasn’t sent a Democrat to Congress in over 30 years. That’s exactly why this town hall was so important.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250701-5202-footer&t=1&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)
Peter,
I just wrapped up a town hall in a deep red district, and let me tell you, the people want answers from their elected leaders.
A Democrat hasn’t represented the district I visited in over 30 years. **But that didn’t stop people from all across the district from joining our town hall anyway:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250701-1?refcode=em20250701-5202&amount=3&refcode2=5202_420207_QfrEBl&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)
The fight to take on big corporations and billionaires is one that will take all of us working together, especially as Republicans in Congress jam through a big bad betrayal budget that strips health care from millions.
This is exactly the kind of work we need to be taking on right now. Republicans are passing a horrendous bill that will be yet another massive transfer of wealth from the bottom 99% to the top 1%. Poor and working people are being failed by the Republican majority in DC.
**So we have to be willing to go anywhere and speak to anyone** about our vision for a better future.
The reality is that the challenges facing poor and working people in traditionally “red” areas aren’t all that different from those in blue areas. But for far too long, too many folks have written off certain districts as too red or too blue, and not worth anyone’s time.
**I think that’s nonsense.** Bold, populist policies like Medicare For All and a livable minimum wage benefit everyone, everywhere. But if we won’t even show up in certain districts, how can we expect them to support us on Election Day?
Make no mistake: one town hall won’t solve all of our problems. We have to keep showing up, day in and day out, if we want to regain the trust needed to build enduring Democratic majorities and enact our progressive vision for the future.
**We can’t do it without you, Peter.[If you believe in our progressive movement, will you pitch in $3 or any amount today to support the work I’m doing both inside _and_ outside of Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250701-1?refcode=em20250701-5202&amount=3&refcode2=5202_420207_QfrEBl&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250701-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250701-5202&refcode2=5202_420207_QfrEBl&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
P.S. – **[Don’t forget to sign up for our next Resistance Lab training on July 13!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50195?t=2&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)** This is our way of transforming fear and frustration into action. You’ll join the more than 10,000 folks from all 50 states who’ve joined one of our sessions since we started just three months ago!
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250701-5202-footer&t=3&refcode2=5202_420207_QfrEBl&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=5202%2E420207%2EQfrEBl)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

We can’t do it without you, Peter. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal P.S. – This is our way of transforming fear and frustration into action. You’ll join the more than 10,000 folks from all 50 states who’ve joined one of our sessions since we started just three months ago! | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

body:
I’m sending one final appeal...
| **__A Final Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik before the End-of-Quarter Deadline__**
---
Peter, I won’t mince words...
---
**It’s a do-or-die moment for our campaign to SAVE New York and PROTECT the President’s House majority.**
---
In just a few hours, we’ll be forced to close the books on the quarter for good – **__and as it stands, we’re still $16,560 short of our goal.__**
---
With so much riding on this benchmark, I couldn’t stand by and do nothing while we’re in danger of missing it.
---
**So, I'm sending one final appeal to my top grassroots donors who have always had my back when I needed it the most.**
---
When I say “top” donors, these are not _necessarily_ the biggest donors, but the loyal ones who never gave up and never lost sight of our mission to put _America_ first.
---
_Some of you have been with me for years. Others only joined our movement a few weeks ago. But either way, you’re truly my last hope at this do-or-die moment._
---
_So, are you with me?_

They’re tearing apart health care and green jobs to hand out more tax breaks to billionaires. And their claim to "raise" the child tax credit? It conveniently excludes the poorest families who need it the most. **Over 650,000 North Carolinians will lose health care if this bill is signed into law.** This isn’t fiscal responsibility — it’s sheer hypocrisy. The MAGA mob in Washington is inflating the national debt to serve their wealthy donors, leaving working families to shoulder the cost. **Peter — None of us can afford to stay silent and watch while Trump’s allies attack our livelihoods and future.** [**It's time to call out this sham for what it is and fight for a future that truly serves North Carolinians — not billionaire interests. clean_body: The Senate just passed their ugly, disgusting megabill. | = Peter, Republicans just rammed their so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” through the Senate. Let's be clear: it’s a Big Ugly Scam. They’re tearing apart health care and green jobs to hand out more tax breaks to billionaires. And their claim to "raise" the child tax credit? It conveniently excludes the poorest families who need it the most. Over 650,000 North Carolinians will lose health care if this bill is signed into law. This isn’t fiscal responsibility — it’s sheer hypocrisy. The MAGA mob in Washington is inflating the national debt to serve their wealthy donors, leaving working families to shoulder the cost. Peter — None of us can afford to stay silent and watch while Trump’s allies attack our livelihoods and future. = | = Silence isn’t an option. We have to fight back. Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: Katie Porter
subject: You stepped up for our most important goal yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
thank you!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39856%2E3422442%2EbkOKLW)
Dear Derek,
June was a make-or-break month for our campaign. For the first time in this race, we’re going to have to publicly report exactly how much money we’ve raised (as of June 30th).
We’re still crunching the numbers, so we don’t have an update on that quite yet.
**But I didn’t want to wait to thank the thousands of Porter Supporters who chipped in this past month and from the start of this campaign.**
Political donations are an investment in the future you want for our country and our kids, and I’m so grateful that folks like you believe in my vision for California.
Next year, while it’s my name that will be on the ballot, it is this movement that will power our campaign to victory. Take it from someone who’s won three competitive swing seat elections: no one gets elected alone.
After making it through one of the most important months of this campaign so far, I just want to say, from the bottom of my heart, _thank you._
Very truly yours,
Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250701_1_ak?refcode=em20250701-39856&refcode2=39856_3422442_bkOKLW&akid=39856%2E3422442%2EbkOKLW)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250701-39856&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39856_3422442_bkOKLW&akid=39856%2E3422442%2EbkOKLW)**

For the first time in this race, we’re going to have to publicly report exactly how much money we’ve raised (as of June 30th). We’re still crunching the numbers, so we don’t have an update on that quite yet. But I didn’t want to wait to thank the thousands of Porter Supporters who chipped in this past month and from the start of this campaign. Political donations are an investment in the future you want for our country and our kids, and I’m so grateful that folks like you believe in my vision for California. Next year, while it’s my name that will be on the ballot, it is this movement that will power our campaign to victory. Take it from someone who’s won three competitive swing seat elections: no one gets elected alone. After making it through one of the most important months of this campaign so far, I just want to say, from the bottom of my heart, thank you. Very truly yours, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: The Democratic Party
subject: BREAKING: Senate Republicans pass largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history
body:
---
Derek, **Senate Republicans just passed their “Big, Beautiful Bill,” which includes the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history.** 17 million people will lose health care coverage, and 5 million are at risk of losing food assistance. This bill is overwhelmingly unpopular. Congressional Republicans have seen the polling and they’ve heard the stories from their constituents about how they would be affected — but instead of fighting for the people they represent, they’re choosing Trump and his billionaire backers... _again_. Now, it’s up to us to send a message to them: The gloves are off. Millions of us didn’t vote for this agenda, and we won’t stand idly by now while it’s enacted. [**If you’re with us, please pitch in to support the DNC today. clean_body: The minute we retook the Senate Majority in 2024, my number one priority was to lead the fight to make President Trump’s 2017 tax cuts permanent and prevent the LARGEST tax increase in American History. | Fellow American, The minute we retook the Senate Majority in 2024, my number one priority was to lead the fight to make President Trump’s 2017 tax cuts permanent and prevent the LARGEST tax increase in American History. Today, we accomplished that mission with the passage of President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill. Among the provisions made permanent in the Bill was the provision I introduced, preventing a $4.6 TRILLION tax increase on hardworking Americans. Our work is far from over! Democrats are going to spend millions spreading lies and mobilizing their radical base to deceive voters about what’s in the bill. Today was a victory for the American people who are fed up with sky-high taxes and constant uncertainty in our tax code. Now, Democrats will do everything in their power to derail our historic victory. unleash America’s economy, and deliver hardworking Americans the tax relief they urgently need. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/qY6aQJaSLWGgKzABFxFcr40tjsNvIyt8gk_mpF04lvTKi_d3oWCMmjF4M3lIv6mMVARvA13KjzmmwITgRa7MXEC6kvFOfktlqq2MONKxLrt6ksYaFkMFUBYvhm02OKxJ9WIyEXpHC44iHZOQ3aUn39_HamzFbpEO4-S0TH77AO3rQNXfrv7i6ji_Sc9Pi3LquvMIfjlgWSuLKLVDSCjs0hqCg-myzEepaxw8CJYGFVZiprGmonxjlYTUIHmHkn2JNspKBXvmeioqTfZuWu7Jf4zY_O0gsQIYzF8D0I-ZhqSN7SqjVCKVIvKw-91bxg4zDBPRFhsFwGQ2lFRg1XLrWxZAcnAuQ8L8tfk6GWKzX2gjabKZ-Sj4ZoMi5PARNYOetMWdgerMI9N9FzkuY-rjZDvsW86Acpxrfz6ry0uqthaBOAdTa1-aLp5DGmxL3tzvRg86dW4bsqjs9lMhNQnygbq1daCNyVTUqt3vu4ToYWlLBIHEYHwIyjmLO7KBJ_dQiUNxNYj_Qd7r3anH8hMmC1Qub2vVTzUDbq2XOGiM919vBfpUU4WqjXWO4ULvuY4NJVUogWViiYucJXxhfpZjjTzJSKaz7k_p6kfIQp7_aYmP3ZVlp_bq0Qaok6VtUS20FW0e-D1eNWOs6dKrGeveKI-px2H9OIh4dfrMJRpTtwt7tzqjuve2xPanzVDZQl9a2Q/6fIxDmpswZ_hL9jcttyH5BJxRA_CMqpf/10) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/E9sf0bpjYtQ9Rw6ZvMz5tYscAOlzz_qyymo8Yr1H1CSqKthfwJhvF7nVqcwLh8RIaQiDxKLVNUeM_U2QBqq2XC4nHQ8DuVCQ2EFZI6_-IYDgAd-lQ-1dZlJtU-fs84t7JW1WLxB7PUjrZGZ13fYV621MdqMlBnBjvgX0W0gFjkhgnPTDee7Vn7wo-EuTEEyp-xry24QaZQRw-LD1pIGoUbA4Ib_SbyBrEDUdl1Zs490NZGWzg4x0ZLI_iavlTHG2SakJXYLa-V3pcQ_aRBXv8c-ST3-fiAky8LFIDBHAVy9TktvrjyOeq_lZLMskplToyhHs1I9Yvz2-T2U4StxP20pdr_FSGGnxeOPOljdVwHuccPDmxfWYd8wva7VIdsDO73Lj95HuTg8Ej_i-s4I1PCktitoXX3tbgOtroAOzHuAl81P_WLCuchnhn-PaKKNB9flkqs8EarxsZRYNzQiEOAd_5KMb7LHDW8fR-s9pzvfo80Sg_-CuQD3NWOBEXzcxGCyH0xMloQKnjaZhCNcGO1W0rHIGrjjhtFOJR0jiGJCOWTnJOokxiDkqQ1iiKsHERP2mLgxVXvXqpNVuNJtPW_SWec7Vf2-rIef2q8qOEn33FrGRP01VztI1_GYK-iBlENp80GYfI5fkI8dw2o-5HNBNiMaf-8LPTjfFBUnCaEBPaf8TxbBHVTwhauz1GxZoAA/DBGdOEQrzQntlamamu4jQ3LSwk26ZK2A/10) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: They hijacked New York City
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c833bab714a54327b7dd57fe8fd4095f&_e=YhIviFnjDiUqFAPP0C6Zp0OIFp2aZxzhJ5-RaiRDARJdR4nKpAy7edxdtNPezz-EjULO7A57PDFU36LuEEsE8D_3KyOlAn1asnWCM11BH52VMRvtjOIE4ujUqIZm0oHSM9pRb62a7W_4eNKzd18DRBOfZqHIT2S4VJquF_pwjwf85XpGc-AKbJQKFz7sbu4y6GmLNuEgAwQ2925-QEDjfV4TmwqUw-8DyeswPZEo3Ls_jufwz7SO_gtD7W_GdrTiYiNoGQY9zBwtEG6gVqsaLNLBZF7_6iWCFfKlgou_C86pJ4VMuueY2jqafmJgifUCrY_6GJB3f01wA-jwT4R0EeOTFK8dmgXBRF8fWsgF20rEo8UzVxnulB2NJBPtW-YrueKvrt_Z6LwEF97uwYBk-fugBjx4UTy0uh7ihPxBeDGtDiAoMHO_F-8Zdau0U0JDL-HDTJZMvjdrQQaAckcvIB4-ZtyE0AxqJXX5Vfv8BDgD-TVNClTWOO9guKfNzT6zDZgLe6kJSQ4hot27dqE9LHBygH2TpY2ID7kwXZp_p8QZM2HNCs8hMXV2OOcf7Xc14vWHGztI_3QZvkTdhOO54l5-pYtQ5JcjuGSlOmEGOGlQefvz1am8-YC0m-Y4U2El02RP2T58AchIuFqCAtKa0c7PvFvEKQxQWA9T_OM1uxY74xSU0hnAyHRsUfoBJ_4eWeff4v9VYWA9LGc7uvovrwM7nyUMCbWPfehQXh8jRBI%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan.

I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up.

_**And now I need your help.**_

The same Democratic Socialist movement that just **[hijacked New York City is gaining ground here in the Midwest.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c833bab714a54327b7dd57fe8fd4095f&_e=YhIviFnjDiUqFAPP0C6Zp0OIFp2aZxzhJ5-RaiRDARJdR4nKpAy7edxdtNPezz-EjULO7A57PDFU36LuEEsE8D_3KyOlAn1asnWCM11BH52VMRvtjOIE4ujUqIZm0oHSM9pRb62a7W_4eNKzd18DRBOfZqHIT2S4VJquF_pwjwf85XpGc-AKbJQKFz7sbu4y6GmLNuEgAwQ2925-QEDjfV4TmwqUw-8DyeswPZEo3Ls_jufwz7SO_gtD7W_GdrTiKN3aPiwd86GsTNYIvsG_IuxGxqlviSZrnMvyutAx-J6sHU10BJLzcslREdsi4PyWFq2-vBTJ03YQNLbBjwBEGPvybI1TraZka01HPwdbfxhJSMLxzIOm3Ydbr9zFeQV5p8FdDvg-jyVAqMrNqqLGfx6yhqCeMvqhDpFZydKYjRgGeZR_5wvo5fQFANHIEU7ExR0sZBJpVqk_7UH6-DZMT1hr4OZRU5_fvMt3TX0lyjQTY0cRBJrdnEPWYt1mZV8JXKe8lUVx9qVgNUsEB06jo2uE1ZWnaRUq4OsYLmERWeaSkEN6ORkURsZEvy3zFnGiHGYGGWQo7vd6Z54iY_GokdVShjx-Tgaim3XF7KFuusbE26wqmxBprrEcAtnHVts9vJwHQRNqwCp091DqxlkWLbRXQdcM8c5XZrL31JubGnKF4TTyyUbmEtwuSKHoJDBqJ9XkR4gxhAg2_c7j8mD-RbdbC1dKxJir8dedaz2tBNY%3D) **This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is.

_**But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.**_****

My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, **pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos.**

This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading.

The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away.

**I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. **

I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now.

_**It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us.

[**HELP ME STOP SOCIALISM IN MINNESOTA**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c833bab714a54327b7dd57fe8fd4095f&_e=YhIviFnjDiUqFAPP0C6Zp0OIFp2aZxzhJ5-RaiRDARJdR4nKpAy7edxdtNPezz-EjULO7A57PDFU36LuEEsE8D_3KyOlAn1asnWCM11BH52VMRvtjOIE4ujUqIZm0oHSM9pRb62a7W_4eNKzd18DRBOfZqHIT2S4VJquF_pwjwf85XpGc-AKbJQKFz7sbu4y6GmLNuEgAwQ2925-QEDjfV4TmwqUw-8DyeswPZEo3Ls_jufwz7SO_gtD7W_GdrTiY9XvfN2s56kNO2HMhKkVsMzmsNHeiHt6UD8FnMBGIaJNO1lQ20pIiVxfWKE7d1LL5mFf7cW4LZkG_RjBa9mN5IES_m43fmK5pTdSAnckB3g9J5hHzTQ37zY6loIBmmHHVTEEgeZ9H1Js2R0avWJf4mKXVkIp55QTypS5pgBkTNRpNQseDPDpHQLOyp1d-MrQSVwCdevqdhwOaWZNKz6UiAMy-TPUNEqLB_PpI8EuFP5hAEiCn2G-LlFyBIat4siaLRRpCh3JpiNqcO-Cnrf6RjJAPZ7wrazDV-YLDrK5pZtt4HwDtL0mMb_fhYjVHBVH3qQ6Rf9HWYQ0ExIHArL_SZzbf0_Fp7ssByzBRMXiqPfzEbgXpud1teQqQIjAh5OMqKoju0pd1j6NbbcgsDXorNqDbq5HAnP92PWaLc-QcBp5hUoEk_GZFeMPz0aiZ-X3RSn4KuRLAy-2cBMIH5GL5wca7ApfdABg94uQfbZ_c0A%3D) **_
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c833bab714a54327b7dd57fe8fd4095f&_e=YhIviFnjDiUqFAPP0C6Zp0OIFp2aZxzhJ5-RaiRDARJdR4nKpAy7edxdtNPezz-EjULO7A57PDFU36LuEEsE8D_3KyOlAn1asnWCM11BH52VMRvtjOIE4ujUqIZm0oHSM9pRb62a7W_4eNKzd18DRBOfZqHIT2S4VJquF_pwjwf85XpGc-AKbJQKFz7sbu4y6GmLNuEgAwQ2925-QEDjfV4TmwqUw-8DyeswPZEo3Ls_jufwz7SO_gtD7W_GdrTiES97IF_8xwUW0gBIGJR_hKNjJvr1lhZku3IEwdXeuUYUq8TFZhUBwWKVKxOpTOXh-pZEMrjmPztX-e5zRMsmbxPIESvgzDNFrJBAFxMNSzJQv-PV2xMfyzZLr5eDzB-eFDfrGEOIUtsyqTW-eEPxJdC3KybuulOsnfdc3gWdFYH-RDHKO_FWpAiMdU7HZyH2OsswRGy5zHHztOxMjlpWO2idXObfQhiS9DgGzSoK9cwxx0YgDluZJPCK8yvwnHAiBg9qSdspnB6xX-4XLYnbi4H4B2Uwo50TCfswTwB1wdhsrKbatAwzUHCQuSDARM_sRQVY5mFpgfJXoojDQfc9iWRAVV04I2YeMqvucXrAHgaQjUI8pm3vC5yPq8yezLAoPGoi3sAXJtsgppl2kCxGsL0EZtVTQelwRG3DSoIpTL6gjW-AJR3QoAODvDZzuoWugDBP693RlxUmeNgJe7jjsinm0P_inbC6D3JJs3s8RFw%3D)

This election isn’t just about one Senate seat. It’s about stopping a national wave of socialist extremism that threatens to bankrupt small businesses, rewrite our values, and destroy what millions of Americans fought and died to defend.

New York may have fallen to it. **But Minnesota doesn’t have to.**

If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter anymore, it does. The radical left is organized, loud, and well-funded. But they don’t speak for most of us.

**We need a new kind of leadership—rooted in service, not self-interest.**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, **[then I hope you’ll stand with me now.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c833bab714a54327b7dd57fe8fd4095f&_e=YhIviFnjDiUqFAPP0C6Zp0OIFp2aZxzhJ5-RaiRDARJdR4nKpAy7edxdtNPezz-EjULO7A57PDFU36LuEEsE8D_3KyOlAn1asnWCM11BH52VMRvtjOIE4ujUqIZm0oHSM9pRb62a7W_4eNKzd18DRBOfZqHIT2S4VJquF_pwjwf85XpGc-AKbJQKFz7sbu4y6GmLNuEgAwQ2925-QEDjfV4TmwqUw-8DyeswPZEo3Ls_jufwz7SO_gtD7W_GdrTitz9XvV2-H3x0QeB2_AVUA_jfDEDe7aog0JwbK2usBOTra28xNe33IklB7WHTgVLfqL-a4GCa_5CbozvOmtPvlmOecKbTJc-0X0aELsqAnkc9YKVsaR6TH4kx5lx7fnJo_M8EA-5j9Y6m2z00S0WZ_6iN1xPyWqWq0qRNydws4du1AW5rcIBLDgEdNI22f4qaXfKVY3NvDDaiA4EEdQQcPibL0v_zMZ6xThBpzTPdqdtG8DmaW_47c7SaRqM_quAPxGRmRMqIMtx0vyiyGomgg3WsxLC8S_cl6XbVZbm1vIVx8u-SogW6HymgLX1jkNI7gYBXbtY-J5IxuiQhSAN2ex7VtW40sD-CVgcu03lz6Y_SXenhCUXtHxFgZ11eFKSyi3AMNOSl0EMITz_NKNYjaIMYtfIZEoj2Sv6v4bRhV-lHfrS7--n1mq9YT3m1rfzbr8MijHDOw_KVwRhLBDlEhLVyU7DLx4W0hf03S0AZz64%3D)**

clean_body: This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up. And now I need your help. The same Democratic Socialist movement that just This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is. But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.** My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading. The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away. I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now. It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us. This election isn’t just about one Senate seat. It’s about stopping a national wave of socialist extremism that threatens to bankrupt small businesses, rewrite our values, and destroy what millions of Americans fought and died to defend. New York may have fallen to it. But Minnesota doesn’t have to. If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter anymore, it does. The radical left is organized, loud, and well-funded. But they don’t speak for most of us. We need a new kind of leadership—rooted in service, not self-interest. If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, With deep gratitude, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. I hope this message finds you well. I’m reaching out to invite you to join Governor Ayotte and Team Kelly at the Merrimack Independence Day Parade on Friday, July 4th! Details are below:
**Merrimack Parade - Friday, July 4th** Line Up: 11:30amStep Off: 1:00pm

If you have any questions or would like to march with us in the parade, please email [jcallaghan@kellyfornh.com](mailto:jcallaghan@kellyfornh.com?subject=Merrimack%20Parade%20RSVP&body=undefined). We hope to see you there!
Best,
John CallaghanTeam Kelly

Friend, We just closed the books on Q2. I’m blown away by the support this movement continues to receive. * Because starting this new quarter strong is just as important as how we ended the last one.
* Because every dollar raised now shows Washington that this movement is only growing.

The Trump administration has quietly assembled a new searchable
database of U.S. citizens. The program is designed help
state election officials cross-check voter registrants across the
country to ensure only U.S. citizens are able to cast ballots.

Judicial Watch's analysis and use of voter registration lists has
led to lawsuits and legal actions under the National Voter
Registration Act (NVRA) that have resulted in the removal of five
million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and
localities over the last several years.

clean_body: Background on the Trump administration's new citizen registry [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] How Trump's new searchable 'national citizenship system' could change U.S. elections forever [] Source: Daily Mail [] The Trump administration has quietly assembled a new searchable database of U.S. citizens. The program is designed help state election officials cross-check voter registrants across the country to ensure only U.S. citizens are able to cast ballots. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] April 03, 2025 Over Five Million Names Cleaned from Voter Rolls Nationwide [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch's analysis and use of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) that have resulted in the removal of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities over the last several years. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] July 13, 2025 Justice Department Files Statement of Interest in Judicial Watch’s Lawsuit to Compel Oregon to Clean Voter Rolls [] The lawsuit calls on Oregon’s secretary of state to make “a reasonable effort to remove” the registrations of ineligible registrants from the voter rolls as required by federal law. Assistant AG Harmeet Dhillon: "States have specific obligations under the list maintenance provisions of the NVRA, and the Department of Justice will vigorously enforce those requirements.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] January 14, 2025 388 Noncitizens Voted in DC’s November Election [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received a spreadsheet from the District of Columbia Board of Elections revealing that 388 noncitizens voted in DC’s November 2024 general election. | **BREAKING NEWS:**

_Senate Republicans just voted to SLASH**$930 BILLION in Medicaid Cuts,** while handing **$910 BILLION in Tax Breaks to BILLIONAIRES!**_

**This bill has one final step before it heads to Trump’s desk:
_It must pass in the House._**

[That’s why we’re urgently calling on EVERY Democrat in your state who cares about saving Medicaid to rush $7 to join the Medicaid Task Force and tell MAGA Republicans in the House:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91634?t=6&akid=20476%2E878179%2Eldt6gu)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Sign your name: No BBB
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688617/555004720/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgyMmRjMS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=83NJRA5K7NDZlAqNY7D_b_wMQIPJPUgrzySGJ-iQHPE=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688618/555004721/-1074171016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjgyMmRjMS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=83NJRA5K7NDZlAqNY7D_b_wMQIPJPUgrzySGJ-iQHPE=&emci=c8f46cba-b356-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=46822dc1-b356-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858) Hi Peter, I wanted to give my sincerest thank you to everyone who supported our campaign ahead of Monday’s FEC fundraising deadline. With each of you showing up in a big way, we were able to build on and even top our first quarter, and we are slowly but surely positioning ourselves where we can protect our seat and help our allies in other critical swing races, at a time when retaking the majority has never been more important. **Because today has once again made clear, we need the majority.** Senate Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s not-so-beautiful budget bill. They didn’t even read the language in it, because it was being written on the fly, but here’s what you need to know: Thanks to Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans, if this bill passes:
* **1 in 4 nursing homes will close.** Without Medicaid, only the wealthy seniors who can reverse-mortgage or sell estates will live out their years comfortably.

* **There will be so much regulation, red tape, and administrative burden, that millions will give up on SNAP.** This will lead to massive despair, hunger, and even grocery theft.

* **$1 TRILLION in health care will be cut from people who can least afford it.** In fact, in our district alone, this will gut Medicaid from 152,483 of my neighbors in IL-17, including 66,000 children and 10,000 seniors.

**This is not political, Peter. It’s immoral.** This is cruel and unusual punishment of everyday people, an abandonment of our communities, and a betrayal to working families everywhere who are already struggling with high costs. We need to expand access to health insurance, basic care, and nutrition, not gut it. I have made clear from the moment this was proposed that I am a “HELL NO” on this bill. And with Republicans trying to jam this back through the House, this is our last, best chance to stop it. But I need your voice, Peter, now more than ever. clean_body: | = Hi Peter, I wanted to give my sincerest thank you to everyone who supported our campaign ahead of Monday’s FEC fundraising deadline. With each of you showing up in a big way, we were able to build on and even top our first quarter, and we are slowly but surely positioning ourselves where we can protect our seat and help our allies in other critical swing races, at a time when retaking the majority has never been more important. Because today has once again made clear, we need the majority. Senate Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s not-so-beautiful budget bill. They didn’t even read the language in it, because it was being written on the fly, but here’s what you need to know: Thanks to Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans, if this bill passes: 1 in 4 nursing homes will close. Without Medicaid, only the wealthy seniors who can reverse-mortgage or sell estates will live out their years comfortably. There will be so much regulation, red tape, and administrative burden, that millions will give up on SNAP. This will lead to massive despair, hunger, and even grocery theft. $1 TRILLION in health care will be cut from people who can least afford it. In fact, in our district alone, this will gut Medicaid from 152,483 of my neighbors in IL-17, including 66,000 children and 10,000 seniors. This is not political, Peter. It’s immoral.** This is cruel and unusual punishment of everyday people, an abandonment of our communities, and a betrayal to working families everywhere who are already struggling with high costs. We need to expand access to health insurance, basic care, and nutrition, not gut it. I have made clear from the moment this was proposed that I am a “HELL NO” on this bill. And with Republicans trying to jam this back through the House, this is our last, best chance to stop it. But I need your voice, Peter, now more than ever. | Fighting for you and our communities. Always. -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington.
