name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is a betrayal of working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Donald Trump and Republican lawmakers have rushed forward with what they’re calling the _Big Beautiful Bill_. But make no mistake **— it’s a complete betrayal of the American people.** This bill has **now passed in the Senate** and is headed to the House. If it passes, it will:
* Strip health care from 17 million Americans by gutting Medicaid and Affordable Care Act protections
* Slash SNAP benefits by 20% in a historic rollback of food assistance
* Eliminate tax credits that help families afford clean energy and reduce utility bills

**All to give billionaires and wealthy corporations more tax breaks.** **With House Republicans pledging to pass this despicable bill by July 4th, it’s never been more urgent to flip the House and the Senate.**[**Will you rush in a donation now to help us fight back and elect strong leaders who will stand up for working families, not sell them out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688718/555005109/246949951?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.01_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWMzYTJkZS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSryMq752T4XziOZj5fnCxZVp2Sbbym6Ku0B-wFcttQ=) | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688719/555005110/246949951?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.01_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWMzYTJkZS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSryMq752T4XziOZj5fnCxZVp2Sbbym6Ku0B-wFcttQ=)
---
**The consequences of this bill — and the cuts it would make — are very real.**
Medicaid funds lifesaving services that support kids, families and veterans across the country — from pediatric checkups and mental health care to school nurses.
SNAP helps feed children during the summer, provides meals for veterans and supports food banks that communities rely on every day.
The clean energy tax credits make it possible for families to invest in cost-saving updates that help our planet.
**I’ve fought against this bill every step of the way, and I will never stop fighting to protect the programs Americans rely on,** but I can’t do this work alone. We need a strong grassroots movement to push back on these attacks, flip the House and the Senate and expand the benefits Americans rely on.
Together, we can build a better future that supports everyone — not just the ultra-wealthy. [**Chip in now to help defend Medicaid, SNAP and clean energy for working people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688720/555005111/246949951?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.01_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWMzYTJkZS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSryMq752T4XziOZj5fnCxZVp2Sbbym6Ku0B-wFcttQ=)
| [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110688721/555005112/246949951?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.01_Big-Beautiful-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWMzYTJkZS1iMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSryMq752T4XziOZj5fnCxZVp2Sbbym6Ku0B-wFcttQ=)

Together,
Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Sign the letter defending Gov. Newsom >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Thousands of Democrats have stepped up. Why haven’t you?

|
---
Peter, we noticed you haven’t signed the letter standing with Governor Gavin Newsom.

_**Frankly, we’re stunned.**_

Thousands of Democrats have already signed on to show they have Governor Newsom’s back in this critical moment. _**But your name is still missing.**_

[We’ve extended our deadline to midnight tonight and we’re forwarding the message below so you can read it again, and take action before it’s too late! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110688888/555005639/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250701_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljYTdiNTdmLWI0NTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uJ-DmeHWZcfGanrctY9_INUiUeIDufQ96ZTU2P79DHo=) | [SIGN THE “THANK YOU” LETTER TO GOVERNOR NEWSOM →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110688889/555005640/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250701_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljYTdiNTdmLWI0NTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uJ-DmeHWZcfGanrctY9_INUiUeIDufQ96ZTU2P79DHo=)
---
– Democracy on the Line PAC
**– FORWARDED MESSAGE BELOW –**
**After Trump attacked Governor Newsom over the unrest in Los Angeles, he’s facing a new wave of right-wing rage! Look ↙↙**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110688890/555005641/1158394903?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250701_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljYTdiNTdmLWI0NTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uJ-DmeHWZcfGanrctY9_INUiUeIDufQ96ZTU2P79DHo=)**

He’s worked tirelessly for our state and those who call it home. So we wanted to take a moment to celebrate Tobias on his special day — and we know he’d love nothing more than to see the outpouring of support from this grassroots team. — and then = = Thank you, Team Tobias Read P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter,

I know you’ve heard a lot from us over the last week or so, but I wanted to reach out today to say **thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support.** Your support has helped us power our movement so that I can continue to fight for people and families in NC-04 and nationwide.

Taking on Trump and the Republicans in Congress is no easy thing, and I wouldn’t be able to do it without your support. **We know well that a movement isn’t just one person - it takes all of us contributing and working together to make real change.**

Peter, we know that Republicans are giving it their all to keep or expand their slim majority in Congress in 2026, so it’s more important than ever that we keep fighting to elect folks who make your voices heard in government and keep Trump’s right wing agenda at bay. I’m doing everything I can to support my Democratic colleagues and push back against Trump, and I want you to know that I’m only able to do that because of supporters like you.

We all have a responsibility and a role to play in this movement if we want to keep moving forward. Thank you for doing your part and supporting me so I can continue to fight for you.

– Valerie Foushee
* * *

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this tour
body:
- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s
strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The
comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t
just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless.
- We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the
years... but never one quite like this.

Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve
never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU.

I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._
while it was happening...

But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?

I DID.

And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar
before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring
Finale at UC Riverside...

You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the
videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...

But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:

PATRIOTS LIKE YOU HELPED LAUNCH THE MOST POWERFUL CONSERVATIVE CAMPUS
TOUR IN AMERICAN HISTORY.

It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.

AND THE AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR’S SPRING FINALE WAS IN A PLACE NO ONE
THOUGHT WE’D EVER TOUCH: CALIFORNIA.

The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where
mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas
aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._

And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.

Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the
“Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.

And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love
America...”

They ERUPTED.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

It wasn’t just another great tour stop...

IT WAS A BREAKTHROUGH.

Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it
was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.

And each one was just as powerful...

This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._

And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to
dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...

The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever
before.

_But let’s back up for a moment..._

Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the
Spring, this all started months ago.

BACK IN JANUARY, WHEN WE WERE LAYING OUT THE CALENDAR... THESE WERE
THE GOALS: GO BIGGER. GO BOLDER. GO DEEPER INTO LEFTIST TERRITORY.

We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe
“Red” states...

_But the ones the Left claimed as their own._

And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like
you — that’s exactly what we did.

LET ME GIVE YOU THE BIG PICTURE:

✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops

✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students

✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising
up

✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who
are rejecting them... _wholesale._

Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person..._
finally heard one._

Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag...
_were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._

Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of
something BIGGER than they ever imagined._

There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into
this one message...

BUT JUST LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE ACCOMPLISHING:

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Friend, this is why we fight..._

Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.

BUT FOR A GENERATION-WIDE CULTURAL RESET — PLAYING OUT IN REAL TIME,
IN REAL PLACES, IN THE HEARTS OF REAL STUDENTS.

This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.

And I hope you know: IT WOULDN’T EXIST WITHOUT PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your
generous gifts — made all of this possible.

Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these
campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America
First message the most.

YOU WEREN’T JUST WATCHING THIS TOUR... YOU WERE POWERING IT.

Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._

The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...

But this summer?

We’re preparing for something even BIGGER.

We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New
targets in Leftist territory to break through.

We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to
complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.

To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds.

AND RAISE UP THE BOLDEST, MOST UNAPOLOGETIC GENERATION OF
FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS SINCE THE FOUNDING OF THIS COUNTRY.

_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me._

Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen
what’s possible...

We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._

Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.

The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps
rolling strong.

I CAN’T SAY “THANK YOU” ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS LIKE YOU WHO’VE
HELPED MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE FORCE IT IS TODAY.

TOGETHER, WE’RE SAVING AMERICA... ONE STUDENT AT A TIME.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now...

_BUT I’VE NEVER SEEN MOMENTUM LIKE THIS._

These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our
ideas.

This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.

AND THE LEFT IS TERRIFIED.

You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our
students... But it’s not working anymore.

BECAUSE YOU AND I ARE REACHING THE NEXT GENERATION — CAMPUS BY
CAMPUS, STATE BY STATE, STUDENT BY STUDENT.

AND THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO STAND WITH US AGAIN TODAY.
BECAUSE EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE TODAY WILL BE MATCHED.

That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And
your impact? DOUBLED.

_So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what
we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._

Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.

Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this
country when it returns this fall...

Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to
become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...

And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of
America’s young people again.

WE’RE NOT DONE. LET’S GO DEFEAT THE LEFT ONCE AND FOR ALL. MAKE
YOUR GIFT TO TURNING POINT USA TODAY AND HAVE YOUR IMPACT IMMEDIATELY
DOUBLED.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66264&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA &
DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=299759&trkid=762103039&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... shift... while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? I DID. And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too. [] You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of “USA!” from students... From beginning to end. AND THE AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR’S SPRING FINALE WAS IN A PLACE NO ONE THOUGHT WE’D EVER TOUCH: CALIFORNIA. | Peter, it's Charlie. I want to start with the most important news: Thanks to this grassroots team, **we hit our end-of-quarter goal.** We were behind just days before the deadline, and the stakes couldn’t have been higher. But you showed up and helped us close the gap when it mattered most. Georgia’s path to victory — from local races to Congress — starts with grassroots support like yours. And because of you, we’re in a strong position not just to defend Georgia’s Senate seat in 2026, but to build real momentum statewide. Let me be clear: Georgia will be a top target again. And we've seen what happens when we’re outspent, but we’ve also seen what’s possible when we invest early, organize everywhere, and rely on the strength of a grassroots team like this one. We’re going to take this momentum into the next quarter and then all the way through November 2026. Thank you for standing with us, Charlie Bailey
Chair
Democratic Party of Georgia

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | Peter, it's Charlie. I want to start with the most important news: Thanks to this grassroots team, we hit our end-of-quarter goal. We were behind just days before the deadline, and the stakes couldn’t have been higher. But you showed up and helped us close the gap when it mattered most. Georgia’s path to victory — from local races to Congress — starts with grassroots support like yours. And because of you, we’re in a strong position not just to defend Georgia’s Senate seat in 2026, but to build real momentum statewide. Let me be clear: Georgia will be a top target again. And we've seen what happens when we’re outspent, but we’ve also seen what’s possible when we invest early, organize everywhere, and rely on the strength of a grassroots team like this one. We’re going to take this momentum into the next quarter and then all the way through November 2026. Thank you for standing with us, Charlie Bailey Chair Democratic Party of Georgia = | | = | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. name: Breaking News
subject: The Senate just voted
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
❗To everyone who cares about the movement for gun safety, please don't skip this message. 🙏
#

❗ Friends --
To everyone who cares about the movement for gun safety, PLEASE do not skip this important message.

This morning, Republicans just voted to approve Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” through the Senate — including a section making it easier to obtain gun silencers and short barreled firearms.
This is absolutely shameful.

Gun silencers are devices that suppress the sound of a gunshot. They make it harder for police to track active shooters because they don’t know where the gunshots are coming from. Victims of mass shootings don’t either.
Having these devices flood into our communities will only put more lives at risk.
As the bill heads back to the House, we are demanding elected officials remove this provision ASAP. **But that work takes resources from supporters like you.**

99% of people won’t give today; they’ll simply click away.
But if everyone getting this email donated even $10, we’d have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever.

[**If you’re ready to make an impact on our movement for gun safety, please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today, or select another amount below. As Republicans move to enact Donald Trump’s agenda, your donations today will help us overcome their attacks and make our communities safer.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250701-1-b&t=1&akid=10644%2E3935704%2ElT0IS-)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Breaking: Senate passes Trump’s disastrous budget bill
body:
|
#
Team --**thank you.** Because of your support, we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! That’s no small thing -- especially when you consider the nearly $1 million in outside GOP money already pouring into this district to attack me.

Every single action and donation helped us meet this moment with strength, and I’m truly, deeply grateful.

But as you’ve probably seen in the news, we don’t have a second to rest.

**Just today, the Senate passed Donald Trump’s devastating budget bill -- a sweeping attack on working families that gives billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy while ripping healthcare from millions and raising the costs of insurance, energy, and food for working families.**

For more the 80% of workers in mid-Michigan who make less than $50K/year, this isn’t some abstract political fight. It’s personal. It’s their ability to put food on the table.

Last week, I visited the Village of Hampton Meadows in Bay City to hear directly from seniors whose lives would be upended if Republicans get their way. I heard stories of folks choosing between medication and groceries, or fear of losing care.

The stories only strengthened my resolve, and I will do everything in my power to stop this bill from passing the House. But I need your voice in this fight, too: **[Will you sign our petition standing against this dangerous bill? Together, we can show the House that Michigan families won’t stand for these cuts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110691351/555013290/-883512900?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njg0OTE4Yi1iYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQ6JCu2ZhgsNtsx-h-muc-HDST31BPZBgbnIbUXwZBs=&emci=5bd10410-b756-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9684918b-bb56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=27257697)** | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110691353/555013292/-883512900?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njg0OTE4Yi1iYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQ6JCu2ZhgsNtsx-h-muc-HDST31BPZBgbnIbUXwZBs=&emci=5bd10410-b756-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9684918b-bb56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=27257697)

Thank you again for being a part of this fight.

clean_body: | Team --thank you. Because of your support, we met our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! That’s no small thing -- especially when you consider the nearly $1 million in outside GOP money already pouring into this district to attack me. Every single action and donation helped us meet this moment with strength, and I’m truly, deeply grateful. But as you’ve probably seen in the news, we don’t have a second to rest. Just today, the Senate passed Donald Trump’s devastating budget bill -- a sweeping attack on working families that gives billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy while ripping healthcare from millions and raising the costs of insurance, energy, and food for working families. For more the 80% of workers in mid-Michigan who make less than $50K/year, this isn’t some abstract political fight. It’s personal. It’s their ability to put food on the table. Last week, I visited the Village of Hampton Meadows in Bay City to hear directly from seniors whose lives would be upended if Republicans get their way. I heard stories of folks choosing between medication and groceries, or fear of losing care. The stories only strengthened my resolve, and I will do everything in my power to stop this bill from passing the House. But I need your voice in this fight, too: | Thank you again for being a part of this fight. Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: BREAKING (via DLCC.org)
subject: Here’s what Trump’s bill could mean for your state
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Our grassroots movement and Democratic power are the strongest tools we have to move forward | | |
---
| |
---|---
**_BREAKING_ : Trump’s disastrous billionaire-first budget bill just passed the U.S. Senate, stripping Medicaid for nearly 14 million Americans. **
* State legislatures will lose billions in federal funds, affecting Medicaid accessibility for 1 in 5 Americans.
* Seniors will lose access to health care, hospitals will shutter, leaving health care workers unemployed.
* Planned Parenthood’s health centers that provide more than 2 million patients a year with basic health and reproductive care would be gutted.

This is just scratching the surface. The consequences of Trump’s devastating bill will be felt in communities for decades to come. Our grassroots movement and Democratic power are the strongest tools we have to fight back against GOP extremism. That’s why we’re working day and night to elect Democrats who will fight to protect Medicaid and block a MAGA takeover in our statehouses. [We need your support more than ever. clean_body: Our grassroots movement and Democratic power are the strongest tools we have to move forward | | | | | ---|--- BREAKING : Trump’s disastrous billionaire-first budget bill just passed the U.S. Senate, stripping Medicaid for nearly 14 million Americans. State legislatures will lose billions in federal funds, affecting Medicaid accessibility for 1 in 5 Americans. Seniors will lose access to health care, hospitals will shutter, leaving health care workers unemployed. Planned Parenthood’s health centers that provide more than 2 million patients a year with basic health and reproductive care would be gutted. This is just scratching the surface. The consequences of Trump’s devastating bill will be felt in communities for decades to come. Our grassroots movement and Democratic power are the strongest tools we have to fight back against GOP extremism. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: 3 things you can do to fight this terrible GOP budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
Senate Republicans have passed their version of the budget bill, and now it comes back to the House.
Let’s be completely clear: This budget is a cruel, immoral mess.
- It rips health insurance coverage from millions of people by making the largest Medicaid cuts in U.S. history.
- It takes food off the tables of millions of families, kids, seniors, and people with disabilities by making the largest SNAP cuts in U.S. history.
- It increases the national deficit by trillions of dollars in order to give away trillions of dollars in tax breaks to the richest Americans and massive corporations.
I will keep fighting this with everything I’ve got. But my Republican colleagues need to hear loud and clear that the American people won’t accept this. If you want to help, here are three things to do right now:
1. Call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and register your opposition to this cruel and unjust budget.
2. Add your name to my petition right now to take a public stand before the House votes.
3. Forward this email to three friends. The more public pressure we build, the harder it’ll be for Republicans to sell out our country.
Thanks for taking action.
More to come,
Sara

clean_body: [] Friends, Senate Republicans have passed their version of the budget bill, and now it comes back to the House. Let’s be completely clear: This budget is a cruel, immoral mess. - It rips health insurance coverage from millions of people by making the largest Medicaid cuts in U.S. history. - It takes food off the tables of millions of families, kids, seniors, and people with disabilities by making the largest SNAP cuts in U.S. history. - It increases the national deficit by trillions of dollars in order to give away trillions of dollars in tax breaks to the richest Americans and massive corporations. I will keep fighting this with everything I’ve got. But my Republican colleagues need to hear loud and clear that the American people won’t accept this. If you want to help, here are three things to do right now: 1. Call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and register your opposition to this cruel and unjust budget. 2. Add your name to my petition right now to take a public stand before the House votes. 3. Forward this email to three friends. The more public pressure we build, the harder it’ll be for Republicans to sell out our country. Thanks for taking action. | | Patriot, 66% of crimes unprosecuted. 52% of felonies downgraded. 72% spike in officer stabbings.

These are just a few of the lowlights from the Alvin Bragg era in the Manhattan District Attorney's office... _**he 's a radical soft-on-crime FAILURE** who's been more interested in building his national political profile than doing his job to keep our streets safe_!

It's why the _New York Post_ thinks we have a real shot at unseating him:

Alvin Bragg is well-funded by his radical-left base. We need your help to take him on.

| | Alvin Bragg's Day One Memo decriminalized entire categories of crime, leading to _surging recidivism_ , _demoralized police_ , and _diminished public safety_. It also BANNED prosecutors from seeking serious prison sentences - even in cases involving murder.

Meanwhile, his decisions to pursue charges against victims of crime, including Jose Alba, Daniel Penny, and Brian Chin, were purely political and absolutely wrong...

**It 's no wonder a growing number of New Yorkers want Alvin Bragg GONE!**

As our next District Attorney, I will always put common sense over criminals. I'll do everything in my power to:
---
* Reduce violent crime, subway crime, and retail and package theft;

* Help the mentally get off the streets with mandatory in-patient treatment;

* Root out fraud and corruption in government services and contracts;

* And support at-risk youth to disrupt the school to prison pipeline.

---
It's time for change in Manhattan and I know we can make it happen. [**Any financial support you can send to fund our campaign will be a HUGE help.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=04b412dcac6f41b3a29d6a98086865b6&_e=ClOnvar_Z_xXK7r5PNM3XHlNrhIc4Lsvn83oBWdQFy_SQWo8x7baF1NYihO00MNsOHlOSapW-fjSsNawWxRU5ZHxueQL7NmwrIobjHIYCuV2_3_7gHcPQzbt1re5pCABDtnu0DJNZ0_n_lLdX-ZUABR-srP94VxQCrZuTIwhIueDCKbXV4O9nhlQGkphBOgJDVfwcuJCQn_4snE3GTrgnZkAOrTczmVonzSbwTrGEp-t8IeLcbYsYIKS8zWii1vzc3TBd3a_Ky2Xzq4g72VRQG8RtHP9xNwKRPYMxFsTc2FC5j063zzE9bLYbYDJSkHdWy_D--oVe-1OZ_gv1gcFZt-xfnqgHVwwoxDQs4jYc0sKu596qemMiTrcaT5ngPr6mHfr4MjNmxyKP_R6-7S0pntCQBEYbunpya3IkUNlh_OUIKXm9_LmqjlTihJdBAy9BXVrM6QNkwonw7IUXvhJpcoR8e3Z3-qvjmQs-iMB3Z7vXTYwOh2rDw0fniVnXVUdIe2GyQUJRd1R2jE9R7X3FpsXfGAZferGMlzBYtNVCpv-AOGNgp_rc0m6PfhDL8n-HeGFBwu2iNLSXMEjJWx4NvkoR9985RCyG4c9BHCI9DG6nQMUDJfS6hINqxGCwZJg-XWpoJa_Z3cw-9GRxq-c68Dr01mqHySuAQ7f8F-N1lTUreIXXTasWGsLI9OjtVOGj2OMOTkVAYESQYbh5OmtmqqAih7DPZDt4F-fLZuC-wUItLMJuSyDK0_wu00pDiAVmArm5dceQqJYUz8r5U2jm2AtoWvzoy51co7eODhz3BcdMTNDypiNFQkGYG1qjhOy6TeLLpYhDlwQsCmZdudvly3i50IOWHLH6WDj_FqoUdj-hgPFqC73aUSvo77R1R7l2wao8-G1B0dWgDPYYMOeTw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I will prosecute EVERY crime as our next District Attorney. Read more... I will prosecute EVERY crime as our next District Attorney. Read more >>> | | | | | Patriot, 66% of crimes unprosecuted. 52% of felonies downgraded. 72% spike in officer stabbings. These are just a few of the lowlights from the Alvin Bragg era in the Manhattan District Attorney's office... he 's a radical soft-on-crime FAILURE who's been more interested in building his national political profile than doing his job to keep our streets safe! It's why the New York Post thinks we have a real shot at unseating him: I'm a lifelong New Yorker, a mother of four, and a passionate advocate for justice who wants to see our great city thrive. I'm 100% committed to bringing common sense back to the Manhattan District Attorney's office, to restore public safety and sanity to our streets. Alvin Bragg is well-funded by his radical-left base. We need your help to take him on. | | | | Alvin Bragg's Day One Memo decriminalized entire categories of crime, leading to surging recidivism , demoralized police , and diminished public safety. It also BANNED prosecutors from seeking serious prison sentences - even in cases involving murder. Meanwhile, his decisions to pursue charges against victims of crime, including Jose Alba, Daniel Penny, and Brian Chin, were purely political and absolutely wrong... It 's no wonder a growing number of New Yorkers want Alvin Bragg GONE! As our next District Attorney, I will always put common sense over criminals. I'll do everything in my power to: Reduce violent crime, subway crime, and retail and package theft; Help the mentally get off the streets with mandatory in-patient treatment; Root out fraud and corruption in government services and contracts; And support at-risk youth to disrupt the school to prison pipeline. It's time for change in Manhattan and I know we can make it happen. Thank you in advance and let's get fired up to get the job done! All the best, Maud Maron Candidate for District Attorney of Manhattan | | | | | | | | | Maud For Manhattan PO Box 272 New York, NY 10013-0272 USA |

| | I just left the Senate floor after a 27-hour vote-a-rama. Republicans have passed Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill by only one vote.

**Let me be clear: This tax scam will gut our social safety net, kick millions of Americans off their health insurance and raise prices for hardworking Virginians – and for what?_To give tax breaks to the very wealthiest in our country._**

_Even my Republican colleagues know this bill is a political albatross. _

I’m sick and tired of my friends across the aisle saying one thing to me in private then voting another way – all because they don’t have the spine to stand up to Donald Trump.

But this year the Commonwealth has a unique opportunity: in November, Virginia voters will give President Trump and Congressional Republicans their first report card.

If we elect Jay Jones – and do it by voting in record numbers – we will send Trump and Republicans in Congress a huge wakeup call.**[That’s why I’m urgently calling on 5,000 supporters to split a contribution between my campaign and Jay Jones before midnight to keep Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110692105/555015461/1795123094?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.01_WarnerBBB_B1_F1_S1_C1_15DOxDC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZlOWExZTktYmQ1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8FAoJIUr6mqpWT8ysN5WN8u3SrSjUIAGhhl9IgZ602o=)**

name: Andy Kim
subject: Senate Republicans passed Trump's reckless budget bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
But here’s what’s important: your voices can still make a difference.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110692127/555015570/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWYzNzgwZi1iZTU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXWFKUtdlTS8DHRQwRUolUvto5pBviSFZ9m7KaAPYh8=&emci=a5d84830-b856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=99f3780f-be56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Earlier today, Senate Republicans passed Trump's reckless budget bill – the one that takes a wrecking ball to Medicaid, rips away food assistance from families in need, and hands massive tax giveaways to billionaires. Senate Republicans failed a simple test of courage despite knowing the devastation it would cause all of us if this gets signed into law. Let's not sugarcoat this: working families are getting squeezed, and instead of helping, this bill makes things worse. Their plan cuts essential programs that millions rely on, just to pad the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. **It's cruel, plain and simple.** But here's what's important: **This is by no means a done deal. Your voices can still make a difference.** The pressure, the organizing, the calls – it's all working. Republicans have already been forced to walk back parts of their original proposal. That's because they know people are paying attention. And they're nervous because they know this bill is incredibly unpopular. Republicans are counting on us to give up the fight, but we can't let that happen. **As this bill moves back to the House, this is the moment to double down.** Call your representative. Talk to your neighbors. Show up. Keep organizing. Every bit of pressure matters – because when we come together, we are powerful and we can still stop this. I'll keep doing everything I can to stop this bill, and I need you with me. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: But here’s what’s important: your voices can still make a difference. | | | | Earlier today, Senate Republicans passed Trump's reckless budget bill – the one that takes a wrecking ball to Medicaid, rips away food assistance from families in need, and hands massive tax giveaways to billionaires. Senate Republicans failed a simple test of courage despite knowing the devastation it would cause all of us if this gets signed into law. Let's not sugarcoat this: working families are getting squeezed, and instead of helping, this bill makes things worse. Their plan cuts essential programs that millions rely on, just to pad the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. It's cruel, plain and simple. But here's what's important: This is by no means a done deal. Your voices can still make a difference. The pressure, the organizing, the calls – it's all working. Republicans have already been forced to walk back parts of their original proposal. That's because they know people are paying attention. And they're nervous because they know this bill is incredibly unpopular. Republicans are counting on us to give up the fight, but we can't let that happen. As this bill moves back to the House, this is the moment to double down. Call your representative. Talk to your neighbors. Show up. Keep organizing. Every bit of pressure matters – because when we come together, we are powerful and we can still stop this. I'll keep doing everything I can to stop this bill, and I need you with me. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Peter,

Billionaire money is warping our democracy. | |
---
Peter, 100 billionaire families spent a record-breaking $2.6 billion on our elections last year.1 **That’s the kind of money that can drown out the voice of those who are supposed to decide elections in a democracy—the people.** Just take it from Elon Musk. During his feud with Trump, he admitted that without him, “Trump would have lost the election.” That’s because Musk spent nearly $300 million to secure the White House for his favored candidate. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-LUxRQxWYsWOECkb1YX0IfBTwCLCMjcEMrDV-1flwgFDofkn14DD_8J78n89UByAwt2HJ1xGOToaXf5eLTJu2fZMUho5s8VYegwbbFeeEgvFDZ9uDkxf_xoL6iFqsT8ElbzwB7BURDpRt7zLp3VtrnUKWnfPhKBw_s9Rk4FbVEoPv0QBVnVDWVA_pMORWFFm6TASr-e3lrNyEehYquo8yVSUbtLOb5IcC9AdtWY3Dy9cFcuJd7ZITFGXQNik-R4yKIQgf5rEYwRMWgRBTeClOv-Z2lUBI5CB3SgzIt9tqoFcg0aRnR1Eu4gd4Cpvf9AZJ-BxthQg0FTJ-ggCVyGXRJsltIicHDXPwZh_0uUZ6s7RWy7knUeTgTIjSTDTeebPILGBLB0UHwF9g9lBVIEtT795I4xpx3e6vY7tysQ828ZFB6WK6cn0eFu9giTM5ctus6gt6oXowVPh6AXUzgAK8JnfTQPTD9Xgtsnj5QeEwEpm1-TUcSt5n9iA3I--3An6E/4ht/JasO-jX-QDWeXPiKjQ32OQ/h0/h001.J3k30yOuYnckEFgkmGTqdpCs9rk1DyJb1zzAZsbUZ84) **In America, it’s supposed to be one person, one vote. But their giant pools of wealth are allowing billionaires to install whoever they want in our government.** This is why our democracy is facing such extreme attacks. Those with money and power want to consolidate more of it, at the expense of everyone else. [**Is this a democracy or an oligarchy? Add your name today to demand Congress roll back the**** _Citizens United_****decision allowing such big, dark money to corrupt our elections.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-LUxRQxWYsWOECkb1YX0IfBTwCLCMjcEMrDV-1flwgFDofkn14DD_8J78n89UByAwt2HJ1xGOToaXf5eLTJu2fZMUho5s8VYegwbbFeeEgvFDZ9uDkxf_xoL6iFqsT8ElbzwB7BURDpRt7zLp3VtrnUKWnfPhKBw_s9Rk4FbVEoPv0QBVnVDWVA_pMORWFFm6TASr-e3lrNyEehYquo8yVSUbtLOb5IcC9AdtWY3Dy9cFcuJd7ZITFGXQNik-R4yKIQgf5rEYwRMWgRBTeClOvkATCghtzbxb-hJCqil9r4Vr_PCGfAy_I2HYcEF3guIr5uLAYnBZpELBTAi8IxOJF_4jnUfqd2qj1TR8KPpJfvp3e7BIP_zmuEqXKJf6R82vqFBLXBM63LHWMno50xnwFWlvm4DHz7JtB9XWTMEmibl3iCRE8N0DOe21m6dpOZ43Qb_0MvRsiIMtZCnogGvpfBy0EeSfvk3zj4tdWd8ihOr0s9TD-dl7wR85FQWUQrRw/4ht/JasO-jX-QDWeXPiKjQ32OQ/h1/h001.myglRazjDJOQwuN5G3cU4lCE8gJ05VYkQHIv0ctVwG0) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-LUxRQxWYsWOECkb1YX0IfBTwCLCMjcEMrDV-1flwgFDofkn14DD_8J78n89UByAwt2HJ1xGOToaXf5eLTJu2fZMUho5s8VYegwbbFeeEgvFDZ9uDkxf_xoL6iFqsT8ElbzwB7BURDpRt7zLp3VtrnUKWnfPhKBw_s9Rk4FbVEoPv0QBVnVDWVA_pMORWFFm6TASr-e3lrNyEehYquo8yVSUbtLOb5IcC9AdtWY3Dy9cFcuJd7ZITFGXQNik-R4yKIQgf5rEYwRMWgRBTeClOvg1_tI87RC_OElM4l7O0gnW5ILY7UqvPPvXhzpsg96DS7LndPV8ZUaHGiT8Rg5Wcs2Rvh7NU0Eq47dOpcT8ETlnEROm5fUW5PiJVEILrRyb3DFzECVYncF_qcrqPcO-2VWOFy7sl7s4AJlec2sesl4lClRM32XgbQhWyUUOVYjXIeXcD2zhhaRmJeOefKESDLqOP7nESYb7JBsrQNh2--nP7LLvQ4qd3gbItCzafpogQ/4ht/JasO-jX-QDWeXPiKjQ32OQ/h2/h001.nmSeviW1q66ntnPEjfHxcIP43c3N8hh_36huMpSxS4k) Once again, this all comes down to corruption at the Supreme Court. In 2010, the Court’s _Citizens United_ ruling allowed a massive influx of unlimited corporate and billionaire spending in our elections. **The billionaire spending we know about is just the tip of the iceberg—because**** _Citizens United_****allowed for untraceable “dark” money spending as well.** _Citizens United_ was a hugely undemocratic decision that should have been overturned by Congress 15 years ago. Congress’ failure to do so has directly led us to where we are today. **The wealthy shouldn’t be allowed to buy power and influence over our democracy. President Trump's former Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf **[clashed with CNN host Brianna Keilar](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Biden's undeniable negligence in letting millions of illegal migrants cross into the U.S. during his four-year term.
He goes off when she crosses the line...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Keilar asked Wolf about Trump's statement saying he is working on a plan to accommodate illegal migrants who work in agriculture and other key sectors, shifting focus to removing only "the worst of the worst."
"Is that just an admission from the president that the American economy relies on illegal immigrants?" the CNN host asked.
"When you undertake a massive removal program and you try to deal with 4 years of a completely wide open border that the Biden administration left the Trump team, they're having to make a variety of considerations and a lot of policy calls on a weekly basis and the president's admission that **[he wants to do something for those farmers is an indication of that,"](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wolf explained.
Keilar argued that substantial numbers of illegal migrants in agriculture "didn't come as a surprise to most people who knew anything about the workforce," claiming Trump was backing off his initial deportation targets.
"Again if you look at four years of the Biden administration you will see absolutely no one removed," Wolf fired back.
"That's not true and you know that!" Keilar said.
**["Excuse me! I don't think you know what you are talking about here at all!"](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wolf erupted.
"Please try again," the CNN host answered, with snark.
Watch the live T.V. clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/78f8e8aa-ee14-4f3a-b442-27a2f18b2295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[Deep State Fires A Warning Shot At Your Vote And Your Future](https://substack.com/redirect/daf03aa0-b068-4306-b44e-a83b024192d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. And despite having overcome these hits, one after another, the battle may still be far from over.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America?
_**Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._

# RFK Jr reveals the truth about Trump... "One of the most empathetic people I've ever met"
Health Secretary RFK Jr. went on Tucker Carlson's podcast and **[laid bare his prejudice ideas about President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/6e8ba41d-05d8-4424-bbd5-a7723b64d7f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , telling Carlson that he was completely wrong about the president...
"I had him pegged him as a narcissist, but narcissists are incapable of empathy, and he's one of the most empathetic people I've ever met," RFK Jr. revealed.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/13c2421f-d072-446e-9edf-0cdd98d20032?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Secretary of Health and Human Services spoke about liberal mainstream media's dissemination of the falsehood that the President is "in the cabinet meeting talking about how we can make billionaires richer." RFK Jr. assured Carlson that Trump is "the opposite of that."
"He's always thinking about how this impacts the little guy..."
RFK Jr. also emphasized it is not just Trump's character that many get wrong, but his high level of intelligence.
"He's immensely curious, inquisitive and immensely knowledgeable or encyclopedic in certain areas that you wouldn't expect, like music."
As for the state of the nation, RFK Jr. praised Trump's dedication to tackling expenditures in the federal government and trade deficits, bringing "morale" back to the country.
" I think he's really a uniquely right person for this country right now."
* * *
# _" The only way out is really deportation": _
# Trump visits Florida migrant detention center with Noem & DeSantis
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8916b276-1254-42a8-ac17-ce98efbbec4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[President Donald Trump visited Florida's new deportation facility ](https://substack.com/redirect/38cf36fb-2ed5-4aaa-af4f-7c50f0c87f94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**Tuesday with Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem and Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, singing the praises of what is to be the country's largest migrant detention facility.
* **Trump toured the massive immigration detention facility in the Everglades** , calling it "beautiful, so secure," and vowing to prioritize deporting the "worst of the worst." The camp, nicknamed "Alligator Alcatraz," is surrounded by swampy terrain and wildlife to discourage escape.
"We're surrounded by miles of treacherous swampland, and the only way out is really deportation," Trump said, praising the facility that was built on existing airport infrastructure.

* **The 3,000-bed center, constructed in just eight days** at a cost of $450 million annually, will serve as the largest migrant detention site in the U.S., with Florida National Guard members deputized as immigration judges to expedite hearings within 48 hours.
* **The facility has sparked backlash** from environmental groups and Democrats, with lawsuits alleging threats to the Everglades ecosystem and protesters decrying the center as inhumane. "Another stupid plan to abuse people & the Everglades," one sign read during demonstrations along Highway 41.

* * *
# Senate 'Vote-a-rama' results in the passing of Trump's 'Big, Beautiful Bill'
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0021c8b-ada4-480a-be07-1d45c5e8e75f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**[Senate Republicans passed President Trump's proposed "Big, Beautiful Bill"](https://substack.com/redirect/d0021c8b-ada4-480a-be07-1d45c5e8e75f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Tuesday with Vice President JD Vance's tie-breaking vote, sending the megabill to the House for final approval.
* **Only three Republican senators opposed it** --Thom Tillis of North Carolina, Rand Paul of Kentucky, and Susan Collins of Maine--opposed the sweeping legislation, which includes deep spending cuts, a permanent extension of Trump's 2017 tax cuts, and major reforms to Medicaid and immigration enforcement.
* **" We're going to get this done, we're going to get this to the president by July 4,"** said House Ways and Means Chair Jason Smith, R-Mo., as House GOP leaders worked to unite fiscal hawks and moderates around the Senate's version of the bill.
* **Democrats slammed the bill** for slashing Medicaid and increasing the federal deficit, with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer saying, "The American people will not forget what Republicans do in this chamber today," after successfully stripping the bill's official title: _The One Big, Beautiful Bill Act._

| | Peter, I want to level with you about what’s happening in Congress. **[**Republicans just limped their One Big Ugly Bill through the Senate. The GOP Tax Scam rips healthcare away from millions of Americans to pay for a massive tax break for billionaires.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693060/555018880/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250701_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODE1Zjg5NC1jMDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EMyjI7k5Jh6v7HDn-kPSKFf4QORiyf7ihwzJVrTD5E=)** Now, all eyes are on the so-called Republican moderates in the House to join Democrats and stop this disgusting abomination in its tracks. I need you to understand the gravity of this situation: – Their reckless scheme rips food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans. – Hospitals will close, nursing homes will shut down and people could die. – All to give a massive tax break to their billionaire donors. [We need to take a stand and show Republicans that if they mess with our families, we’ll go after their seats. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693061/555018881/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250701_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODE1Zjg5NC1jMDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EMyjI7k5Jh6v7HDn-kPSKFf4QORiyf7ihwzJVrTD5E=) [_Nothing is more critical right now than preventing Republicans from imposing their cruel agenda on the American people. Peter, this is our chance to show the strength of our supporters and prove our commitment to everyday Americans. | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: July 1, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **We the People Prevailed ****>From the Desk of ORP Chair Connie Whelchel on the Defeat of House Bill 2025 ** The Oregon Republican Party proudly joins Oregonians across the state in celebrating the defeat of House Bill 2025—one of the most harmful and overreaching tax proposals in Oregon’s history. Together, with hearts and voices united, we made our voices heard. We are deeply proud of the thousands of Oregonians who stood up for their families, their businesses, and their communities and insisted that their legislators listen. This outcome is proof that when constituents rise up in large numbers to contact their legislators, **We the People** can prevail, even when the odds seem stacked against us. With Republicans holding a superminority in the Legislature, this outcome was never guaranteed. We are especially proud of the tireless work of our Republican legislators, who persevered in their commitment to protect Oregonians from crushing tax burdens. The Oregon Republican Party was honored to support their efforts and work alongside our grassroots base and key partner organizations to amplify awareness and mobilize public opposition to this disastrous bill. HB 2025 would have added over**$11 billion in new taxes and fees** over the next decade, at a time when Oregon families are already struggling with high inflation, record housing and cost-of-living expenses, and one of the nation’s largest tax burdens. The defeat of HB 2025 is a major victory for every Oregonian who believes in limited government, fiscal responsibility, and putting the needs of working families first. It is also a reminder that no matter how deep the blue, when people come together and demand accountability, we can make a difference. ####

clean_body: HB2025 is dead and it's all thanks to the thousands of Oregonians who rose up and said "enough." | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: July 1, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: We the People Prevailed >From the Desk of ORP Chair Connie Whelchel on the Defeat of House Bill 2025 The Oregon Republican Party proudly joins Oregonians across the state in celebrating the defeat of House Bill 2025—one of the most harmful and overreaching tax proposals in Oregon’s history. Together, with hearts and voices united, we made our voices heard. We are deeply proud of the thousands of Oregonians who stood up for their families, their businesses, and their communities and insisted that their legislators listen. This outcome is proof that when constituents rise up in large numbers to contact their legislators, We the People can prevail, even when the odds seem stacked against us. With Republicans holding a superminority in the Legislature, this outcome was never guaranteed. We are especially proud of the tireless work of our Republican legislators, who persevered in their commitment to protect Oregonians from crushing tax burdens. The Oregon Republican Party was honored to support their efforts and work alongside our grassroots base and key partner organizations to amplify awareness and mobilize public opposition to this disastrous bill. HB 2025 would have added over$11 billion in new taxes and fees over the next decade, at a time when Oregon families are already struggling with high inflation, record housing and cost-of-living expenses, and one of the nation’s largest tax burdens. The defeat of HB 2025 is a major victory for every Oregonian who believes in limited government, fiscal responsibility, and putting the needs of working families first. It is also a reminder that no matter how deep the blue, when people come together and demand accountability, we can make a difference. #### | | | | | | | | | | | * | | | | |

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” has nothing for you or me, just for billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693530/555020309/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJmODBhODUtYzI1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGrJs1NvaQd_0mXg__EmNQkO2Lenm0ActjBRWfGpl3g=) **Senate Republicans just narrowly passed Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” — greenlighting _drastic_ cuts to essential programs like Medicaid and food assistance.** Let’s be clear: This bill has nothing for you or me, just for billionaires. If this bill becomes law, healthcare costs would rise, millions of people would be kicked off Medicaid, rural hospitals across the country would close, and millions of Americans would lose access to food assistance programs. _All while the rich would get even richer._ This would hurt Oregonians, and I can’t get behind that. Hardworking Americans shouldn’t have to worry about how they’re going to afford groceries or a doctor’s visit just so a handful of the richest people who ever lived can get a tax giveaway. I came to Congress to make life easier and help people get ahead — so I’m showing up every day to defend our community. I’ll once again be voting no on this trash bill and continuing the fight to ensure this bill doesn’t become law. **[But I can’t win this fight without you by my side. Please, will you add your name now to send a clear message that the House must REJECT this horrific budget bill?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693531/555020310/-837169215?refcode=email_070125_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJmODBhODUtYzI1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGrJs1NvaQd_0mXg__EmNQkO2Lenm0ActjBRWfGpl3g=&emci=a78a37f0-bd56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d2f80a85-c256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14434323)** | | [Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693532/555020311/-837169215?refcode=email_070125_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJmODBhODUtYzI1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGrJs1NvaQd_0mXg__EmNQkO2Lenm0ActjBRWfGpl3g=&emci=a78a37f0-bd56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d2f80a85-c256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14434323)

This bill's attack on Planned Parenthood also impacts other trusted health care providers like our client, Maine Family Planning, whose 18 clinics across the state of Maine provide essential health care services to communities in need. The bill would bar these clinics from providing life-saving health care such as contraception, STI testing, and cervical cancer screenings to Medicaid patients.

This dangerous bill is so close to passing, but there is still time to stop it—we just need to act. [**Peter, tell your congressperson to keep their HANDS OFF OUR HEALTH CARE.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110693555/555020394/779474356?sourceid=1150783&utm_campaign=26emius-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJhNDEwMS1jMzU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_rGOohF8nTK3SiNSwFL9mqoMNGg9qWerVJ4goiHZt70=&emci=c9f8d844-bc56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=802a4101-c356-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

clean_body: !!️ Hands off our HEALTH CARE | Peter—the U.S. Senate just voted to advance a budget bill that, among so many other harms, would WREAK HAVOC on reproductive health care throughout the country. We need your help to stop this dangerous bill. | "PROTECT MEDICAID" This bill's attack on Planned Parenthood also impacts other trusted health care providers like our client, Maine Family Planning, whose 18 clinics across the state of Maine provide essential health care services to communities in need. The bill would bar these clinics from providing life-saving health care such as contraception, STI testing, and cervical cancer screenings to Medicaid patients. This dangerous bill is so close to passing, but there is still time to stop it—we just need to act. In solidarity, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Thanks to Senate Republicans, 17 million Americans will lose their health care.
body:
Republicans voted to gut health care and raise costs
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=673%2E2563979%2Enq5-8K)

Peter, Senate Republicans just voted to pass Donald Trump’s budget bill gutting Medicaid and raising costs for families.
[**If that is all you need to hear to make a $5 contribution toward a strong Democratic Party that can push back against the results of this egregious legislation, use this link:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250701-1A&refcode2=673_2563979_nq5-8K&akid=673%2E2563979%2Enq5-8K)
**[https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/push-back](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2988?t=2&akid=673%2E2563979%2Enq5-8K)**
Otherwise, let me explain why your support is so important.
Thanks to Senate Republicans, 17 million Americans will lose their health care.
That will create irrevocable consequences for the millions of families, veterans, and seniors that rely on life-saving programs like Medicaid and the _Affordable Care Act_.
On top of that, _you_ will pay even more out-of-pocket to make up for these losses.
Thanks to Senate Republicans, rural hospitals will close, millions of Americans will lose food assistance, and energy bills will go up for families.
Why did they vote to hurt working people across our nation? To pay for $1 trillion in tax cuts for billionaires.
We must hold these lawmakers accountable, and that starts with cultivating a strong Democratic Party that can take on these legislators at the ballot box nationwide.
**The Democratic National Committee is doing so much of the important work to stop Republicans from enacting their extreme agenda, but they cannot do it alone. They rely on supporters like you to fund campaigns that fight for working people across the country. So I am asking:**
[**Please make a $5 donation to the DNC to help elect Democrats in the House and Senate who will protect health care and lower costs. Your support today lays the groundwork for reversing the impacts of this harmful budget and ensures the DNC has the resources it needs for this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250701-1A&refcode2=673_2563979_nq5-8K&akid=673%2E2563979%2Enq5-8K)

Peter, Just hours ago, the Senate passed a disastrous budget bill that will rip healthcare away from nearly 17 million Americans, close rural hospitals, and cause kids to go hungry. This budget is the largest transfer of wealth in _history_ from working families to the top 1%, in an economy already rigged against working people. Now, it's headed back to the House, and you're damn sure I'm going to do everything I can to stop it. This budget represents everything that’s wrong with our politics — backdoor deals that prop up billionaires while kicking the rest of us in the teeth. **But there is still time to fight. ** **[If you're with me, add your name to my petition and help me put pressure on my Republican colleagues to oppose this disastrous, immoral, inhumane budget bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693901/555021780/1659398686?contactdata=gjsaalGtuzGj+iHtH/gmIQfojJnCVZQIHkw9j7+uvU7S7CepaaWkUfuhCsw/Xc37U0sEzi1zqSzKom5yV87cVE7MiZPzvOpZc29XNfDv7TLaO+d6a2BaASd4rN+4xzEa3tIS3+BzzLEf20zEIWT4uDp5qNViAnI27Q9ul1WotGs=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250701_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDdiNWZjNC1jNDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5hgrcrbj8bZxR9TkzmhQlDdXEJ1N4sq3SzAXO55W3E=&emci=542416be-c456-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=507b5fc4-c456-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110693902/555021781/1659398686?contactdata=gjsaalGtuzGj+iHtH/gmIQfojJnCVZQIHkw9j7+uvU7S7CepaaWkUfuhCsw/Xc37U0sEzi1zqSzKom5yV87cVE7MiZPzvOpZc29XNfDv7TLaO+d6a2BaASd4rN+4xzEa3tIS3+BzzLEf20zEIWT4uDp5qNViAnI27Q9ul1WotGs=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250701_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDdiNWZjNC1jNDU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5hgrcrbj8bZxR9TkzmhQlDdXEJ1N4sq3SzAXO55W3E=&emci=542416be-c456-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=507b5fc4-c456-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m investigating Elon Musk’s claims about Trump’s ties to Epstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. And as a member of the House Judiciary Committee, _**I’m not letting this go.**_ Trump thinks he’s untouchable. He thinks if he stacks the courts, bullies the DOJ, and surrounds himself with cronies willing to look the other way, he’ll get away with everything. Again. **But not if I have anything to say about it.** Friend, my relentless investigations into Donald Trump and his insurrection are why Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee two years ago. **And now that I’m digging into Elon Musk’s allegations against Trump on the House Judiciary Committee, I know the bullseye is on my back again.** [**They’ve already tried to silence me — and failed. But now, I need your help to make sure I can continue speaking truth to power in the House. body:
The Senate GOP just pushed through their cruel bill |
#
---
Folks, I won’t sugarcoat it: **today, Senate Republicans pushed through a cruel bill slashing Medicaid and SNAP, knowing full well it will take health care and food assistance away from millions of Americans.** All while delivering massive tax breaks to the wealthiest. This bill will hurt families trying to keep food on the table. It will force seniors to go without the medications they need. It will leave parents worried about how to pay for a doctor’s visit for their kids. That is simply wrong. I want to thank our Democratic Senators for standing strong against this attack. But the fight isn’t over yet. **The House still has a chance to stop these cuts — and we need to make sure they hear us loud and clear.** **[I’m committed to protecting these essential programs for all Michiganders. If you can, please chip in $5 or more today to help us push back, rally supporters, and make sure voters know exactly who’s responsible when they head to the ballot box.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110694101/555022537/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250701_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRjMjg1ZjAtYzU1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iaihZpHWMe6AMfJfv_92iJcOUWZYKqnbJ9Bb6nwZUTo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110694102/555022538/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250701_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRjMjg1ZjAtYzU1Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iaihZpHWMe6AMfJfv_92iJcOUWZYKqnbJ9Bb6nwZUTo=)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c25bb96307ad42a89ef558decb6ffd15&_e=6QQTIOW4b1dq_YZpzie6kMm_1n4Fyoc_ikE4qYmbpuNUzYU7HHANK9OPs6Gy2fIxhoiwsmhRLf9e8peL3HwZqdIqaeR4SZaYflq6GaI7KDmVzt-jHAYNEZ1TpUtnBR3d7Ti1vfR4kSXumCGlnPm-IiePQFrsoslm9CBuw7dBfi6vP_4ogI-be9fd88o3PSFefED5d_5sTp-kiPm4eUljZb9gXY_SuEBjTiGj4RTCFQQjsWCqSx8DrIE87fnFofjX1DeGjMhEPlldWAhSoBo6-9h_DvJB-nQPW63dXQms5hO6pNY61cLsnbHgpXdWNtpAJcd8ZXYhsi9FsYI9puqj4Bj6oAN8Z64Saenk0pxM6NyhTiW488cUkyicuZb8K7vwEdXifGlMbd_A7I67M29uAo69W7GLLqRaqv_c5Bl5Zi51CMf5baz__GIOJjKmUXVRR0J3UJh8pxbIkE-Z_XxxbaWBicnZSAUC_2_erKgKd9buj_Jxkfy5KEqs8U1AbTOPT4PeGGHfiZMHqM_CnZ4rdN85Qn1tMok-jbctHb2l418OzhvianvRZhzqFS_YDkqY741bS_evBQy5PPt8BZVdBZ97T1iy7HOV49rfE53iPVXUbMxW_TsmnHq3y9jBcd_OcmlMxwGRKww2hVP3FiFnhPUfQMC3HpaPHRiPooQ4VWBnMsu8Ii-ES9VTXZhiyGq72Z09mmeFiG-fIvm008VEH3xTCnr8aEw24VRv1xQ5nF8%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c25bb96307ad42a89ef558decb6ffd15&_e=6QQTIOW4b1dq_YZpzie6kMm_1n4Fyoc_ikE4qYmbpuNUzYU7HHANK9OPs6Gy2fIxhoiwsmhRLf9e8peL3HwZqdIqaeR4SZaYflq6GaI7KDmVzt-jHAYNEZ1TpUtnBR3d7Ti1vfR4kSXumCGlnPm-IiePQFrsoslm9CBuw7dBfi6vP_4ogI-be9fd88o3PSFefED5d_5sTp-kiPm4eUljZb9gXY_SuEBjTiGj4RTCFQQjsWCqSx8DrIE87fnFofjXcpvPmfTpcxf4L7V_7tvH-pFpcLWTpoMzItetsprTHFgWGGobZw39haGmPnNRfzNAT6E5Pz0JOAZtY4Ne0QIEshdlagG5cQgyodvVA96zllFx7RfAkKR0u6W_gEkxGfWRKyTGvNOsrD5a6fRzemJ9QSkk-Ud1lx5e5k9sNEgeFqSBewN2bmk1CKcPOpqQvLfIwocSAsASDzVDUoCs32nYjiiYT7flzpF74AT5CHTA38jZpJmqypn6LkFa9bCeVfEUZ6Ey0vk8JH4j8ULTIuo7SerTRIvM6iaKzGRZy4UBgM6iVTMVQP1Qa2Qpi1MMl6eY6ivJ2KTucFtImnAVgkLSF3F4jpHa3GE6FJSYv2GsfiFc29w668e-Q_bBRbj7u2ogqrf2Zt6sI7W_gKX-RCHX4QKuUuZp84BBY3QMgqU1lrSi5sqQeJQOeHn4hIC3FKcxANS3eL0MUHW0TrhW_92viZfi_BipETqfqAN46T2GKgo%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” passes the Senate** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110694136/555022632/1071238056?refcode=em-7.01.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM3MDAyNS1jNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dXyDXM_sTp3OlbibTGEOa-wR-V4d62vklTBo7oIk320=)
* * *
This just happened: Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill passed the Senate — **by a single tiebreaker vote from Vice President JD Vance.** Now it’s heading back to the House, and if it passes again, it will lock in Trump’s federal takeover of elections, surveillance powers, and AI censorship — and gut states’ rights in the process. Let’s be crystal clear: ✅ It balloons the national deficit by hundreds of billions of dollars
✅ It fuels political corruption by redirecting public funds to partisan stunts
✅ It gives Trump the power to centralize voter data and suppress votes
✅ It even limits states’ ability to set their own election timelines This bill is a blueprint for permanent federal control of our democratic process — with Trump’s hand on the pen. And it passed by just one vote. That’s how close we are to losing it all. This may be our last shot to stop it. But we need to fight like hell — in court, in legislatures, and in every state where democracy is under attack. **DASS is preparing rapid-response legal action and mobilizing our networks in key states — but we urgently need your help to meet this moment.** [**Can you rush a donation of $3 or more to help us stop this power grab and defend democracy in the states?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110694137/555022633/1071238056?refcode=em-7.01.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM3MDAyNS1jNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dXyDXM_sTp3OlbibTGEOa-wR-V4d62vklTBo7oIk320=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110694138/555022634/1071238056?refcode=em-7.01.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM3MDAyNS1jNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dXyDXM_sTp3OlbibTGEOa-wR-V4d62vklTBo7oIk320=)**

David Zweig is an investigative journalist and author that blew the lid off of COVID with his book An Abundance of Caution. An Abundance of Caution is a devastating account of the decision-making process behind one of the worst American policy failures in a century--the extended closures of public schools during the pandemic. Zweig explains how the extreme lockdown policies were put in place just to be at odds with President Trump's message of keeping things open. Dr. Fauci's rule of 6 feet had no grounding in reality. He literally made it up. The worst part of the pandemic policies are the deep mental, physical, and academic harms endured on our children for no discernible benefit. The story of American schools during the pandemic serves as a prism through which to approach fundamental questions about why and how individuals, bureaucracies, governments, and societies act as they do in times of crisis and uncertainty.

**David Zweig**

Hey friend,
Here is Trump’s heinous Big Budget Bill by the polling numbers:
* Most Americans who are aware of the bill _oppose it_ : **55%** from Quinnipiac, **64%** from KFF, and **59%** from Fox News.
* In the KFF poll, when Republicans and MAGA supporters learned that the bill would decrease funding for local hospitals and raise the uninsured rate, favorability **plummeted by at least 20 points**.
* In new Priorities USA polling, guess how many Americans haven’t heard anything about the bill. **_NEARLY HALF → 48%_!!!!**

This budget bill is horrendously bad for _everyone_.
* It’s __the biggest__ cut to Medicaid that would force 1 out of 4 nursing homes to close.
* It’s __the biggest__ __ cut to SNAP for families, kids, veterans and more — right now 1 out of 5 Nevada kids and 1 out of every 6 Southern Nevadans are food insecure.
* 17 MILLION would lose healthcare.

The budget bill is __the biggest mess__ and Congressional Republicans are selling off our lives to hand $1 TRILLION in tax cuts to billionaires.
**We need to reach the nearly half of Americans who haven’t heard just how horrible this budget bill is that Congressional Republicans and Trump are shoving down our throats before Independence Day. **
[**_Chip in to help us spread the word to Nevadans and hold the GOP accountable._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTG6G2yDwxKXYqRhycKs1nhFZTQxl5sHG6BD3tmaNpPWWflUSgFA75ONDkT8rt5kaqdNXzM8Hz3ZVUI60Th8KijXDaN1YMEsssFMBdukLZyXpXhzBZf2jsZjdlgF9Ae_cUQYonROiJCpT7pwbXvAZtFQppdviHjCwEztNrRKs4Lg3nkm7pk3X9gaD_jbvjlw3xSHZ0I_ipz3xdp1n5pNXjmSbiUOfFvVDIcitnEMvFZmPNH3D4_Ll7UM54W5B9jo8rDUIn4LP4vPenclDN120zg6QJpJ4FVI-6cjA_Et5ywPNEsrjYkbgb51Xv4YwrQ2_d/4ht/1qto5gcXQvWOmzyLDCVtbQ/h1/h001.oHq6RWo4Yq7U0XeyxBnhUne5wf6NAtQz_AkL0hK1C1E)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Jason Crow is a defender of our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

I know we can always count on Jason Crow to stand up for what’s right — our freedoms, our democracy, our Constitution.

We served on the House Intelligence Committee together and as impeachment managers during Donald Trump’s first impeachment trial. And as a result, we were ruthlessly attacked for our efforts to hold the president accountable and to bring the truth to light.

Jason and I have kept up that work — and for that, we’ve been attacked again and again.

Most recently, Jason was attacked on Twitter by Ric Grenell — Trump’s hand-picked head of the Kennedy Center, former acting Director of National Intelligence, and right-wing hack — for speaking out on Trump’s decision to use military force with the approval of Congress.

He even called Jason “the new Schiff.”

Frankly, folks, it’s pretty rich that Ric Grenell is coming after Jason. Jason is a veteran, a true patriot, and a public servant, and he’s stood up for our values and freedoms over and over again. And Grenell? He’s just a troll.

Chip in to help Jason and me keep up the fight for what’s right. Pitch in to continue holding Trump accountable. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-schiff]
