clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Team — I know we can always count on Jason Crow to stand up for what’s right — our freedoms, our democracy, our Constitution. We served on the House Intelligence Committee together and as impeachment managers during Donald Trump’s first impeachment trial. And as a result, we were ruthlessly attacked for our efforts to hold the president accountable and to bring the truth to light. Jason and I have kept up that work — and for that, we’ve been attacked again and again. Most recently, Jason was attacked on Twitter by Ric Grenell — Trump’s hand-picked head of the Kennedy Center, former acting Director of National Intelligence, and right-wing hack — for speaking out on Trump’s decision to use military force with the approval of Congress. He even called Jason “the new Schiff.” Frankly, folks, it’s pretty rich that Ric Grenell is coming after Jason. Jason is a veteran, a true patriot, and a public servant, and he’s stood up for our values and freedoms over and over again. And Grenell? He’s just a troll. Chip in to help Jason and me keep up the fight for what’s right. Pitch in to continue holding Trump accountable. I just left the Senate floor after a 27-hour vote-a-rama. Republicans have passed Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill by only one vote. **Let me be clear: This tax scam will gut our social safety net, kick millions of Americans off their health insurance, and raise prices for hardworking Virginians – and for what?_To give tax breaks to the very wealthiest in our country._** Even my Republican colleagues know this bill is a political albatross. I’m sick and tired of my friends across the aisle saying one thing to me in private, then voting another way – all because they don’t have the spine to stand up to Donald Trump. But this year, the Commonwealth has a unique opportunity: in November, Virginia voters will give President Trump and Congressional Republicans their first report card. If we elect Democrats across the Commonwealth – and do it by voting in record numbers – we will send Trump and Republicans in Congress a huge wake-up call. **[That’s why I’m urgently calling on supporters to split a contribution between my campaign and DPVA before midnight to keep Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695050/555025947/1905205577?&refcode=E14026-20250701-BigBeautifulBill-SL-SplitSend&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2YyNWRmMy1jODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbOHV5Zvzz1bQh-SRWJN2RzrGum7gx_jhCBSd1S9AiQ=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695051/555025948/1592920138?express_lane=true&refcode=E14026-20250701-BigBeautifulBill-EG-SplitSend&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2YyNWRmMy1jODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbOHV5Zvzz1bQh-SRWJN2RzrGum7gx_jhCBSd1S9AiQ=)

| | Patriot, I was on the ground in Los Angeles—glass shattering overhead, people struck by debris, American flags burning, and police under attack. I felt a sense of menace and lawlessness. I couldn’t contain my frustration. **You don’t see these scenes in other states.** This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design. This is the result of fifteen years of one-party Democratic rule, creating an upside-down morality where those who do the wrong thing are rewarded while people who do the right thing are punished. Governor Newsom, Mayor Bass, and the local officials in Los Angeles have failed us. They let rioters run rampant while law-abiding Californians suffer. But there is hope. Californians want violent criminals removed from their communities, and they don’t want a government that allows riots. If we are ever going to win back California, it’s now while this is fresh in everyone’s minds. I’m running for governor to restore law and order, back our police, and make California golden again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m all in. Are you? **Here is how _you_ can help right now:**

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|

Aloha Peter, **Thank you.** Thanks to your support, we had a strong end to our fundraising quarter. I know we reached out a lot asking for your support, and I want to emphasize that it really does make a difference. This team has stepped up time and time again — and this quarter, I was especially honored to have your support as I spoke up against Trump and Republicans’ disastrous budget bill. My campaign has always been powered by grassroots supporters like you, and _I wouldn’t have it any other way. _ In the coming months, we must fight harder than ever to bring a stop to Republicans’ extreme agenda to serve the wealthiest few at the expense of hardworking Americans. But thanks to your continued, generous support, I’m confident we’ll have what it takes to fight back. Again, thank you for standing with me. Mahalo, Mazie

It's Gabe. Thanks to you, we hit our critical end-of-quarter goal last night. I can’t tell you how much that means to me — and to this campaign. Together, we’ve done what many thought was impossible. We’ve already defeated Trump’s MAGA candidate twice, but with Republican dark money groups flooding southern New Mexico, we know they’re going all-in to flip to seat. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Zohran proved what Justice Democrats has been saying for years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It's been one week since Zohran Mamdani shocked billionaires, corporate
Super PACs, and career politicians with his resounding victory for our
grassroots progressive movement in New York City’s Democratic primary for
mayor – confirmed as a 12-point blowout in today’s final count!

Zohran proved what Justice Democrats has been saying for years: We CAN
take on bigger, bolder fights against the corporate Democratic
establishment AND win — if we’re brave enough to run on bold progressive
values and a clear economic vision for working class people.

He stood up to the billionaires trying to run New York City with a simple
yet incredibly bold agenda of lowering costs, making essential services
free, and centering the working class in policymaking.

And when the political establishment backed by AIPAC tried to smear him
for standing against the genocide in Gaza, Zohran didn’t back down. He
kept fighting and still won.

Justice Democrats has been putting leaders exactly like that in Congress
for years, and we’re thinking big in 2026.

Now, our movement must build on that energy in races across the country
and root out entrenched, corporate, career politicians everywhere they
refuse to fight for us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250701?refcode=em20250701-36808&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36808_1203867_lERwsp&akid=36808%2E1203867%2ElERwsp ]Screenshot of an In These Times article titled 'The Next Fight in the
Democratic Party.' The subheadline reads: 'Justice Democrats, the
organization that backed Squad members like AOC and Ilhan Omar, has
endorsed their first candidate for the 2026 cycle—Donavan McKinney.' The
byline says 'Eli Day.' Below is a photo showing Michigan state Rep.
Donavan McKinney (left) smiling at the camera, surrounded by supporters
holding blue and orange 'Donavan McKinney for U.S. Congress' signs at his
campaign launch event in Detroit on April 28.

We’ve already endorsed our first candidate of this cycle – Donavan
McKinney in Michigan’s 13th district, a working class leader taking on the
10th richest Democrat in Congress.

This month has proven that a united, grassroots, progressive movement can
take out the richest politicians and their richest corporate backers.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250701?refcode=em20250701-36808&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36808_1203867_lERwsp&akid=36808%2E1203867%2ElERwsp ]But we need your help. This moment only matters if we use it. Can you
donate today to help Justice Democrats elect progressives nationwide in
2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250701?refcode=em20250701-36808&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36808_1203867_lERwsp&akid=36808%2E1203867%2ElERwsp ]Contribute $5

Let’s keep up this momentum and take on bigger, bolder fights against the
Democratic establishment – together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250701-36808-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36808_1203867_lERwsp&akid=36808%2E1203867%2ElERwsp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36808%2E1203867%2ElERwsp

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Powered By People
subject: Please split a contribution between the 2026 Texas Nominee Fund and Powered by People right now →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Let’s get to work.
#
This morning, Colin Allred launched his campaign for Texas Senate!
If he’s our nominee, he’ll take on either our incumbent senator, John Cornyn, or our indicted Attorney General, Ken Paxton.
**Powered by People is committed to doing everything we can to build Democratic organizing power in Texas for the long-term.**
So now, we’re asking if you will split a contribution between Powered by People and the 2026 Texas Senate Nominee Fund. _The nominee fund will hold money securely and then be transferred to the campaign of whoever the Democratic nominee is._
[**Please split a $3 donation between Powered by People and the 2026 Texas Senate Nominee Fund. We set a goal to raise $15,000 today before midnight and every dollar will make a difference.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250701-2-split.-koF-k&refcode=ema20250701-240198&t=1&akid=240198%2E444211%2ENgrnEt)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250701-2-split.-koF-k&refcode=ema20250701-240198&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=240198%2E444211%2ENgrnEt)**
Texans are fed up with politicians who neglect Texas families and refuse to face their constituents to answer questions.
While Ken Paxton and John Cornyn are locked in a brutal GOP brawl, we’re focused on what comes next—building a movement strong enough to overcome whoever carries Trump’s endorsement.
[**Please split a contribution between Powered by People and the 2026 Texas Nominee Fund right now →**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250701-2-split.-koF-k&refcode=ema20250701-240198&t=21&akid=240198%2E444211%2ENgrnEt)
Our state is worth fighting for. Let’s get to work.
—Team Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250701-240198-footer&t=22&refcode2=240198_444211_NgrnEt&akid=240198%2E444211%2ENgrnEt)**

clean_body: | | | I wanted to make sure you saw this. I’ll keep it short—we didn’t hit our end-of-quarter deadline yesterday, so I’ve directed my finance team to extend it until tonight at midnight. These deadlines are critical tools—we use them to gauge the level of support for the policy proposals coming out of Washington, D.C. I’m fighting alongside President Trump to deliver the America-First agenda you voted for. We won’t let you down. God bless,JoshSent from my iPhone \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: Tuesday, July 1, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: 🕰️ Deadline EXTENDED Till Midnight | | | | Peter, I have bad news and good news. The bad news - we missed yesterday's fundraising deadline. The good news - we have EXTENDED our deadline! Our NEW deadline is tonight at midnight. | | | | There's no time to waste! Help me fight for America by donating now! I'm so thankful for all of you grassroots patriots who donate with your hearts, donate for America, and donate for your children. Now is your time to make a difference. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

| | Dear Peter,

I first want to thank you for your support leading up to our end-of-quarter deadline last night.

_These deadlines are extremely important, and hitting them will get us closer to victory in 2026!

_Thank you for continuing to support my campaign and joining our fight to elect more Democrats and stop Trump’s far-right agenda.

**Donations from grassroots supporters like you are what help us cross the finish line and will help us take back the House majority next year.

**So I want to thank you personally for your continued support and dedication to the fight against Trump.

Thank you,

Zoe Lofgren

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695518/555027861/91018577?refcode=250701_Jasmine_Convicted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2QyY2Y5Zi1jYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwV4k00VBJUEdwBPDp55YNuUCvga_NW8rpwmmfEHHAE=) **I’m Shawn Harris. I’m pissed, and I’m officially launching my campaign to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.** [**I’m about to explain why I’m running and why I need your support, but if you’re short on time, I’d be so grateful if you could step up and become one of my founding donors by chipping in $15 or more right away, split with my campaign and Ohio House Dems. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695519/555027862/91018577?refcode=250701_Jasmine_Convicted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2QyY2Y5Zi1jYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwV4k00VBJUEdwBPDp55YNuUCvga_NW8rpwmmfEHHAE=) I’m running for one simple reason: **Because leadership matters.** I grew up on my family’s farm in Blakely, Georgia. But I felt a calling to serve my country, so after high school, I enlisted in the U.S. Marine Corps before moving to the Army, where I retired as a Brigadier General after 40 years of service. But now, I’m bringing my experience back to my home in Northwest Georgia — **because it’s time for this community to get a true leader in Congress.** _Marjorie Taylor Greene is not a leader. All she cares about is getting rich off the backs of each and every one of you._ And in 2024, I received more votes to win this district than any other Democrat since 2012. Democrats, independents, and common-sense Republicans all came together, **and we scared Marjorie Taylor Greene.** Now, as we gear up for the next elections, we can finish what we started in 2024 and finally defeat her. [**So, please: do whatever you can. Send out postcards, knock on doors, and encourage people to register to vote — and chip in to help us win this race. Can I count on you to become one of my founding donors as I launch this campaign by chipping in $15 or more right now, split with my campaign and Ohio House Dems?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695520/555027863/91018577?refcode=250701_Jasmine_Convicted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2QyY2Y5Zi1jYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwV4k00VBJUEdwBPDp55YNuUCvga_NW8rpwmmfEHHAE=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110695521/555027864/-1009005290?amount=15&refcode=250701_Jasmine_Convicted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2QyY2Y5Zi1jYjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwV4k00VBJUEdwBPDp55YNuUCvga_NW8rpwmmfEHHAE= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

clean_body: | = I’m Shawn Harris. I’m pissed, and I’m officially launching my campaign to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. = I’m running for one simple reason: Because leadership matters. I grew up on my family’s farm in Blakely, Georgia. But I felt a calling to serve my country, so after high school, I enlisted in the U.S. Marine Corps before moving to the Army, where I retired as a Brigadier General after 40 years of service. But now, I’m bringing my experience back to my home in Northwest Georgia — because it’s time for this community to get a true leader in Congress. Marjorie Taylor Greene is not a leader. All she cares about is getting rich off the backs of each and every one of you. And in 2024, I received more votes to win this district than any other Democrat since 2012. Democrats, independents, and common-sense Republicans all came together, and we scared Marjorie Taylor Greene. Now, as we gear up for the next elections, we can finish what we started in 2024 and finally defeat her. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you, Shawn Harris P.S. Watch my campaign launch video NOW by = or on the thumbnail below. Then pitch in $20 or more to help make sure every Georgia-14 resident gets to see it, too! = = = OHDC 545 E. **The GOP’s Big Ugly Bill passed the Senate, and now, it’s headed to the House for another vote.** Peter — This is the cruelest, most callous bill I’ve seen during my time in Congress. Here are some highlights:
* It will close hospitals and nursing homes
* It will rip health care away from millions
* It will increase energy & grocery costs
* It will add $3.3 TRILLION to our country’s debt

Bottom line: Republicans are using their power to take food away from families and health care away from sick kids – all so they can give more tax breaks to billionaires. We’re running out of time as this bill moves through the House, and with a slim Republican majority, it’s going to take everything we’ve got to make sure this bill doesn’t become law. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: URGENT: We have less than 30 hours to stop the Reconciliation bill!
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2?contactdata=ojo2qMcvS3sG7ZNvqMS8sIvemLr9vX7CVZMlfK+X6v8aVMdEB4t+2Y3Fnjn92XB7VAuZ6f7oE6UFPGzfChDjxZcD4S4ExBNQxLDLTSYMqxxkRinY0X1quawR/us3la+H [https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2?contactdata=ojo2qMcvS3sG7ZNvqMS8sIvemLr9vX7CVZMlfK+X6v8aVMdEB4t+2Y3Fnjn92XB7VAuZ6f7oE6UFPGzfChDjxZcD4S4ExBNQxLDLTSYMqxxkRinY0X1quawR/us3la+H]
Hi Peter,
As of just a few hours ago, the U.S. Senate passed the Reconciliation Bill, —a.k.a. Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill—which is the most anti-environmental bill of all time that will severely harm our communities. Although this bill no longer contains the horrific proposal to put 250 million acres of public lands across 11 western states up for sale, thanks to immense public pressure, it still includes cuts to vital community and environmental programs, like the historic Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). We have less than 30 hours left to turn the heat up on the U.S. House to get them to vote NO on this detrimental Reconciliation bill. [https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2]
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2?contactdata=ojo2qMcvS3sG7ZNvqMS8sIvemLr9vX7CVZMlfK+X6v8aVMdEB4t+2Y3Fnjn92XB7VAuZ6f7oE6UFPGzfChDjxZcD4S4ExBNQxLDLTSYMqxxkRinY0X1quawR/us3la+H]
The cuts to the IRA would gut America’s clean energy production, raise energy costs for families across the nation, and eliminate thousands of jobs, all in the favor of billionaires and oil and gas executives. Our communities and environment would lose the funding already promised to them.
On top of this, cuts to lifesaving programs like Medicaid and SNAP would be detrimental to our communities. The federal government should work for us, not against us. We need to do everything in our power to stop the Reconciliation bill. Read the League of Conservation Voters’ statement here [https://www.lcv.org/media-center/senate-passes-most-anti-environmental-bill-of-all-time/] .
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2?contactdata=ojo2qMcvS3sG7ZNvqMS8sIvemLr9vX7CVZMlfK+X6v8aVMdEB4t+2Y3Fnjn92XB7VAuZ6f7oE6UFPGzfChDjxZcD4S4ExBNQxLDLTSYMqxxkRinY0X1quawR/us3la+H]
As we saw from the removal of the public lands proposal, if we band together and say that this goes against our interest, we can get our lawmakers to change their mind. There’s not much time to go before this bill gets voted on by the U.S. House. Will you join us in putting pressure on your members of Congress now so we can stop this bill? [https://secure.everyaction.com/8zA1VYkHZ0Ohc5Wj5afUDA2]
Let’s do this,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=yiTUJpacASoMIjKyN%2Bmjf3l4O4GQxjFxgfu40mnwCRXP5h%2FFp3aGlSw61Q1z%2BfO8BAS18us9oZDjLQ84q5FYl%2B78cUqB3PWGbjsWos0zCO5PTguoLFNBx3uXtrwvIGW2qxilRHUMyxj6Iu%2BAX3LbC1nZVnT7pLuNNZnlm8ohQZ%2BNdobfaRgPjpftZODoy%2BEQ2asxZkrksMQC8Nt7rFhs3WYWdD0MjEcwPsDnq%2FhkviHwhdLBCoyGp%2FLRhbJhHQOQV7HhSIJxSQgFdCuiqd%2FxGQIfrN5OHhmla1TJyJRMP%2BJOCzwM3jh%2BCJE7fSXwYUwagwEwQPW%2F8B7%2FwD4g5VLCz2JgjQnFSqwnC6WGTcD0fTHHZh85Atcs%2F95Ktbt9TdaHrLeAsfg1Nxo06L0YQZGdgsEV9OsQmGFB7beAcBRAyAg%3D .

The federal government should work for us, not against us. We need to do everything in our power to stop the Reconciliation bill. Read the League of Conservation Voters’ statement here [] . There’s not much time to go before this bill gets voted on by the U.S. House. Will you join us in putting pressure on your members of Congress now so we can stop this bill? [] Let’s do this, [] Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you from the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m proud to share that we reached our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2971%2E400544%2EWcI98U)
**We did it! 💛**
I’m proud to share that we reached our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal, and it’s all because of this incredible grassroots team.
Meeting this goal will help us continue to organize in every corner of New Mexico, engage in conversations with voters about what’s at stake, and ensure that no community is left out of this movement.
Together, we’re building a campaign as fierce and bold as New Mexico — one fueled by everyday people who are ready to challenge the status quo and change the game for our great state.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Be fierce,
Deb

More than 440,000 people who rely on SNAP to feed their families—including children, seniors, and people with disabilities—could see that support gutted. > [ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.S9HAp3xfPyOLNxrHjy5EIhfBvW7pbWKqpbt-07urZZQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167270818)
* * *
In a recent _New York Times_ podcast interview, billionaire technocrat Peter Thiel pulled back the curtain--just a little bit--on the ideology that has guided his decades-long mission (some might say obsession) to reshape American power.
What Thiel revealed in this interview didn't resemble a vision of progress. It was a peek inside the heart of darkness, moral decay and a blueprint for authoritarian control.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc9d4cf6-892b-4936-8fab-6a236781bae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thiel, the gay Silicon Valley billionaire who has backed Donald Trump since 2016, **dismissed democracy as inefficient**. He also questioned whether "too much participation" in our democracy has slowed America down. He openly fantasized about a post-liberal world governed by elite, centralized forces.
Thiel believes in acceleration. Not just of technology, but of upheaval. Collapse. Of a civilization and democracy so paralyzed by complexity that it must be reset by [something stronger--smarter, harder, colder](https://substack.com/redirect/039811f3-988a-4fa3-85c5-2face8d2aa7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Something more "rational."
This "rational" ideology--which has a cult-like devotion among followers--is called accelerationism. It un-ironically borrows from Karl Marx, and is shared by white supremacist groups who lead terror attacks against modern society to *hasten acceleration.*
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e553b718-8509-41da-ae62-55d0755a8898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In Thiel's interview, he didn't call for violence or fascism--but he didn't need to. It was as clear as day, and as serious as a heart attack. Thiel believes that "smarter, harder, colder, more rational" government can be provided by...him.
And people just like him.
Which is to say tech bros like Elon Musk, also an adherent of accelerationism. This is exactly what DOGE was about, destruction of government as an accelerant, because the system must go down. It wasn't about "reforming" anything. That was the usual PR ruse they need to put their kooky ideas into practice.
In case you think we're being alarmist, an explanation from a recent MSN piece:
### **Key Beliefs and Goals of Accelerationist Groups**
**Accelerationist groups share several core beliefs:**
1. **The Inevitability of Collapse:** Accelerationists assert that modern societies are inherently unstable, and any attempt to preserve the current order is futile.
2. **Use of Violence as a Catalyst:** The right-wing accelerationist movement, in particular, advocates for violence as a means of accelerating collapse, often targeting government institutions, law enforcement, and other societal symbols.
3. **Anonymity and Digital Organization:** Many accelerationist groups operate primarily online, using encrypted platforms and social media to recruit, spread propaganda, and coordinate activities.
4. **Apocalyptic Ideals:** They envision a post-collapse world where their ideals can thrive, often glorifying a new society free of perceived impurities or constraints.

The real danger is the wealthy, tech proponents of accelerationism give it a patina of near-respectability that _The Turner Diaries_ crowd never could. Just like with Trump, our corporate media is fine calling out klansman, but the guys who go to the same restaurants, vacation spots, andart-gallery openings? Not a chance.
So what does accelerationism really end up looking like? Well, a lot like authoritarianism with a Silicon Valley smile...
[| | | Tony Michaels 8h🚨 Peter Thiel wants to replace democracy
---
| 1| | |
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/30899422-tony-michaels/note/c-131062506)
> * * *
> **Blue Amp is building something bigger. Starting today, we're launching a new initiative --The Soundcheck Fund-- to elevate **_**independent media voices.**_
> **An ecosystem of the bold, truth-telling creators.**_**We 've already donated five figures to the cause. **_**We 'll have a link to the form and donate button soon for those wishing to help. **_**Get A Paid Subscription**_**, support a movement** _**that won 't be stopped**_**.**
> #### 🔵**Subscribe now! Power indy media & **_**our**_**democratic future**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.S9HAp3xfPyOLNxrHjy5EIhfBvW7pbWKqpbt-07urZZQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167270818)
* * *
And when you cut through the silly techo-babble about efficiency and simplicity, it all comes down to nothing much different than this line by Emperor Palpatine in _The Phantom Menace_ :
> The Republic is not what it once was. The Senate is full of greedy, squabbling delegates.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71173bc1-9073-4b20-8a10-4c0e1bb921d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The complexity of debate, slow movement demanded by the separation of powers, and differing opinions, all let Palpatine claim that debate and democracy were weakness. Moving quickly, coldly and forcefully, based on the opinions of just a few or one man (always men) that would make "the republic" stronger.
There's a name for that, but it isn't "the republic."
Getting back to Thiel, the problem is that these aren't just the musings of one, random man. Thiel has enormous resources at his disposal and funds candidates. Musk and other allies, such as David Sacks, have joined him in the endeavor (it must be a coincidence that all three are all from apartheid-era South Africa). Their wealth and reach means they can be destabiliziing on a global scale.
Thiel already saddled us with J.D. Vance. He nearly did the same with Blake Masters, and he has more tech-bro-autocrat-bots on the way. He also bankrolls media empires. He invests in surveillance, biotech, and AI systems that aim to replace public institutions--and suck up all our data.
He is a kingmaker for a future where elections, regulations, and even dissent are viewed as outdated bugs in an old operating system. Freedoms and democracy are like dial-up Internet. And [he is leading the fight against remaining opposition to his ideology within the GOP](https://substack.com/redirect/1855f98b-e0a4-4c57-b2e0-30c17e57d607?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> This isn't science fiction. It's the next version of America--unless we stop it.
* * *
### **Want the Full Breakdown?**
_**[The Coffman Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/31651501-0820-43af-ba74-3f4963a953c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ is preparing a full report inside _**[The Defend Liberty Project](https://substack.com/redirect/47850e9d-82c1-47ea-822c-4c704a6fe535?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ on how Thiel's vision intersects with Trump's authoritarianism, Silicon Valley's AI panic, and the collapse of democratic institutions. This is not just about tech. It's about liberty, sovereignty, and survival.

* **_Knocks 11.8 million people_** off of health care — including 310,000 Pennsylvanians who rely on Medicaid.

* **_Takes food assistance away from more than 7 million people and 2 million children,_** including 140,000 Pennsylvanians.

* **_Adds $3.3 TRILLION_** to the national deficit.

**All while giving tax cuts to BILLIONAIRES!!** This is how democracy dies, and we need to speak up and show up.

name: Bill of Rights Institute
subject: What is the purpose of the government?
body:
https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuewzcIteknop5I0ITmcld5kd6&s=CODNEPAANDLGIFNC
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
------------------------------------------------------------
FreedomWorks

Friend,

What is the purpose of the government?

It seems like a question too big to answer, but John Adams took his best stab at it in his 1776 âThoughts on Government.â

Written just before the Declaration of Independence, this piece was key to how the founders thought about how to structure the new government that would be the first of its kind in the modern world.

We know you donât have time to read all of Adamsâs work, so we put together an explainer for you to learn more about the foundations that inspired our Republic.

If you make a donation of ANY amount to the Bill of Rights Institute today we will send you a video that dives into President John Adamsâs âThoughts on Governmentâ as a thank you! (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuewzcIteknop5I1ITmcld5kd6&s=CODNEPAANDLGIFNC

With this explainer, you can get right into the head of one of our most important founders.

This video is great for teachers and history buffs alike who want to brush up on their knowledge of one of Americaâs founding texts.

Or even better, share it with someone who could use a quick civics update!

Unlock our âThoughts on Governmentâ explainer today with your contribution of any amount and see the inner workings of one of the greatest minds of the American Revolution! (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuewzcIteknop5I2ITmcld5kd6&s=CODNEPAANDLGIFNC

At the Bill of Rights Institute, weâre focused on spreading the wisdom of American history with a focus on civics and the constitution.

Our great American principles take a backseat when civics education and history literacy decline, and weâre focused on putting them back on the top of the docket.

name: Costello for U.S. Senate
subject: Thank You for Your Support
body:
Thank you for supporting our efforts to unseat Senator Susan Collins and end the Trump Administration and GOP's reckless assault on our democracy.

| | | | | [|
---](https://costelloforsenate.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d37adbc910a9a40e00b14f5&id=980e8abb41&e=5d7176e969)
| | | | |
Friends, Thank you for supporting our efforts to unseat Senator Susan Collins and end the Trump Administration and GOP Congress’s reckless assault on our values, democracy, and environment. Winning over the U.S. Senate in 2026 is key to ending the turmoil in Washington, and ensuring that all Americans, not just the wealthy, are provided with the education, job skills, and other life enriching opportunities to thrive. As you know, Senator Collins has done little to prevent the Trump Administration and her Republican colleagues from undertaking a range of immensely harmful actions, from the curtailment of vital medical research to the elimination of essential government programs. Not surprisingly, given that 1 in 4 Maine families will be harmed, Senator Collins was today given a pass by the Trump WH and GOP leadership to vote against the Administration and the Congress’s disastrous “Big, Beautiful Bill.” I had earlier suggested that Senator Collins was obliged to do more to kill the bill than simply casting a vote against it. Arguing that the GOP’s deficit-ballooning, safety-net slashing, wealth-favoring monstrosity of a budget reconciliation bill is a direct attack on Maine’s working families and the clean economy jobs that our future depends on. **** In casting her largely irrelevant vote against the bill, Senator Collins did what she’s generally done over the past 28 years in the U.S. Senate, just enough to appear reasonable and somewhat independent, but not enough to make a real difference. If you, like me, believe it’s well past time we made a real difference in Washington, please share this email with others and consider contributing $20, or any amount that works for you, to aid in our efforts to defeat Senator Collins and begin the hard work of fixing our imperfect and terribly broken federal government. Thank you and best always,David
---

name: David Shadburn, LCV
subject: BREAKING — The Big, Ugly Bill passed the Senate: Tell the House to say NO to raising our energy bills
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2NTg4NzMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI2MDAyMDE1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL MEMBERS OF CONGRESS: SAY NO TO RAISING OUR ENERGY COSTS

The Big, Ugly Bill passed the Senate, and it’s heading back to the House for
final passage. Tell your member of Congress to vote NO. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_ TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. I have some breaking news, Peter. The Senate just approved the so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill” (or as it should be
known, the Big, Ugly Bill). This bill would destroy the future of clean energy in this country, increase
energy costs, slash hundreds of thousands of good jobs, drill on our public
lands and waters, increase pollution in our schools and our communities, and put
polluters above the law — all to give tax cuts to the wealthiest among us. With this bill, billionaires and Big Polluters win, and everyone else will
suffer. Now, the bill goes back to the House of Representatives for final passage.
Republicans have one last chance to show where they stand: will they vote No and
stand with families, or will they vote Yes and stand with billionaires and Big
Polluters? We have to show them where we stand. Tell members of Congress to vote NO on gutting clean energy investments and drilling on our public lands and waters. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- The Republican majority in Congress is razor-thin, and a number of Republican
members have already spoken out against this sledgehammer approach to clean
energy. Without their votes, the bill cannot pass, but there’s enormous pressure
on them to cave to Trump and support it. This is our last chance as a movement to stop this bill from rolling back the
clean energy progress we’ve worked so hard to achieve. Tell your member of Congress: DO NOT gut clean energy tax credits — VOTE NO on this Big, Ugly Bill and protect our air, water, and public lands. https://links.messages.lcv. You’ve been with us the whole way, Peter. Thank you for being with us
again. In solidarity, David Shadburn
Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12658873&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDAyMDE1OQS2&spReportId=MjI2MDAyMDE1OQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12658873&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDAyMDE1OQS2&spReportId=MjI2MDAyMDE1OQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZMd~

name: Ron Wyden
subject: The big Republican betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
The Republican budget bill is a betrayal of the American people
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110696529/555030934/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzRjNzIxYy1jZjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4u509LsVkXR-2-LKUIxagk3YgQ96Q-cBAkn4WsP_0yI=&emci=2b5de990-c756-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=434c721c-cf56-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Senate Republicans just passed their "One Big Beautiful Bill." My Democratic colleagues and I fought hard until the final roll call vote to make sure the American people know every terrible aspect of this budget bill. Because while it may be big, it is anything but beautiful. As a trade-off for gifting Trump's billionaire donors with another tax cut, the bill:
* Cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and kicks 17 million people off their health care
* Slashes nutritional assistance for up to 2 million kids
* Defunds Planned Parenthood
* Cuts clean energy

**This legislation is a massive betrayal of the American people, and every Republican who voted for it owns the consequences.** They're now hoping the House moves fast to rubber-stamp the bill by Donald Trump's July 4th deadline. **We must do everything we can to slow the process down.** Vulnerable House Republicans need to understand that if they support this bill, they are co-signing a deeply unpopular set of policies, and the American people won't forget that come 2026. **Right now, we need our voices to be loud, and our chorus to be large.** Public mobilization and demonstration are the best tools we have left to stop the GOP budget. So if you believe it's wrong to cut health care and food assistance for working people to pay for billionaire tax breaks, I hope you'll join me. If you believe our investments in clean energy should be protected, join me. If you believe in reproductive freedom, join me. clean_body: The Republican budget bill is a betrayal of the American people | | | | Senate Republicans just passed their "One Big Beautiful Bill." My Democratic colleagues and I fought hard until the final roll call vote to make sure the American people know every terrible aspect of this budget bill. Because while it may be big, it is anything but beautiful. As a trade-off for gifting Trump's billionaire donors with another tax cut, the bill: Cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and kicks 17 million people off their health care Slashes nutritional assistance for up to 2 million kids Defunds Planned Parenthood Cuts clean energy This legislation is a massive betrayal of the American people, and every Republican who voted for it owns the consequences. They're now hoping the House moves fast to rubber-stamp the bill by Donald Trump's July 4th deadline. We must do everything we can to slow the process down. Vulnerable House Republicans need to understand that if they support this bill, they are co-signing a deeply unpopular set of policies, and the American people won't forget that come 2026. Right now, we need our voices to be loud, and our chorus to be large. Public mobilization and demonstration are the best tools we have left to stop the GOP budget. So if you believe it's wrong to cut health care and food assistance for working people to pay for billionaire tax breaks, I hope you'll join me. If you believe our investments in clean energy should be protected, join me. If you believe in reproductive freedom, join me. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Peter,
Senate Republicans just voted for the largest cuts to Medicaid since the program began in the 1960s.
$1 TRILLION slashed.
12 MILLION people set to lose health coverage.
Rural hospitals on the brink of collapse.
Families forced into medical debt.
People with disabilities losing their care.
Seniors losing their dignity.
And why?
To give billionaires more tax breaks and fund Donald Trump's reckless, $3 trillion megabill.
They say you "won't feel" these cuts. But that's a lie.
We will all feel this in emergency rooms, in nursing homes, in communities where hospitals shut their doors. This is cruelty, and it's being done with full knowledge of the harm it will cause.
Now the bill heads back to the House. And let us be clear: Every Republican who votes yes is choosing billionaire donors over their own constituents.
So here's what we're doing: 🔵 We've identified 29 vulnerable Republican seats — including 5 freshmen we intend to retire. name: Jason Crow
subject: “The New Schiff”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8737%2E5257348%2ETQxiJ2)
Derek —
I know we can count on Adam Schiff to stand up for what’s right — our freedoms, our democracy, our Constitution.
Adam and I served together as impeachment managers during Donald Trump’s first impeachment. As a result, we were ruthlessly attacked for our efforts to hold the president accountable and bring truth to light.
**Adam and I have kept up that work — and for that, we’ve been the targets of far-right attacks again and again.**
Trump, Elon Musk, and countless others have come after Adam for his work to stand up for our democracy.
And I was recently attacked on Twitter by Ric Grenell, former acting Director of National Intelligence and right-wing hack, for speaking out against Trump’s unconstitutional strikes in Iran.
_He even called me “the new Schiff.”_
**I’ll wear that title as a badge of honor — because Adam is a defender of our democracy and our Constitution.**
While extremists are working to divide us and undermine the very foundation of our democracy, Adam and I are fighting for an America where everyone has a fair shot to work hard and get ahead, where our differences make us stronger, and where we can build on our democracy together.
**[Will you help us keep up the fight for what’s right? Split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff to continue holding Trump accountable.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-crow.6Be4sO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250701_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8737%2E5257348%2ETQxiJ2)**

He even called me “the new Schiff.” I’ll wear that title as a badge of honor — because Adam is a defender of our democracy and our Constitution. While extremists are working to divide us and undermine the very foundation of our democracy, Adam and I are fighting for an America where everyone has a fair shot to work hard and get ahead, where our differences make us stronger, and where we can build on our democracy together. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you, Derek. — Jason | | 135 E. name: Raul
subject: We did it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=6tpscrmyvT98VNpRaSZLD002WaNIupvK9%2Fne%2B2pmwxzqxQtuNI%2FRbMZh3TqcbXK%2F2AywVUYvcWvHFVrk4NUhjhIYy%2FGsbVHgyYbenI8Sgy8N%2BPw1q9zNLdPxlRLaxDhq2bapuWSgjbj%2BEbHgkhUDkRvWeMektejQ2H57ErmxfhbeY%2BRaKyPwLZSRqEqMkVJmk3AsI29s09BaAG4yi4ooiB%2FZmxVI6oAuC9FrGc0CpU87DZzf9Kk3JM2YnwkOB39YeswDXzSkGDTsege7QTog1445bvtXRlFvDQ%2FnJlH9Swo978R0xKdGqYxGfPgeD5RTiZ6N1q0TGkLgSs5lxsWQhW%2BqeeN7HBzXi%2BL9OkZqDYarwGo3scACV3ATGfhUSkO1MaL1av8YNTVbyh4Es6Hfn5pzM0JFPuRTdJRcUl%2BrYvrVmPTNZNz2Mu31Z%2B3Sk%2Bj5]

# [#]
We did it.

We hit our end-of-quarter goal, thanks to you. I can't tell you enough how important this was — not just to me, but to the movement we’re building ahead of the 2026 midterms.

The Trump administration is determined to punish California for being a Democratic stronghold, and they're doing this with smear tactics, targeted policies, and military intimidation.

They think they can divide us, and that's why your support is so important.

By helping us reach our end-of-quarter goal, we sent a clear message: Californians are furious with Trump and the Republicans letting him steamroll our democracy, and we're standing together to reject it.

So I want to thank you personally for showing up – not just for CA-25, but for the values we stand for as Democrats and as Americans.

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: George Whitesides
subject: Thank you + what we’re up against
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

Before I get into what just happened in Washington, I want to extend my gratitude. With your support, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal – a key benchmark for keeping CA-27 blue and flipping the House majority.

There’s no time to slow down: A few hours ago, Senate Republicans with the tie-breaking vote from JD Vance just passed Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” It moves back to the House for another vote.

I want you to know that I’m fighting back against this devastating legislation that will cut food aid for over 5.5 million people in California, gut over $800 billion from Medicaid, Medicare and the Affordable Care Act, and much more.

Instead of uplifting working families across the country, Republicans are more concerned with giving tax breaks to their billionaire donors. It’s shameful, and we have one more chance to stop it in its tracks.

If you’re with me, please sign onto my petition to reject this Big Ugly Bill.

Add your name >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/RUQ8aQqwi02R1Sm4C1yayA2?refcode=em-7.1.25-all-a

Thank you,

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-footer]
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=pQW%2F41CosItIuHN9rzVkaxb0c5Wjry6I4X0YlFz8XvDRV5UUu2mOxzqH9osEcH4KtLK52Pu24odPC17bbLMTQHKgTWfC9KFNIfyQgGnG%2Bthw%2Bzqrl4PgXQjqMh3OwVTmTDftHet1B6XstR78KaWJipN67d5W7y%2BeZ8OcKGskiakbxYTOVoXuWE7uw7eZ7AsRtE5AX6xwXzzwh%2BhleRBaDSSUr48XhHb9DV8makdCS2C%2Behocr%2BMejwMNW%2BP71dxewdk5xTm8ZiAa19CgmPqhsFi1GxgNx54Vrp0aaFubL1OV8JzPQp6VUJ5pongHtLlkHNnpFJfIDF9M90mF%2Fh7ZDw7UWYXYYqRn2H%2BPenACk7agq9TAJTOPpDtiGXjRWOKrHdZuVK8s0Ujt141Pu2%2Faa3ulv5ZdEF3h1hkp0t1o0cwurP3XnMdbPYJBuOSRbYeR .

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I’m working hard to stay hopeful in the face of Trump’s horror
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Republicans are rushing to hurt the most vulnerable and the planet.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110697279/555033542/1328794144?refcode=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMTk4NTk2LWQyNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w4vSTW_Mz_kPDfaCJI7LyoSfOpt4nndI5ePuiDgGJYI=&emci=abcfe45e-b556-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Hello, It is horrific that Republican Senators voted to pass Trump’s inhumane bill. This bill, and this moment, will go down in history as the moment the US turned away from solutions, from being a leader, from kindness and decency. Recovering as a democracy, as a functioning society, on a livable planet will be challenging. The bill drastically cuts support for renewable energy, offers billions in giveaways for oil and gas, and rolls back essential environmental protections. But that's not all. It slashes Medicaid, vital food assistance programs, and more all while lining the pockets of billionaires. That said—we must remain hopeful in the face of this total lack of empathy for working families and for the natural world upon which our lives depend. Let’s remember that when we resist through organizing, raising our voices, pressuring our electeds, creating a supportive community, we can have victories and we need to celebrate them. Most recently, Republican Senator Mike Lee was forced to drop his proposal to sell off more than 3 million acres of public lands across 11 Western states. That is worth celebrating. This wouldn’t have happened without tens of thousands of you making your voices heard. Thank you. Resisting will also help you feel hopeful in the face of what’s happening. I believe that hope itself is a form of resistance. I’ve been able to avoid depression because I’m doing everything I can. My climate PAC is helping elect pro-democracy and pro-climate champions all across the country and we’re going to go all out to take back the House in 2026. Achieving this will help minimize Trump’s damage and prevent more going forward. Trump wants the House to pass this budget before July 4th, but several Republican lawmakers could still be on the fence. **[If you’re in a district represented by a Republican in the House, please click here to take a couple minutes to call them as soon as possible and ask them to vote NO on this bill before it comes up for a final vote.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110697280/555033543/-570359689?refcode=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMTk4NTk2LWQyNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w4vSTW_Mz_kPDfaCJI7LyoSfOpt4nndI5ePuiDgGJYI=&emci=abcfe45e-b556-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** Together, we’ve already proven we can make a difference. Let’s keep going—because when we fight together, we win.

With My Love,
Jane Fonda
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110697281/555033544/2105508926?refcode=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMTk4NTk2LWQyNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w4vSTW_Mz_kPDfaCJI7LyoSfOpt4nndI5ePuiDgGJYI=) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110697282/555033545/2105508926?refcode=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.cc198596-d256-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjMTk4NTk2LWQyNTYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w4vSTW_Mz_kPDfaCJI7LyoSfOpt4nndI5ePuiDgGJYI=)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=420db3d7d90d4932b1a4b4806232de64&_e=eVehrt8lWs-T-iFa4vfOcDer0Q29jv6A4szr2ZsDuOu5svSCcPPr0ploEfRfHinYPdegQ8bKtcv_sboCiXJ1GoRqyfdiluwWHuTg68dVjPtQGTbQR3IJWTY7ZpOgYSjHV3tWcer-3B0Wy-BuerQaCzwKcwW8izV-qx9GeYqYWk98qs0o8jiEIIt5luOgUgzbSudPD36eSR_pZr4hJR8E3trTRHbsEy9wFoXe6UWCikbDcc_AB_pDWS6FIf2-oPGwuo7M33XDIeWkRYfEcHA9H8Ik4nqUszq2OpaD7xeEjU0drqzLjvEUymVJZbL9BDnuGkreJ75J9e1SKwh1lTAhVPnnO7y9qBE402ksVqfkL0Ovv6IRT6CeWbr1DngmANtjfdYaEgdmSGHc7Bx3N6i2BqyEJLoKDVjXKsQVmzNbjBFdXKdfL4Qtgzk5jeZ2lE8bTBho-jMQC3zcT-Zat8EQxQjXBNCNYlZ-qxZnRz99AERyZa4rNaAZnlXnjqtpQJKbHlfPoDPv8dvTuf0rm-BGJJWaIR5_PQQjPD183CDnEv-BDj2rQXsL8xrEGOh39Bsd)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: The math is not mathing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Even if you believe everything Republicans say without evidence, the _largest_ amount of "waste, fraud, and abuse" they have found is $50 billion.
So why are they cutting over $975 billion from Medicaid?
**The math is not mathing**. It's because they've been given an assignment.
But while MAGA tries to gut Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security to pay for tax cuts for billionaires, people across the country are standing up against these attacks on the working class.
[Will you chip in $5 today to help Alexandria meet these folks on the road and host more town halls across the country? Every contribution helps us fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250701-2.VRGM2i&refcode=em20250701-9225-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9225%2E2526796%2EO9a8dt)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: BREAKING: We’re suing Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250701&t=1001&akid=1857%2E1088799%2E8civ4R ]Rob Bonta

Breaking news:

I just filed a lawsuit with 19 other attorneys general against the Trump
administration for illegally handing over Californians’ private health
information to the Department of Homeland Security and ICE.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250701?refcode=em20250701-1857&refcode2=1857_1088799_8civ4R&akid=1857%2E1088799%2E8civ4R ]If you want to help power this important work, click here to chip in to
my re-election campaign now →

Private health information is protected by federal law, regardless of
immigration status. Shipping personal data from the Department of Health
and Human Services over to ICE is not only an unprecedented departure from
established privacy regulations — it's illegal.

Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: President Trump, Secretary
Kristi Noem, and Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. are weaponizing Medicaid
and threatening the personal health data of more than 70 million people in
order to fuel their anti-immigrant agenda.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250701?refcode=em20250701-1857&refcode2=1857_1088799_8civ4R&akid=1857%2E1088799%2E8civ4R ]We’re asking the court to put a stop to this administration’s unlawful
sharing of protected health information. If you’re with me, please
consider chipping in $15 or $20 to support our grassroots fight to hold
the President accountable to the rule of law.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250701?refcode=em20250701-1857&amount=5&refcode2=1857_1088799_8civ4R&akid=1857%2E1088799%2E8civ4R ]Donate $5 »

This is just one more escalation in Trump’s blatant and unending campaign
against immigrant communities.

I refuse to stand idly by while the President goes after vulnerable
people, attacks public health, and breaches the trust between individuals
and their government. If these actions go unchecked, they will have
detrimental consequences for years to come. This is about people’s lives,
not sick political games.

Thanks for standing with me,

Rob

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Leader Robert Reives (via DLCC.org)
subject: Will you attend the DLCC’s Down Ballot Defender Summit on July 9th, 2025?
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Grassroots supporters fuel Democrats to victories nationwide, building power in the states seat-by-seat, cycle after cycle. | | |
---
| |
---|---
I've served in the North Carolina House of Representatives for over a decade, sponsoring legislation to strengthen public schools and to help protect children, people with disabilities, and the environment. **Democratic supporters like you power our mission and help ensure our states meet our vision of a brighter tomorrow.** Grassroots supporters fuel Democrats to victories nationwide, building power in the states seat-by-seat, cycle after cycle. That’s why I wanted to invite you to our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit, where you’ll hear directly from state legislators about how we’re working to strengthen communities like yours. name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: We should be expanding, not slashing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter — after days of backroom deliberations, Senate Majority Leader John Thune finally cut enough deals to muscle Trump’s devastating budget bill through the Senate.

Now, I’m heading back to Washington and ready to **vote NO** once again – _because the One Big Beautiful Bill is a direct threat to the health and well-being of my constituents and millions of Americans across the country._

**This bill includes the most extreme Medicaid cuts we’ve ever seen.** It puts families at risk of losing their health care and food assistance — and it hits communities like ours especially hard.

[**As a doctor, I’ve been fighting tooth and nail to stop this big, ugly bill. But I need your help: will you add your name and stand against these devastating cuts to health care and food assistance?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110697617/555034838/-1459843921?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250701_PT_PostBBB_0_3MO_Bera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNhNTUxMi1kNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYEFK5T_gv1V8h-OcViAL8Vjx7jVtSH7eMbiBo-BCLU=&emci=28ca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2aca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32394541)
| | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110697618/555034839/1561542071?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250701_PT_PostBBB_0_3MO_Bera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNhNTUxMi1kNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYEFK5T_gv1V8h-OcViAL8Vjx7jVtSH7eMbiBo-BCLU=&emci=28ca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2aca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32394541)
---

By supporting this bill Republicans are showing us that they are more afraid of Donald Trump than they are of hurting their own constituents.

_And that’s unacceptable_. We should be expanding care, not ripping it away from the people who need it most. [**If you agree, sign on today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110697619/555034840/-1459843921?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250701_PT_PostBBB_0_3MO_Bera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNhNTUxMi1kNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYEFK5T_gv1V8h-OcViAL8Vjx7jVtSH7eMbiBo-BCLU=&emci=28ca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2aca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32394541)
| [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110697620/555034841/1561542071?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250701_PT_PostBBB_0_3MO_Bera_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNhNTUxMi1kNjU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYEFK5T_gv1V8h-OcViAL8Vjx7jVtSH7eMbiBo-BCLU=&emci=28ca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2aca5512-d656-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32394541)

Thank you for your support, now and always.

– Dr. Ami Bera
